| Dear Patriot, I have sad news to report to you. Innocent children are in grave danger -- and your tax money is illegally being used to perform hundreds of thousands of abortions across America. Steve has always said that Nevadans have a good eye for determining what’s a bunch of baloney and what’s not. But, it’s been a little while since Dean lost his seat in 2018, so let us catch you up to speed on what his record in Congress looked like.
_Dean voted to get rid of the Affordable Care_ Act which would’ve stripped _thousands_ of Nevadans of their health care coverage. Additionally, _he strongly supported and voted for Trump’s tax bill that gave handouts to the wealthiest in our country._
Now, he’s said that he "likes what they did in Texas" and promises to pass “the most conservative anti-choice laws the state will allow.”
**We’ve made too much progress here in Nevada to let those sorts of policies take hold.** Under Governor Sisolak’s leadership, we implemented a historic public option for health care coverage, advocated for workers and unions, and helped our economy bounce back from the pandemic.
**The work we’ve accomplished together could be lost entirely if someone like Dean Heller gets anywhere close to the Governor’s seat.**

clean_body: | | | | | Team, here are our thoughts on Dean Heller’s launch video... It’s one really big dog whistle. To summarize his video, it’s a whole ton of lies to rile up Trump’s far-right base and not a lot of substance. Announcement videos are always the first impression that a candidate makes to potential voters, and Dean used his to lie about our state and the work we’ve accomplished. The truth is, Nevadans had to deal with Trump’s lies for four long years and they’ve had enough. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Steve has always said that Nevadans have a good eye for determining what’s a bunch of baloney and what’s not. But, it’s been a little while since Dean lost his seat in 2018, so let us catch you up to speed on what his record in Congress looked like. Dean voted to get rid of the Affordable Care Act which would’ve stripped thousands of Nevadans of their health care coverage. Additionally, he strongly supported and voted for Trump’s tax bill that gave handouts to the wealthiest in our country. Now, he’s said that he "likes what they did in Texas" and promises to pass “the most conservative anti-choice laws the state will allow.” We’ve made too much progress here in Nevada to let those sorts of policies take hold. Under Governor Sisolak’s leadership, we implemented a historic public option for health care coverage, advocated for workers and unions, and helped our economy bounce back from the pandemic. The work we’ve accomplished together could be lost entirely if someone like Dean Heller gets anywhere close to the Governor’s seat. | | | | | | | | | | | | Together, we’ll send Dean the message that Nevadans are tired of the same old divisive rhetoric and want to continue down our path of progress. Thank you, Team Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. name: Steve Chabot
subject: A Tale of Two Bombings
body:
The worst foreign affairs blunder in American history... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-trfjkuk-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trfjkuk-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trfjkuk-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [A Tale of Two Bombings](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trfjkuk-kujkulhluu-j/)
During the hasty pullout from Afghanistan, a car containing innocent Afghan civilians, seven of them children, was mistakenly targeted with an American hellfire missile. Biden received very little criticism. But several years back, when Donald Trump took out a top Iranian thug, Qasem Soleimani, it was another story. Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trfjkuk-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trfjkuk-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [How Do We Stop This Insanity?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trfjkuk-kujkulhluu-d/)
Are you concerned that Washington Democrats are destroying the country? If so, here's what you can do about it. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trfjkuk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trfjkuk-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Changing the Subject](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trfjkuk-kujkulhluu-u/)
The withdrawal from Afghanistan was a disaster. Biden's poll numbers have tanked. He'll do anything to change the subject. His friends in the press want to help. Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trfjkuk-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trfjkuk-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Ending Endless Wars?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trfjkuk-kujkulhluu-n/)
Joe Biden claims he just got us out of an "endless war." The problem is, one's enemy gets a vote. He also promised he wouldn't pull the troops until all American civilians and our allies were out. He lied. Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trfjkuk-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trfjkuk-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trfjkuk-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trfjkuk-kujkulhluu-c/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trfjkuk-kujkulhluu-q/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trfjkuk-kujkulhluu-a/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trfjkuk-kujkulhluu-f/) [ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-trfjkuk-kujkulhluu-v/) [ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-trfjkuk-kujkulhluu-e/) [ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-trfjkuk-l-s) | Chabot for Congress, P.O. subject: ICYMI Fwd: 75 Refugees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins
body:
We're resending this important email from Wilmot to make sure that you saw it. Afghan refugees will be arriving in our state soon and Wilmot's working | | | We're resending this important email from Wilmot to make sure that you saw it. Afghan refugees will be arriving in our state soon and Wilmot's working hard to help them, while Congressman Rosendale only wants to oppose their relocation. **[Help us stand up against people like Rosendale and donate $30 dollars now so that we can continue to help the refugees who need our support.](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=8061e8422277445b8ef24e26c5c8edef&_e=vR0pgdYhzg6X2DY0bq3dZ_8o5_JLAr3CGI7zZ9itoQDGIEG65BtC-4oD7zAoufyJE44T9GQL_nOnfX8dAVdQhepWc1FVdHKmzCzfFSyuLKICRksVOVHdasi0YPFouZmUvu7u0jaV4fOBLNSbp2-luKVmjEHlpaZCluLUzdTmXXgZRFGHQAEY_iNvBBxqOKv7-Zs7bdUowuu__xPivptSko2jSsaQ9aZDrmHd_0BvX84H6fEjf3m4GAsFZYK9lswZpbKrCUhuwk0XKoB_dTCrMapaHEtBdrZiOe7DD7wB9FZAqFD7oO2nVz8fpgL1lmE_01Dn6PjNC3uoTEI3Ak_atk7xKrEaVYOWEnLXlVRbhqMS2AqV8spPWVfsip-p3Ju1i3-MroKWoXPMiVbmjkC3XNFJQqaM1XaLObjS9j6yaG7xgoSmYMs4BaNuZy5I8EZc9KLiVp2JYebxPYPY6WNC4wWzYOvsO2K-KIhRBgzhJorTrnqa3gGqGFJdAO0aPrNr)** \- Team Wilmot _\---- Forwarded Message ----_ [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=8061e8422277445b8ef24e26c5c8edef&_e=LwCnRrffe7fGIUb-LHQORlxSYt7SgXfFRyBWYEYbJPze7agoCrfSM5vgdQNHT8wWPIh1rWrtZGUOXWgBTZzo6Au4Y0jHnil4TgPcEsitQC7rMsN58IbxGhDxqXBZysxWgVmuBiNTPN1xaROSA7tVJDcov9WXKEFzlzQmJGsm-sCv9BXoWJnqo3cYGS4m1pvRxGs_i8a0DNe9KHZt1QTtPiOfZgMC1dzoD-KEbrt6at9H1c5nEmtWN8NLA6vd1JfI8HvCegChRP9FbeGoHbCvn5qomU_Cw0E-g-YTi_3SKgrB3KUAKVTJITS9Zt8pm5A56FmpUYVVclklRjC7eVdqNyFq3xrb64WZjshIkmNWx4i0Tp_X2uf24bw8_ER7ly1hIUwegpr2vmHXXYxS20D2pCHFj1zVY0dE-sVTKKCpBbC9vLP7zukVCAhIgba0ZxU-FTFZ-awtGqPnn5kZc7S24JYzcfD42GzEfInPk0oXzK8%3D) Hey friend, There has been word that 75 Afghan refugees will be arriving in Montana soon. As a former refugee myself, I cannot wait to welcome them to our beautiful home. People like Congressman Matt Rosendale only want to spread negativity and xenophobia by opposing their relocation. **Refugees are NOT A THREAT** , and we cannot let these right-wing extremists convince people that they are. They are just trying to escape a mess that the U.S. helped create. **[Help us stand up against people like Matt Rosendale and donate $30 dollars now so that we can continue to fight for the refugees who need our support.](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=8061e8422277445b8ef24e26c5c8edef&_e=vR0pgdYhzg6X2DY0bq3dZ_8o5_JLAr3CGI7zZ9itoQDGIEG65BtC-4oD7zAoufyJE44T9GQL_nOnfX8dAVdQhepWc1FVdHKmzCzfFSyuLKICRksVOVHdasi0YPFouZmUvu7u0jaV4fOBLNSbp2-luKVmjEHlpaZCluLUzdTmXXgZRFGHQAEY_iNvBBxqOKv7-Zs7bdUowuu__xPivptSko2jSsaQ9aZDrmHd_0BvX84H6fEjf3m4GAsFZYK9lswZpbKrCUhuwk0XKoB_dTCrMbdFtE3sW4qGs1Mt8i49cE5-hFLLofQF0dRhsTuIV1VB9SxesnIiX-rkYBgyJ3EoYhhk6ovOq2tOsuLcgolrwNj6CjCSxaJyHyn_OQDfhOl4IneF1ALPP1TCiSi6AaLuWySaik4sWUhlqlL4avD8dHk2mDkyBYAVXOcwDrZB5uwVU0CxAG41SSd-VmhvNHk7uHalz7tFZjA6r2UwBeIdkB7s4fafSbcPyFr2_ewYC_jb)** [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=8061e8422277445b8ef24e26c5c8edef&_e=vR0pgdYhzg6X2DY0bq3dZ_8o5_JLAr3CGI7zZ9itoQDGIEG65BtC-4oD7zAoufyJE44T9GQL_nOnfX8dAVdQhepWc1FVdHKmzCzfFSyuLKICRksVOVHdasi0YPFouZmUvu7u0jaV4fOBLNSbp2-luKVmjEHlpaZCluLUzdTmXXgZRFGHQAEY_iNvBBxqOKv7-Zs7bdUowuu__xPivptSko2jSsaQ9aZDrmHd_0BvX84H6fEjf3m4GAsFZYK9lswZRK9eGYCvPXaULmTNcDR3CzMFBnwHkuRzOCnuOxWh37F1EJ8cAuD4-ErsbXlERTVVdXquUqFV5Ai-94WKfExPBNlUo6Ac2csg7o0nFZl9_ciGLf8gTrSMuiEzI4lXWoqGl6ceUYxc9ZweUeoJ4OGjLvSPhsWQW2bH2Vog5F2O2DAc5FhhNp-pFMWaNHAHtP1VSXw6w-Be0t8YbiDHrph0zCd3ksE8ZsMVKJFWhh7abNc%3D) When I came to Helena as a Liberian war refugee, I was scared of how people would receive me since I was coming from a chaotic war situation. But when I arrived people’s arms were open to me, and that was very humbling. Coming to Montana was definitely a culture shock for me and I have no doubt that it will be the same for these refugees. However, if we embrace them with open arms, I am sure that they will flourish and come to love Montana, just as I did. **I know that these refugees could really enrich our communities with their experiences and culture as long as we accept and support them.** I would not be where I am today had the people of Helena not done this for me, so let’s make sure we do the same for them. And who knows, maybe one day you will see one of them in office. **[Will you chip in today in support of showing these refugees the compassion and kindness that I know you all have?](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=8061e8422277445b8ef24e26c5c8edef&_e=vR0pgdYhzg6X2DY0bq3dZ_8o5_JLAr3CGI7zZ9itoQDGIEG65BtC-4oD7zAoufyJE44T9GQL_nOnfX8dAVdQhepWc1FVdHKmzCzfFSyuLKICRksVOVHdasi0YPFouZmUvu7u0jaV4fOBLNSbp2-luKVmjEHlpaZCluLUzdTmXXgZRFGHQAEY_iNvBBxqOKv7-Zs7bdUowuu__xPivptSko2jSsaQ9aZDrmHd_0BvX84H6fEjf3m4GAsFZYK9lswZRK9eGYCvPXaULmTNcDR3C4M-jyw4BFRPWE1n90FN0ToTF6-EOhl9akQW0uOsRxSBSUugz43agNWHLmv-UCwwvGSEyt-mAmmi1qdnWj3KQGrBh4QG6kJWQDzb9FYojlmRuXJuE0YHAvj-tfuZV0tcbG9xFsccZJPtJLT21O6qdbjPz7sJ-O986w0uj3KmQYlduNMr5hz1MNokItog_lsQ4Jp4brKw_lUcaP5pHf7ZzuA%3D)** It is important that we maintain the integrity of our State and don’t let it fall victim to the fear-mongering of others. Afghan refugees will be arriving in our state soon and Wilmot's working | | | We're resending this important email from Wilmot to make sure that you saw it. Afghan refugees will be arriving in our state soon and Wilmot's working hard to help them, while Congressman Rosendale only wants to oppose their relocation. \- Team Wilmot \---- Forwarded Message ---- Hey friend, There has been word that 75 Afghan refugees will be arriving in Montana soon. As a former refugee myself, I cannot wait to welcome them to our beautiful home. People like Congressman Matt Rosendale only want to spread negativity and xenophobia by opposing their relocation. Refugees are NOT A THREAT , and we cannot let these right-wing extremists convince people that they are. They are just trying to escape a mess that the U.S. helped create. When I came to Helena as a Liberian war refugee, I was scared of how people would receive me since I was coming from a chaotic war situation. But when I arrived people’s arms were open to me, and that was very humbling. Coming to Montana was definitely a culture shock for me and I have no doubt that it will be the same for these refugees. However, if we embrace them with open arms, I am sure that they will flourish and come to love Montana, just as I did. I know that these refugees could really enrich our communities with their experiences and culture as long as we accept and support them. I would not be where I am today had the people of Helena not done this for me, so let’s make sure we do the same for them. And who knows, maybe one day you will see one of them in office. It is important that we maintain the integrity of our State and don’t let it fall victim to the fear-mongering of others. Thank you so much for having my back and welcoming these refugees to Montana, Wilmot Collins Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins

Supporter: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJyNkMtuxCAMRb8m2SUCQ16LLKYznU_oFhEeDVNIokCazt8XotG06qqWxeLYXNtX9hVojHLTAwKMOiCIxKhLXJ7JK3S4qrv6Sk6oPWcUSeU_Zi3niVt5C-vmllLMLh_7llZIYNC6opJ2gktaIxhUS6giinCV234MYfEZOWVwjbnve_lXJ-I0ICPXLTjmlDSby8hFOW4sG3UGdeJ-3lahIneCTTzmgwvuFm7ep1h5nAJMr7MrwqiKpFvMmv0eyTz_VNyp1YinxjwFNYUokRqDYmK5r_5nRlBr2mjxkQkbIZuskWnH_U3f2i-q2wP6A9K6QnoAWaBqoAXVHBddRaHAuhlidBphnq-9XHZjrfF1Ex1-T8cepsZzrNH3PmteMoBti5IAh3_wH-HUDOf4hvuinj8fouXhaaLN5RuFSqIk) Notification Status: Signed Up
Donald J. Trump September 22nd, 2021
I spent virtually no time with Senators Mike Lee of Utah, or Lindsey Graham of South Carolina, talking about the 2020 Presidential Election Scam or, as it is viewed by many, the “Crime of the Century.” Lindsey and Mike should be ashamed of themselves for not putting up the fight necessary to win. Look at the facts that are coming out in Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, and other States. If this were Schumer and the Democrats, with the evidence we have of Election Fraud (especially newly revealed evidence), they would have never voted to approve Biden as President, and had they not, all of the mistakes that were made over the last month, which are destroying our Country, would not have happened. Mike Lee, Lindsey Graham, and all of the other Republicans who were unwilling to fight for the Presidency of the United States, which would have included at least an additional four Republican Senators, two in Georgia, one in Michigan, one in Arizona, are letting the Democrats get away with the greatest Election Hoax in history—a total con job!

We are losing our Country! The Democrats are vicious and fight like hell, and the Republicans do nothing about it. RINOs fight harder against Republicans than they do against Democrats. They want to be so politically correct, even if that means losing our Country, which is happening now. The evidence on determinative and wide-ranging Election Fraud is staggering. clean_body: The Indiana Democratic Party's mission is to work overtime and deliver for Hoosiers and their families - this mission is now more important than ever. With continued manipulation of the redistricting process by the Indiana Republican Party, Indiana Democrats are in a fight for our state's future. It is essential we join together to fight for a fair and transparent redistricting process for Indiana. The Indiana Democratic Party knows that fixing this manipulated and broken system is paramount for us to be able to put the power of voting back into Hoosiers' hands. Grassroots Support Urgently Needed to Meet our Goal of Raising $2,000 by the End of the Month = That's why Indiana Democrats are hitting the road as the Republicans operate behind closed doors in Indianapolis. The Republican-proposed maps are harmful to the future of the state. The INGOP is doing what they do best - sticking to extreme partisanship - and it's holding Indiana back from a brighter future. Redistricting may sound like a game that happens every 10 years, but it has real-life implications on Hoosiers every day. = = Thank you, we can't do this without supporters like you. name: ICYMI News
subject: A dangerous ideology
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that sup
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zctf792168gqgjl1hnbc58351ni78gd5e57c484g_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cpie2o72clh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z06vor5ueihlrqjlic6rgd15bae95ggrpodoioh8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cpie2o72clh2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp83ka0gdh326rcd4m2pm4fpimfg1g5k5tcahglg_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cpie2o72clh2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Gwen Rocco, Terry for VA
subject: a dumpster fire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
we missed our goal
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36277934/307638767/-2023814932?refcode=20210923.1_GR_9EQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDViNzE3Yy01ZjFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vRXNWW7HwYDgKPmD_PVPVAuBK6Z4mlUgb6-j6xHZFyE=)

| | Derek, I have some bad news. Yesterday, we didn’t raise enough money online to hit our 48-hour fundraising goal.

After news broke that Glenn Youngkin had written his campaign millions of dollars worth of checks, I was certain that our team would be fired up to fight back.

_Instead, this morning we’re looking at a dumpster fire of a September if we don’t get this thing turned around quickly._

I talked with the team this morning, and **we decided to extend this deadline one more day** — if we can pull it together and reach this goal tonight, we can get back on track to reach our $2 million goal.

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, SEPTEMBER 23, 2021
PHOTO RELEASE: DONALD TRUMP JR. CAMPAIGNS WITH BURT JONES
JACKSON - Yesterday, Burt Jones campaigned in Marietta with Donald J. Trump Jr. and shared his conservative message and vision with a packed house of grassroots supporters at the Strand Theatre. Yesterday's campaign stop in Cobb County comes on the heels of President Trump's [endorsement](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZSXejE8GbSNrlRgvsqvKwMpijkfXKGzSDQNz5scuYoUwTT90dhn6RB_Vcim1Ywj13K-owl4VBI2p8SMzTpMLL4wGhzb9ZUQ4GJxE2aOjOeInMHvWCgpyYDgd7FqrHku-FdgMTcVcir0Zsbikxga4juFittC3y1CtIER2GW6ea_WIkW0mzJaEKELQL0O5bU75RrqKg0hJTScuThEjAVkxSjLnDVCv0Rrlmv50QCw2JiWiLpsH4rhxee2BSgSUVAOA90qHb9hRcGcHROb0igCSug==&c=6Ijli7APpbviNxbsOyMyyHNarJYAQL-X8nJ2GU5KRfgAJ-bRwNaHVg==&ch=7Z8Xud-sA_VD85xYYkIN5ujeREzkIk3z9Dw3e_p4TazjRT99F9uzKA==) of Burt Jones for Lieutenant Governor--and ahead of his visit to Perry, Georgia, on Saturday. Burt is the only candidate in the race who will stand firm to advance the America First Agenda and fight for hardworking Georgians.
See photos from the event below:

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: The Big Lie
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]
Peter,
We all knew their Big Lie was nonsense. Trump and his cronies yelled and screamed conspiracy theories about the election being rigged. Turns out, his campaign staff had prepared a memo days beforehand that concluded their theories were false.
This was obvious, so obvious that it was beyond infuriating for us all to watch. But in doing so, these dangerous Republicans put our democracy in danger and we're still suffering the consequences. A generous group of donors knows what we're up against — that's why they've agreed to match EVERY donation throughout the month up to our $50,000 end-of-quarter goal at the end of September.
Will you help us fight for democracy by chipping in $25 now (which doubles to $50!). [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Let me be frank
body:
The Ohio Senate race will be the biggest race in 2022. That's not just my opinion. It's already being reported by the FEC and OpenSecrets. In terms of fundraising, this is already looking to be a record year.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PCRVQAYZSZaL0XwxVQWX3mPePWF22Li0b3vmn6kwYwSPyZCQJQnSMCOPtLMOJnnvfSwG-jYJbmd15PpFKfAfeQLCMny4Bnw5qknpxwuLesEZoSU6qLrhvZP8IOszKQPSEleZqrfX8zd2OEQ_XjoQMeMSt3LLCCWl98_LHickd4t0GltbOjX08A==&c=C7n3Su8EjndA24iLakemELP3vctP3kHKsfz_0YqrIpZT3RCwy6cH2g==&ch=HF4F_2_ssXYg3mqlQKoA8qP1hEf2HVsu9WdCAkhO4FYOICRVi8GMTQ==)
---
| Peter,
The Ohio Senate race will be the biggest race in 2022.
That's not just my opinion. It's already being reported by the FEC and OpenSecrets. In terms of fundraising, this is already looking to be a record year.
Biden and his allies are committed to spending MILLIONS to defeat us in Ohio.
The Senate is the only thing blocking Biden's radical agenda. [This month is the next big FEC deadline. I am looking to raise $32,000 online before September 30th. Can you send an urgent donation of $20.22, $50, $100, or more?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PCRVQAYZSZaL0XwxVQWX3mPePWF22Li0b3vmn6kwYwSPyZCQJQnSMF_2M5r6bQiagUUw6DCqLF4nrAhT2E_dwPmQMIcgHDFF8LJxurUSSXzdHJvTA7I1AMmKOHrivAUfWYYlnQg-rR1NZfIWnhE844hVIxljoOnBMGXgNIOtb0Ulop134quslQ==&c=C7n3Su8EjndA24iLakemELP3vctP3kHKsfz_0YqrIpZT3RCwy6cH2g==&ch=HF4F_2_ssXYg3mqlQKoA8qP1hEf2HVsu9WdCAkhO4FYOICRVi8GMTQ==)

* Biden and Schumer will be monitoring the FEC filings closely for weakness.
* Ohio will determine who controls the Senate.
* This is our only chance to keep Democrats in check by 2024.

I know campaigns ask you for a lot. But even chipping in $20.22 makes a big difference towards our victory in defending this important Senate seat. That's why I have to ask you for your immediate support.

Peter,

**I wanted to touch base with my top supporters and let them know that I will be seeking re-election for the U.S. Senate in 2022.**

**_Watch Announcement Video Below_**
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58392041:JrJxhu2TN:m:1:3253819041:936CA8D854B3F686F455D0CCFC7981CA:r)
Representing the people of Louisiana and the United States has been such an amazing privilege and one of the most important things I've done in my life, just below being a father and a husband to my wife and son.

**_[I'm asking for your support to keep the radical left out of your pockets and as far away from your jobs as possible. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58392041:JrJxhu2TN:m:1:3253819041:936CA8D854B3F686F455D0CCFC7981CA:r)_**

| [ENDORSE ME HERE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58392041:JrJxhu2TN:m:1:3253819041:936CA8D854B3F686F455D0CCFC7981CA:r)
---

I'm looking forward to getting back on the campaign trail and meeting with my constituents about the issues that matter most.**What you hear in town isn 't what you see or hear up in Washington D.C., that's for certain! **

I'm trying to bring common sense and idiot control to the U.S. Senate, but Chuck Schumer isn't making that job easy. **But with your help, we might be able to get through to a few of these Democrats.**

**Chip in whatever you can. I can promise you it 'll go towards helping me Take Back the Senate and defend conservatives across the country. **

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Making history is never easy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
0 African American women | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi5CmjcBWefeG876DYdJ3ElnhMQjsnSizE98RoI_8adL3trTcL3DTnHyeRE9blCVncM2navjK9dybVi4POAIkVjtsGUIn8JYIbIErezW_WyeJ0Z-kJXPgL1Jb0Wn9CMm-PIgqC7r42t-Rct4RrCMVQmVNc0IwV1XZOenR14meybzkKYefTbG-FqiTndn6fd6pgP3FjL9WMDIajNoTnBRjgvwB0imi6h1k33gWP2ullI60S0qe6UCz1YBitT0b7_iiwPE7hNW6BNnEA7duL-BLKYkWM_kCyUZIoF1XNZbXZgJve7el3rSa9KwlpcHwAlned/3fk/mlurQsoaR7e32iKkZxwnUw/h0/-53cr8ZeK99m8VKTiDiq_dIIbfmW1PTUj_cttYBqQKo)
Derek,

Right now, there are zero African American women in the Senate, but together, we can change that by flipping this Senate seat in North Carolina.

However, one of the biggest obstacles for African American women running for office is fundraising. That’s a big reason why there’s such a lack of representation in Congress.

In 2018, the Center for Responsive Politics’ analysis said, **“The average Black female candidate raised 46 percent less than the average white male candidate, but she also raised 55 percent less than the average white female candidate.”**

**[If you’re ready to help us change this statistic, split a $15 donation between our campaign and Common Good VA today. We can expand Democrats’ majority and bring new leadership to North Carolina, but it will require all of us to play a part.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi5CmjcBWefeG876DYdJ3ElptpoHT1f-mwK2dO4-ZpWas36X3cGbOChIZKMbJEQU-PDxBe3rC0IGyZrxzxSb7qyrzdJxvgPgSywqJ0hULY4wM5totfj2Ty-gdRUf-rZ41VLUeuVgnGvXZJiqM7cbOuXR4WRU47XGBaXbYbcnfOx-hMPUxscSmFj4JVnGXhIuNfyk4uvlTudgqk0PkQn_RukOQBn_y_4YuHxHMOvk6TuLXZw1MF0PCSR_ityXWNoLTwqTvcTLrRgaAw9Ipko8JmhkDTlUBy4C-lh64IH8TYn_fptpk0gSOTOEYnCjZZMohp/3fk/mlurQsoaR7e32iKkZxwnUw/h1/rm7ONdWj5vdCCLcTAJ5FWlp7Brm-9K8Mp_jaVqIQjuA)**

Too often the traditional gatekeepers and political establishment have doubted the ability of women -- and women of color in particular -- to win.

**But the truth is our campaign actually has the best chance to flip this seat. I’m the only candidate in this race who has won statewide twice before. I even received more votes in my 2020 race for Chief Justice of the NC Supreme Court than Thom Tillis, who won our state’s Senate race in 2020.**

So I know what it takes to run a successful campaign in North Carolina. But we have to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to compete and challenge any question of if an African American woman has what it takes to win.

**[Will you please consider splitting a $15 donation between our campaign and Common Good VA? Every dollar puts us one step closer to making history in North Carolina. Together, we can make sure Democrats hold the majority and make real progress for the people of this country.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi5CmjcBWefeG876DYdJ3ElptpoHT1f-mwK2dO4-ZpWas36X3cGbOChIZKMbJEQU-P1duuDPRaa3JPpCnz08KuNWOHk0VCP5q4bKd2U22T-Ha1pjYZX58TVWF0gmTj2EnhE25IW8NTeyVs_TzAR15c2kfIiiHnMzuEex53uhz84F1gW_6cJFJ7YMumqjRF7DUDu3_WoDTmgikqY_wbecyvy7yDx-RmOlHatORoP2UC4e5_XJYfoozIIOFO2nUx9_LblT5w8FhFOSQ10WsQg_-fTjD_hxsnr_zxINQtqEjn6HEU1dKsHT2fUPftpbpMJiuO/3fk/mlurQsoaR7e32iKkZxwnUw/h2/VFmw5TvbKJBDu8Zi5P9YMMpMy1qH35pBwMUTW_8j_B8)**

The obstacles we face in this campaign may be daunting at times, but together, we can overcome them and open the doors of opportunity for every North Carolinian.

\- Cheri Beasley
| [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mi5CmjcBWefeG876DYdJ3ElnhMQjsnSizE98RoI_8adL35aHyUodRU2fdpfBfZRiKd4r5kt0qAvGhgeY6MBS9RU66c0cZ-_zbNrecdPvVcF3D1C79VLSX11qAlADOSOwMkIZ8B27yVVoM_02q3bneuYhZJ_YT0O3jC4EPqUciJxLlD0p29KD48O9BBPlP5KJyaCO9luIdKqWAO1ELBzS_JvbV3LphapadlAKY_7DWcHHWp0TFvFCYzGHtzCuFVx8AmDNlNhqtxFyXOSOvJSlCT3MnMotUV_NJB2pQdSEyUQduZcM5FUvcDjeWc5m4vaoIK/3fk/mlurQsoaR7e32iKkZxwnUw/h3/LAr8Epc-_SyQ8EHa8JdZM5gQbxVj_Fag1rpi3UpWFkI)

name: Eli Bremer
subject: What Makes a Great Leader?
body:
Visit our website [https://eliforsenate.com/]

Friend,

What do you want to see most from a leader?

My conviction: Leaders should always be able to stand up for and protect the people they represent - It’s part of the reason I went to the US Air Force Academy and spent 14 years in active duty and reserves.

I take the duty to protect other people very seriously. I even worked with Congress to pass bipartisan legislation that would protect athletes who were survivors of sexual assault, and prevent it from happening in the future.

Actually, Michael Bennet failed to take action on that same legislation.

Bennet didn’t even support bi-partisan efforts to protect women and youth athletes!

I want to give Colorado the protection and leadership we deserve.

Together, we can take action and get things done. [https://secure.winred.com/eli-for-colorado/donate?utm_source=FR+Email&utm_medium=All+Lists&utm_campaign=What+Makes+a+Great+Leader%3F]

Make a statement today by donating to our campaign [https://secure.winred.com/eli-for-colorado/donate?utm_source=FR+Email&utm_medium=All+Lists&utm_campaign=What+Makes+a+Great+Leader%3F]

Eli Bremer

Derek, From a young age, my parents taught me about seeing work that needed to be done and just doing it. They taught me to always treat people with respect and to never think you're better than anyone else – no matter what you do or where you go. These are the lessons I brought with me when I served in Congress – where I had the privilege of working alongside Adam – and they will continue to guide me as the next United States Senator from Iowa. **I'm running for Senate to be a voice for working families. It’s critical we defend our democracy and Democratic majorities in Congress – and today, I’m asking for your support to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley, hold the Senate, and flip Iowa blue.** **Will you split a contribution of $10 or more between our campaigns? The fight for working families isn't some abstract concept for me. It's personal. Working families are my family: Mom is a retired Dubuque Community Schools employee, and Dad is a retired union pipefitter-welder. In fact, it was Dad's old sweatshirt – peppered with burn holes from sparks from his welding torch – that I carried with me when I first went to Congress, so I'd never forget why I ran and who I represent.
What we know now is that the vast majority of Iowans don't want Sen. Grassley representing them in Washington anymore – and neither do I. He’s become an ultimate Washington insider – and forgot about the community that sent him to Washington. He used to be a voice that we could disagree with but still respect, knowing he at least had Iowans’ interests in mind. **But he’s changed.**
In his seven terms, he has actively voted against and obstructed progress that would benefit working Iowans: He’s tried to dismantle the _Affordable Care Act_ , and he’s voted against most everything that would move communities in Iowa forward. He’s sided with Mitch McConnell time and again – even when it comes to undermining our democracy.
Holding the House and the Senate – by defeating a seven-term incumbent like Sen. Grassley – will be tough. But nobody will work harder than I will to win this race, and I’m honored to have Congressman Schiff fighting hard alongside me. **What we need now is grassroots resources from people like you, which is why we’ve set a goal to raise $15,000 before midnight tonight!**
**For the country we love and the democracy we cherish, will you split a contribution of $10 or more between our campaigns? We urgently need your support to defeat Sen. Grassley and protect Democratic majorities in both chambers of Congress.**

clean_body: He’s pulling ahead. | | | = | | Derek, Immediately after becoming the Republican nominee, Glenn Youngkin received Donald Trump’s endorsement to be Virginia’s next Governor. Now, things aren’t looking good for Virginia Democrats. Youngkin is using his vast wealth to self-fund his campaign (to the tune of $75 million) and he’s starting to pull away. A recent poll shows Terry actually losing to Glenn Youngkin. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = With Trump’s endorsement, millions in the bank, and Youngkin pulling away in the polls, the last thing Terry needs is for Glenn to outraise him AGAIN. What happens this week will determine what happens for the last month of the campaign. To make sure we have the resources we need to run a winning campaign, we absolutely must hit our September deadline. It’s a dose of reality that never leaves you. That’s why as Attorney General, I have always worked to keep Virginia families safe. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36294099/307691471/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWEwYWJlZS03ZTFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UgzuHe766rCDWmELVHa6-U7nVk8gNUjc9T1gjfN1wUw=)

| | Peter, We know that Jasmine is running her campaign against Republican Madison Cawthorn to bring compassion, hope, and real leadership to NC-11. But what we don’t know -- and want to hear from you -- is why you’re in this campaign with us. Whether it’s because you’re ready for a new kind of politics that’s rooted in unity instead of driving people apart, or you’re tired of seeing Cawthorn prioritize his political ambitions over his constituents’ needs -- we want to know why. [**Will you take a moment or two to let us know why you’re with us?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36294100/307691474/-1258536968?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWEwYWJlZS03ZTFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UgzuHe766rCDWmELVHa6-U7nVk8gNUjc9T1gjfN1wUw=&emci=4d49ce60-ef1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=29a0abee-7e1c-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=22032259) | | | [Take the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36294108/307691476/-1258536968?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWEwYWJlZS03ZTFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UgzuHe766rCDWmELVHa6-U7nVk8gNUjc9T1gjfN1wUw=&emci=4d49ce60-ef1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=29a0abee-7e1c-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=22032259)

Every action Cawthorn takes is geared to advance his extremist agenda and his own political ambitions. We must make Cawthorn a one-term representative -- and only Jasmine can make that happen.
While she’s doing everything she can to reach voters where they are and show her community that she’s the representative they deserve, [**it would help us if you could take a minute or two to share why you’re in this fight with us.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36294127/307691504/-1258536968?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWEwYWJlZS03ZTFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UgzuHe766rCDWmELVHa6-U7nVk8gNUjc9T1gjfN1wUw=&emci=4d49ce60-ef1a-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=29a0abee-7e1c-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=22032259)

name: Team Franchot
subject: Councilmember Andrew Friedson Stands with Peter Franchot!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter,
We’re excited to share with you our latest endorsement video featuring one of Montgomery County’s most innovative leaders: Councilmember Andrew Friedson! As District 1 Councilmember on the Montgomery County Council, Andrew has led the fight to help our struggling small businesses weather this pandemic, and has also helped secure millions of dollars in additional funding for affordable housing and critical transportation projects for Montgomery County’s families.
We are honored that Andrew has joined us in our efforts to secure a stronger and brighter future for Maryland’s communities in 2022. You can learn more about why he’s endorsing Peter Franchot by checking out our newly released video below:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrewfriedsonendorsement?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrewfriedsonendorsement?amount=20.22]Peter Franchot has a bold vision for the future of our state that includes creating 100,000 new family-supporting jobs in industries of the future, tackling the student debt crisis, building a statewide transit system, and leveling the playing field for Black Marylanders. He’s already received the endorsements of over 100 current and former elected officials -- far more than any other candidate in this race.
While the momentum is on our side, the truth is that we cannot win this competitive race through momentum alone. We need grassroots supporters like you to help us meet our monthly fundraising goals so that we can stay on track towards ramping up our statewide campaign for 2022. This election is shaping up to be one of the most expensive in our state’s history, and we need all-hands-on-deck to ensure that we are not outspent by Republican opponents.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrewfriedsonendorsement?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrewfriedsonendorsement?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrewfriedsonendorsement?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrewfriedsonendorsement?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrewfriedsonendorsement]Whether large or small, anything you can give is greatly appreciated. Fresh off the heels of this latest endorsement alert, we’re looking to get at least 100 grassroots donations from our supporters before 11:59 PM tonight.
By helping us meet our fundraising goals, you’ll help us print more field literature and yard signs, run more digital ads, place more phone calls, knock on more doors, and ultimately win the votes that we need to secure a better future for Maryland’s communities in 2022.
Thank you,
Team Franchot
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/andrewfriedsonendorsement?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

name: Farah Melendez
subject: Why I'm in this fight
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

I want to take a moment to tell you my story and why I’m proud to be fighting by Nikki’s side as her campaign manager.

Throughout my life, I’ve faced many of the same challenges Floridians grapple with every day. I believe in Nikki because I know she can break Florida’s corrupt, rigged system and build a state that works for all of us.

I’m the daughter of immigrants and a first-generation college graduate. As a child, I saw my own parents struggle to make ends meet--and as an adult, I’ve dealt with the burden of student debt.

I’m proud to be fighting for Nikki. She’s the only candidate in this race who has the vision and empathy to get Tallahassee working for people like us--not special interests or political insiders.

Today, I want to ask directly for your support. If you’re in a position to support Nikki’s campaign, it will go a long way towards building a stronger and fairer Florida for everyone. Please click here to chip in now if you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-farah-personal]

There’s just so much at stake in this election. The past two years have laid bare just how broken Florida’s system is. Throughout this crisis, Governor DeSantis has played politics instead of delivering for those in need.

Nikki understands what families are going through right now--and she knows how to lead with empathy and make sure Florida works for families like yours and mine.

Thanks for reading—I look forward to getting to know you all over the course of the next year.

Warmly,

Farah Melendez
Campaign Manager

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is quickly approaching, and if we don’t hit this goal, we could be leaving Democrats like Raphael Warnock vulnerable to the inevitable onslaught of Republican attacks. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = At this moment, Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, and their right-wing billionaire network are plotting to take back the Senate — and they are supporting far-right candidates like Herschel Walker who have already jumped into this race to try and take down Raphael. name: Team Malcolm
subject: we're tracking behind our goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
This campaign is powered by lots and lots of folks chipping in a few dollars at a time
#

Here's the deal, folks —
We have exactly one week before we are legally required to close the books on this quarter and publicly report our fundraising numbers.
Our public report must show that our big bold coalition to elect Malcolm has the momentum to win, but honestly, donations have slowed down, and we're tracking behind our goal of 15,000 donations.
**So, we’ve got two options:**
* Either more people need to pitch in before our deadline next week
* Or, we need folks to contribute just a little bit more than usual

[Most first-time contributors donate about $5. Will you please make a contribution of $10 to help us get back on track before our deadline? We cannot win this race if we miss this goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36297995/307705763/-353695395?refcode2=17164133-871c-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&refcode=em210923-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzE2NDEzMy04NzFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x4juCDLGuzaNTS5JHsJEbLY2W6PC_V_5V-nt2DYW9o4=)

Malcolm represents working Pennsylvanians. He grew up in the projects in North Philly and knows what it’s like to face an eviction notice because minimum wage work doesn’t pay the bills.
He’ll fight for working families in the Senate because he’s experienced the pain that Washington’s failures have inflicted on Pennsylvania firsthand.
But first, we have to win this race — and it’s going to take building the biggest coalition of working folks that Pennsylvania has ever seen to do it.
**So, are you in? This campaign is powered by lots and lots of folks chipping in a few dollars at a time, so we’re counting on grassroots donations from emails like this one to keep up our momentum.**
[If you're able, please make a $10 donation to put us back on track before our deadline on September 30.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36297997/307705766/-353695395?refcode2=17164133-871c-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&refcode=em210923-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzE2NDEzMy04NzFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x4juCDLGuzaNTS5JHsJEbLY2W6PC_V_5V-nt2DYW9o4=)
Thank you for supporting our campaign.
Team Malcolm

body:
CNN has named me one of the most vulnerable senators in the nation. | | |
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGpcQGA1DMWJr6nGyqsw4hT106_vdTPKpg7h0GKsiSvUIP6hiXDtwq1uKrw_hCwi0q_oLUhOw3DmEglTQg9X6LGv1X3BQYKvRc0YgTB9316-bbVZzQy8ZzrXSkBzzQ0vUkVdwy4fFBEPgYQleCfeZz_2ZJBnNuR3q_qwFj667oOhqRU8-Y1canLUf1lV0Dp1APLLNFeZ_8zlVGgpHQRStz_Pgwee8iglubcNYBOXjgZ05dS6T3nuePd0ZfxAIbQgfD4f_E0gSly_gG77g2-UpBWo/3fk/SmkEmo3eQnixHsdGR5ebpQ/h0/ICxxyJLgsk7L0ZeoPyr23YPRPYMM5vI1vHmtP5jet4A) Derek, I wish I was reaching out with good news, but CNN has named me one of the **most vulnerable senators in the nation.**

GOP outside groups have _already_ spent nearly $1 million to flip this seat – and _The Cook Political Report_ just _downgraded_ my chances of winning Nevada's critical Senate race.

Let me be very clear: Senate control hinges on what happens in Nevada – and I'm about to fall short of my urgent rapid-response goal.

That's why I'm turning to you, Derek: I won by just 2 points in 2016, and I cannot afford to miss this goal or lose any ground. Races in Nevada are always tough, so I'm counting on you.

I wouldn't ask you personally like this if it weren't important. I need to raise another $6,275 by midnight – and I can't miss this goal. **With Senate control on the line, every single dollar today could mean the difference between winning and losing tomorrow.**

clean_body: CNN has named me one of the most vulnerable senators in the nation. | | | Derek, I wish I was reaching out with good news, but CNN has named me one of the most vulnerable senators in the nation. GOP outside groups have already spent nearly $1 million to flip this seat – and The Cook Political Report just downgraded my chances of winning Nevada's critical Senate race. Let me be very clear: Senate control hinges on what happens in Nevada – and I'm about to fall short of my urgent rapid-response goal. That's why I'm turning to you, Derek: I won by just 2 points in 2016, and I cannot afford to miss this goal or lose any ground. Races in Nevada are always tough, so I'm counting on you. I wouldn't ask you personally like this if it weren't important. I need to raise another $6,275 by midnight – and I can't miss this goal. With Senate control on the line, every single dollar today could mean the difference between winning and losing tomorrow. I can't thank you enough for chipping in at critical moments like this. Together, I know we can defend this seat – and our Democratic Senate majority. ¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues! Catherine Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . name: Derek Marshall
subject: Here’s how we win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,

The California recall may have been a win for the Governor, but we’re celebrating too. Democrats registered and turned out in record numbers for the recall election. For our red-to-blue race, that’s important. **It means that our Democratic base is energized, and it’s a reminder of how successful well-organized registration campaigns can be. **

In our district, recent elections have shown that Democratic voters increase voter turnout in competitive elections. We’ve built a strong campaign to ensure I’m the Democratic candidate who will face off against Trump-backed Republican Jay Obernolte. **Now, we have to raise the resources we need to execute our winning strategy.[Your donation keeps us going strong and ensures we have the resources to pull this off. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36304042/307721308/1342495196?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGViY2ViMS04ZjFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PiWSl8yMLqjQ_d6wbAbCP7I3gR9pz9Hhu8SGnAyjLEw=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36304045/307721314/1342495196?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGViY2ViMS04ZjFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PiWSl8yMLqjQ_d6wbAbCP7I3gR9pz9Hhu8SGnAyjLEw=)
In a district as large as California’s 8th—one of the biggest congressional districts in the entire country—we will need volunteers and staff working from lots of different bases. In order to hire and maintain the field team we need, we have to start saving now. It’s estimated that about 100,000 people in California’s 8th district remain unregistered to vote. **We need to buy the technology that helps us to know who we need to reach and where**.

Our plan is to register at least 15,000 new Democratic voters and turn them out to the polls. Then we need to engage with existing Democrats who are disaffected and didn’t vote in the last election. **In other words, our job is to mobilize people who have been left behind by complacent Republican leadership. **

Because here’s the thing—this is a large and very diverse district. If we registered and mobilized Democratic voters, we would have the majority instead of the small but vocal faction of Trumpist Republicans. Our challenge is to make sure we reach all those people before next year’s election. We’re realistic, and we know we need time to build those connections. That’s why our fundraising efforts are so important right now. **[Can you donate any amount to fund our war chest so we can reach our base and flip this district blue next November? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36304046/307721315/1342495196?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGViY2ViMS04ZjFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PiWSl8yMLqjQ_d6wbAbCP7I3gR9pz9Hhu8SGnAyjLEw=)**

In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
* * *

I'm writing today to follow-up on my email from last week regarding President Biden's forced vaccination efforts.

I'm not seeing your name on the list of conservatives who have taken our four question vaccine mandate survey, so I'm reaching back out to you with another opportunity to respond today.

Thank you,
Jim Jordan

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Jim Jordan
Date: Fri, Sep 10, 2021 at 5:30 PM
Subject: NO. VACCINE. MANDATE.
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Fellow American,

Last month the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 18 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. name: Larry Klayman
subject: Breaking News: New charges filed
body:
We are now much less safe because of what President Biden did.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zcacb5kpqec8ctn9f2juf48vtk8atha21k24lg30_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c5i61oj6c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqcdtjmpqj4srk65qb6t9j6toj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onkcqpj2pjm6sr7fc3369p72tli6hqrepdi6hgm8s5kmqojfcth6drj8p1km8p71puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75cj66lib6p37mapmcdj0m9h3csh5u)
[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zdgckqu7ngnr1gl4jad088cm4adkdif4ihnktb30_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c5i61oj6c3h2bs)
[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z050cm59k7mgkfggbfn8uunic7rgllohakul9i70_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c5i61oj6c3h2bs) Friend,

I'm writing you today to update you on the latest developments concerning our Freedom Watch **" Citizen Grand Jury"** and the steps we are taking to hold President Joseph Biden to account for _the most recent crimes_ he has committed against the American people in just the last few weeks.

And this is urgent.

It's urgent because the Republican Party - _run by establishment elite "beautiful people" raising boatloads of money on the internet and on Fox News_ - not only seem incapable of removing Joe Biden from office, but they don't want to.

You know, I got to hand it to the socialists and communists who currently run Congress.

They have discipline. They vote as a block. And they are relentless.

Republicans on the other hand are all over the place. Rather than manning a brick wall of resistance against the systematic destruction of our way of life, all they do is raise money.

So, because we can't rely on Republicans to get the job done, we need to do it ourselves.
[**PLEASE DONATE**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zpaba9c4omuml11vhkeglp7th6u3irotc9qa9cio_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c5i61oj6c3h2bs)
These are the newest criminal counts we have filed with our **" Citizen Grand Jury"** against President Biden:
> **COUNT 1:** _President Joseph Biden destroyed the credibility of the United States and betrayed Americans Citizens by leaving them behind enemy lines following our humiliating retreat from Afghanistan._
>
> **COUNT 2:** _President Joseph Biden broke the word of the United States by abandoning our Afghan allies - people who helped us in Afghanistan in exchange for their safe passage to our country - to the mercies of the Taliban._
>
> **COUNT 3:** _President Joseph Biden is directly responsible for the deaths of 13 servicemen killed by a suicide bomber along with 13 more servicemen and women injured in the attack._
>
> **COUNT 4:** _President Joseph Biden left behind $85 billion worth of sophisticated military equipment in Afghanistan - equipment that Communist China, Russia, and others will reverse engineer so they can produce these weapons themselves and use them against the American military in future conflicts._
More counts are at issue, including counts for treason, and we are seeking the indictment of President Biden on these counts today.
[**PLEASE DONATE**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zmao7qj72a3nm3225u9efkhihq9aq9dm6deuf8s0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c5i61oj6c3h2bs)
Let me say that I am confident that our grand jury will return formal charges against the president in the next few days. And when we obtain this indictment in the next few days:
> ➢ We will try him fairly in a Citizen's Court.
>
> ➢ We will appoint a retired judge to preside over the trial.
>
> ➢ We will select a Jury of unbiased men and women to decide the case.
>
> ➢ We will notify President Biden at to the place and time of his trial, so he has an opportunity to appear and defend himself.
>
> ➢ We will try him in abstention if he fails to appear.
>
> ➢ We will then obtain a conviction it is hoped. And,
>
> ➢ We will then have him sentence appropriately - a sentence of life in prison for Joe Biden for crimes against our republic.
Should he be convicted on any of the charges against him, we will ask law enforcement, the military, and non-compromised law enforcement agencies to take him into custody so the sentence can be carried out.
If President Biden isn't taken into custody and made to serve his sentence, at least history will show that the American people seized the opportunity to have their voice heard.
Make no mistake.

We are now much less safe because of what President Biden did.

Our adversaries including Communist China, Russia, Iran, North Korea, and others are already cranking up their nuclear reactors again to produce more atomic weapons.

Now that we are weak... now that our patriotic military is being run by hapless dishonest hacks like the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs Staff Mark Milley, and Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin... our enemies are emboldened. And as everyone knows,
**Weakness Invites attack!**
But to carry out this important civic mission to hold President Biden accountable for his incompetence, negligence, wonton disregard for our nation's national security interests, and failure to honor the Oath of Office he took to assume the office of President, I will need your help.
[**PLEASE DONATE**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvfk5etn4gg3s695lbfvr8rs75f95remud3uqg1g_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c5i61oj6c3h2bs)
That is why I hope and ask that you [**support Freedom Watch with your contribution of $25, $30, $50, $100 or more**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zj9jqkb0v4r774iei5bcpg6bk8cjmvad6buck250_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c5i61oj6c3h2bs) today.

In Liberty,

Larry Klayman

Founder and Chairman
Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. If Freedom Watch fails to hold President Biden accountable for the many crimes he has committed against our republic, the American people, and our allies in the Afghan war, who will?

To support the work of our Freedom Watch **" Citizen Grand Jury"** and our efforts to hold President Joe Biden to account for _the most recent crimes_ he has committed against the American people, please dig deep to [**support Freedom Watch with your gift of $25, $30, $50, $100 or more**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zcevmojm496pmo5sh1mvfv4i7h2jgdctvi1vp7ag_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c5i61oj6c3h2bs) today.

And this is urgent. It's urgent because the Republican Party - run by establishment elite "beautiful people" raising boatloads of money on the internet and on Fox News - not only seem incapable of removing Joe Biden from office, but they don't want to. You know, I got to hand it to the socialists and communists who currently run Congress. They have discipline. They vote as a block. And they are relentless. Republicans on the other hand are all over the place. Rather than manning a brick wall of resistance against the systematic destruction of our way of life, all they do is raise money. So, because we can't rely on Republicans to get the job done, we need to do it ourselves. These are the newest criminal counts we have filed with our " Citizen Grand Jury" against President Biden: COUNT 1: President Joseph Biden destroyed the credibility of the United States and betrayed Americans Citizens by leaving them behind enemy lines following our humiliating retreat from Afghanistan. COUNT 2: President Joseph Biden broke the word of the United States by abandoning our Afghan allies - people who helped us in Afghanistan in exchange for their safe passage to our country - to the mercies of the Taliban. COUNT 3: President Joseph Biden is directly responsible for the deaths of 13 servicemen killed by a suicide bomber along with 13 more servicemen and women injured in the attack. COUNT 4: President Joseph Biden left behind $85 billion worth of sophisticated military equipment in Afghanistan - equipment that Communist China, Russia, and others will reverse engineer so they can produce these weapons themselves and use them against the American military in future conflicts. More counts are at issue, including counts for treason, and we are seeking the indictment of President Biden on these counts today. Let me say that I am confident that our grand jury will return formal charges against the president in the next few days. And when we obtain this indictment in the next few days: ➢ We will try him fairly in a Citizen's Court. ➢ We will appoint a retired judge to preside over the trial. ➢ We will select a Jury of unbiased men and women to decide the case. ➢ We will notify President Biden at to the place and time of his trial, so he has an opportunity to appear and defend himself. ➢ We will try him in abstention if he fails to appear. ➢ We will then obtain a conviction it is hoped. And, ➢ We will then have him sentence appropriately - a sentence of life in prison for Joe Biden for crimes against our republic. Should he be convicted on any of the charges against him, we will ask law enforcement, the military, and non-compromised law enforcement agencies to take him into custody so the sentence can be carried out. If President Biden isn't taken into custody and made to serve his sentence, at least history will show that the American people seized the opportunity to have their voice heard. Make no mistake. We are now much less safe because of what President Biden did. Our adversaries including Communist China, Russia, Iran, North Korea, and others are already cranking up their nuclear reactors again to produce more atomic weapons. Now that we are weak... now that our patriotic military is being run by hapless dishonest hacks like the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs Staff Mark Milley, and Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin... our enemies are emboldened. And as everyone knows, Weakness Invites attack! But to carry out this important civic mission to hold President Biden accountable for his incompetence, negligence, wonton disregard for our nation's national security interests, and failure to honor the Oath of Office he took to assume the office of President, I will need your help. That is why I hope and ask that you today. In Liberty, Larry Klayman Founder and Chairman Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. If Freedom Watch fails to hold President Biden accountable for the many crimes he has committed against our republic, the American people, and our allies in the Afghan war, who will? To support the work of our Freedom Watch " Citizen Grand Jury" and our efforts to hold President Joe Biden to account for the most recent crimes he has committed against the American people, please dig deep to today. Folks – I'd prefer not to send you emails asking for money. My focus continues to be fighting for families like yours. However, my finance team is telling me we're in a bit of a sticky spot. We have a significant gap in our fundraising, and we need to raise $10,000 by tonight. **That's bad under normal circumstances, but with our public reporting deadline exactly one week away, it is the absolute worst time for our numbers to lag.** Like I said, asking for money is one of my least favorite things to do, but Mitch McConnell and Republicans across the country are determined to take back the Senate, starting right here in New Hampshire. When my team reports our fundraising numbers at the end of the quarter, McConnell and Senate Republicans will be looking for any sign of weakness. That's why I need your help to get us out of this rut, friend. **[Will you please donate what you can right now to help close our fundraising gap and protect this seat -- and the Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36306256/307728921/-1669436104?refcode=e20210923_mwh-1wk-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjdlZGQ5MS05NjFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Ryla8P3JWEjVLBqPsxB_SglFfMJvXElYQXd7Y51QaI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36306257/307728922/-1669436104?refcode=e20210923_mwh-1wk-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjdlZGQ5MS05NjFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Ryla8P3JWEjVLBqPsxB_SglFfMJvXElYQXd7Y51QaI=)

Fellow Conservative,

One week until the end of the second quarter. **One week to raise another $5,000 before we have to file our fundraising numbers for the 3rd quarter**. I'm sitting in my basement making calls while trying to take care of my 3 month-old son and things are a bit hectic, so I'm keeping this super short.

Please take a second to read the email I sent out yesterday, in case you missed it the first time around. **[I'm in need of your help in order to hit my quarterly fundraising goal](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=8c75456a94504cc49dab440eb9babde9&_e=C2i94B6FDQimFAjokgM5i9Bh-gzqHnfmc8ic0pd3IuQpILqKfyWx4LlCjXYYBV8F4P3AzH7LFafyusKQcB9ZhBEC0OE6s4H53-A-a4qNFkzvvVHQ7SSj93-UFnGWuaNdDdL-2jJGl0FTmtVscI0jGFNn3O5JhSr78DlSqjnjtllzJCvjXAoOAkz6S556BzcVsoUjhEceIR6MTlnrlA1nWnt8p6FMrYK3PURwBlk100-JbH_6u6mpTlPPhogaEf6Z7y8_J9KiraOoVJyDWu8IKJU5GHKVDK539shKuoL9q0RyGYQ5h3zS7lxOCtlcehM6uO_3H7afRqDJK4ZJdMpaf0n5-QBLpMsAP2EF3ZkPPFDizEKjUYdw66Rbx9SjhOVJ665t2m1whE3o0mr6TIQiLl6EizyCXlPXPlfoRhjToGgIsnroO_UtX_XfrDTYYyQXd5gZ9T59YqTRrTgRUAgmYjh5Z_8NTklAxAMh2TYJJ2-49tUDv9O01KOHeMuOhLT9)**. John

Fellow Conservative

I wanted to quickly follow up with you re: the September goal setting email I sent you on September 14th. I’m taking a look at the results now and I’ll be honest,**I had to take a few minutes to compose myself after I realized it only brought in $134**.

I know that things are tight financially for a lot of people right now – but the fact of the matter is **they’ll soon be a lot worse if Republicans don't retake the House majority next year**.

I know that I’m repeating myself in these emails, but in order to master something (**in my case, online fundraising**) I am a firm believer that its necessary to repeat oneself until the goal is accomplished, so here I go:

In 2020, Republicans came within 8,000 votes of defeating my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, in the general election. In the grand scheme of things, 8,000 votes is next to nothing. **_Meaning the funds were raising now could determine whether we’re able to win this seat for the Republican Party next year._**

**[Raising $134 off an email is not only embarrassing, its demoralizing. John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: I've had it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far.
_Sponsored message_
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2p8a8t5k0spa724iheubc3d0hjij96o7i8ot4p8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c5h60o32chh2bs)
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg36vtr0s5cpg10q2ecd2is9fdc1jh4bk9olkoe0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c5h60o32chh2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z136uu3rq6hasgvac9umbmkhuk5ih633c05mvai0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c5h60o32chh2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Subpoenas are coming for Jan. 6 insurrectionists
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Ifiry1l8Xq0MStD%2BuYYqZoC8qJOIRtNq&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
There's been a major development from the House select committee investigating the Jan. 6 insurrection: Rep. Adam Schiff has said the committee is going "straight to subpoenas" to compel witness testimony - meaning those close to or in communication with former President Donald Trump could be forced to testify.
This comes on the heels of bombshell revelations that one of Trump's closest advisors, Steve Bannon, played a critical role in Jan. 6 and told Trump it was "the moment for reckoning" for overturning the election - adding: "we're going to bury Biden on Jan. 6."
Frankly, Friend, information like this makes me sick to my stomach - and it's all the more reason why Congress must uncover the full truth behind Jan. 6 and hold any and all perpetrators accountable, no matter what levers of power they hold. **Because if we don 't, we risk Donald Trump and his allies once again controlling the levers of our Democratic institutions. We cannot let that happen.**
So I am once again asking you: Please - _please_ - continue to speak out. In light of continuously increasing revelations about Donald Trump's dangerous and unstable behavior, I need 950 members of this team to help me hold Trump and his associates accountable. Make your voice heard right now:
**[Click here to add your name to demand Donald Trump and his family and associates are held accountable for the Jan. 6 insurrection.](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trump-crimes?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1075-su-nd)**
Thank you,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Humbly asking if you’ll make your first online donation to our campaign before our FEC deadline ends one week from today.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Everyone is going to be looking at our report: the press and our opponents. And a bad number could invite even more outside spending against us.
#

Friends —
In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to make your first online contribution to my campaign. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here’s the truth:
One week from today, we close the books on a critical, official FEC fundraising deadline. And when it ends, we’re legally required to report what we’ve raised.
So, if you’ve been waiting for the right time to chip-in, I’m here to tell you today is that day.
Because everyone is going to be looking at our report: the press and our opponents. And a lower number could invite even more outside spending against us.
My first focus is always being the senator Arizona deserves. But to keep doing that for another six years, I need your help today. Especially before this deadline. So I’m asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to my campaign before this critical FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close and we’re legally required to report our numbers?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-sept21?refcode=em210923-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1377_6688874_CZWSXI&akid=1377%2E6688874%2ECZWSXI)

name: Dr. Jason Martin
subject: A voice for ALL Tennesseans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
Almost exactly one month ago, we launched this campaign to bring new leadership to Tennessee. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36309122/307738552/-1314262958?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210923eoq1_JM_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc0NmM3Mi05YzFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vQxZwEqe437ncPdf_ADBOrH61qJxYSTs5ial-m2vCWU=)
---
Hey Peter. Almost exactly one month ago, we launched this campaign to bring new leadership to Tennessee. At every step of the way since then, I’ve been humbled by the response from Tennesseans like you — whether you’ve come to one of the stops on our 95 County Tour, or responded to our survey to tell us what matters most to you in Tennessee’s next governor, or gave your hard-earned dollars to fuel this campaign, I’m so proud to have your support. I’ve said it a hundred times already, but it never gets old: This is _**our**_ campaign. It’s a collective movement of people all across our great state to reclaim what is ours and bring dignity, compassion, and honesty back to the governorship. [**Our first big fundraising deadline is coming up at the end of this month — exactly a week from now — and we’ve got to make sure we show how strong this grassroots movement is by gathering as many small-dollar donations as possible. Can you pitch in $10 or $20 to fuel this grassroots campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36309123/307738553/-1314262958?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210923eoq1_JM_all_xx_l1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc0NmM3Mi05YzFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vQxZwEqe437ncPdf_ADBOrH61qJxYSTs5ial-m2vCWU=) | [Donate $10 ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36309124/307738554/-1314262958?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210923eoq1_JM_all_xx_btn&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc0NmM3Mi05YzFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vQxZwEqe437ncPdf_ADBOrH61qJxYSTs5ial-m2vCWU=)
---
For far too long, our elected leaders — especially Gov. Bill Lee — have pushed aside the needs of real Tennesseeans. Families like yours and mine have been completely abandoned in favor of lies, culture wars, and conspiracy theories.
**If we’re going to make Tennessee a place where everyone thrives — no matter where you’re from, what you look like, or how you’re raised — we’ve got to bring power back to the people. That’s what this campaign is all about.**
[_**Will you join me on this mission to be a voice for ALL Tenneeseeans by making a contribution now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36309125/307738555/-1314262958?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210923eoq1_JM_all_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc0NmM3Mi05YzFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vQxZwEqe437ncPdf_ADBOrH61qJxYSTs5ial-m2vCWU=)

clean_body: Almost exactly one month ago, we launched this campaign to bring new leadership to Tennessee. | = Hey Peter. Almost exactly one month ago, we launched this campaign to bring new leadership to Tennessee. At every step of the way since then, I’ve been humbled by the response from Tennesseans like you — whether you’ve come to one of the stops on our 95 County Tour, or responded to our survey to tell us what matters most to you in Tennessee’s next governor, or gave your hard-earned dollars to fuel this campaign, I’m so proud to have your support. I’ve said it a hundred times already, but it never gets old: This is our campaign. It’s a collective movement of people all across our great state to reclaim what is ours and bring dignity, compassion, and honesty back to the governorship. = | = For far too long, our elected leaders — especially Gov. Bill Lee — have pushed aside the needs of real Tennesseeans. Families like yours and mine have been completely abandoned in favor of lies, culture wars, and conspiracy theories. If we’re going to make Tennessee a place where everyone thrives — no matter where you’re from, what you look like, or how you’re raised — we’ve got to bring power back to the people. That’s what this campaign is all about. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for your support, Dr. Jason Martin | Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee 1831 12th Avenue S #175 Nashville, TN 37203 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .
