name: Erica Smith
subject: When you met Erica
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
With our movement growing so rapidly, I thought it was about time to reintroduce myself.
#
Hi, I’m Erica Smith.
Whether you’ve been a supporter from the very start or you’re new to our movement, I want you to know that I appreciate you **from the bottom of my heart**. ❤️
This campaign is about ALL of us, and there’s NOTHING I love more than meeting good folks just like you out on the road.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/15534?t=1&akid=476%2E3698%2E2HZzH3)_The last stop on our 100 County, 100 Day statewide tour_
[_**I**_ _**n a moment I’m going to humbly ask you to donate to our campaign so I can continue to get out there and meet folks where they are.**_](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/15534?t=2&akid=476%2E3698%2E2HZzH3) First, let me tell you why it’s critical to me that our people-powered movement leaves no community behind.
To do that, we have to go back to my childhood. It wasn’t an easy one, but it was what made me who I am today.
My father was in the Air Force and I was born at the Fort Bragg Army base right here in North Carolina.
I grew up working on my family farm with my five siblings where we picked cucumbers and corn on the very same land where my ancestors were enslaved not that long ago. Growing up, my great-grandfather Pop Buster, the child of slaves himself, would tell us stories about his childhood as a sharecropper and the Jim Crow south.
**I’m the descendant of slaves** , and I carry the weight of that history with me everyday.
I’ve had my own personal struggles with our broken healthcare system when my son needed breathing equipment that insurance refused to cover. I’ve had to take on a part-time job just to keep the family from going bankrupt. I’ve had to drop out of classes because my rural broadband couldn’t support them. I’ve been paid less than my colleagues because of my gender and the color of my skin. I’ve been harassed in the workplace.
**All this to say, I know those feelings of hopelessness, and I know how hard it can be to have faith that it gets better. That’s why I believe in our grassroots movement — it’s exactly what we need right now in America.**
It’s time to reimagine who this country works for. I’m running to create opportunities for working families like mine across North Carolina. But I can’t do it alone. [_**Will you chip in $5 to help us grow our movement and win this race for U.S. Senate?**_](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/15534?t=3&akid=476%2E3698%2E2HZzH3)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/15540?refcode=em20210923-476&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=476%2E3698%2E2HZzH3)**
Thank you for joining our moral movement. I can’t wait for you to see what we can accomplish together.
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210923-476-footer&t=23&refcode2=476_3698_2HZzH3&akid=476%2E3698%2E2HZzH3)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=476%2E3698%2E2HZzH3)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=476%2E3698%2E2HZzH3)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

body:
The fight to hold the House and elect educators is happening in California: Today, Elect Educators Everywhere is proud to endorse history teacher and nonprofit director Brandon Mosely for California’s 42nd Congressional District. | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36310131/307741816/-898086359?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210923mosely_EEE_180DO_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NjNjYTE5LWEwMWMtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_jkKtOZQoGfiPmLQjL0RokFAfdYTZXeDQbvJ_dVk8aE=)

Educators and allies, The fight to hold the House and elect educators is happening in California: **Today, Elect Educators Everywhere is proud to endorse history teacher and nonprofit director Brandon Mosely for California’s 42nd Congressional District.[_Split a donation now between Brandon’s campaign and EEE!_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36310132/307741817/-898086359?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210923mosely_EEE_180DO_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NjNjYTE5LWEwMWMtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_jkKtOZQoGfiPmLQjL0RokFAfdYTZXeDQbvJ_dVk8aE=)** **** | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36310133/307741818/-898086359?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210923mosely_EEE_180DO_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NjNjYTE5LWEwMWMtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_jkKtOZQoGfiPmLQjL0RokFAfdYTZXeDQbvJ_dVk8aE=)
---
Brandon’s own experience as a student taught him that representation matters — in our classrooms, our communities, and our government.
The son of a pastor and school-bus driver, Brandon was inspired by his parents and also by his fifth grade teacher, Mrs. Faulkner. Brandon saw the incredible impact that people of color can have on students and on a community. She gave him a sense of purpose, and encouraged Brandon to pursue higher education. About 10 years later, he became the first in his family to graduate college.
**Stories like Brandon’s are _exactly_ why the work our organization does is so important**. Mrs. Faulkner gave Brandon just what he needed at just the right time, starting him on a path to change other people’s lives for the better. These days, Brandon is doing the same for today’s students, teaching history in his classroom and as the director of a local nonprofit.
**Now, Elect Educators Everywhere is joining Brandon’s fight to win California’s 42nd District, so that he can represent students and teachers in Congress, and be a voice for them.[_Will you split a donation now between Brandon’s campaign and EEE?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36310134/307741819/-898086359?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210923mosely_EEE_180DO_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NjNjYTE5LWEwMWMtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_jkKtOZQoGfiPmLQjL0RokFAfdYTZXeDQbvJ_dVk8aE=)**
Brandon believes — and we do too! — that no matter what your zip code is, a quality public education should be accessible for all. In Congress, he'll fight to eliminate student loan debt, expand access to early childhood education, and give all students the tools they need to succeed in the 21st century economy.
**We’re so excited to start this journey with Brandon, but we need you on board.[_Will you give whatever you’re able to help bring Brandon’s voice to Congress?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36310135/307741820/-898086359?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210923mosely_EEE_180DO_xx_l3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4NjNjYTE5LWEwMWMtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_jkKtOZQoGfiPmLQjL0RokFAfdYTZXeDQbvJ_dVk8aE=)**

clean_body: The fight to hold the House and elect educators is happening in California: Today, Elect Educators Everywhere is proud to endorse history teacher and nonprofit director Brandon Mosely for California’s 42nd Congressional District. | = Educators and allies, The fight to hold the House and elect educators is happening in California: Today, Elect Educators Everywhere is proud to endorse history teacher and nonprofit director Brandon Mosely for California’s 42nd Congressional District.= ** | = Brandon’s own experience as a student taught him that representation matters — in our classrooms, our communities, and our government. The son of a pastor and school-bus driver, Brandon was inspired by his parents and also by his fifth grade teacher, Mrs. Faulkner. Brandon saw the incredible impact that people of color can have on students and on a community. She gave him a sense of purpose, and encouraged Brandon to pursue higher education. About 10 years later, he became the first in his family to graduate college. Stories like Brandon’s are exactly why the work our organization does is so important. Mrs. Faulkner gave Brandon just what he needed at just the right time, starting him on a path to change other people’s lives for the better. These days, Brandon is doing the same for today’s students, teaching history in his classroom and as the director of a local nonprofit. Now, Elect Educators Everywhere is joining Brandon’s fight to win California’s 42nd District, so that he can represent students and teachers in Congress, and be a voice for them.= Brandon believes — and we do too! — that no matter what your zip code is, a quality public education should be accessible for all. In Congress, he'll fight to eliminate student loan debt, expand access to early childhood education, and give all students the tools they need to succeed in the 21st century economy. We’re so excited to start this journey with Brandon, but we need you on board.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support, Elect Educators Everywhere | Elect Educators Everywhere is designed to help elect teachers, school counselors, college faculty, and all types of public educators to office from coast to coast. How has the climate crisis affected you?

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/_a-dsDYjGbQZ/Q2wxanV3T1JaTXhHWUYyZXU2TnVaNWFmZ3E3T1hGQUM4eEk1eis5ZU9uazJ3MzdwaVZMQjB3R2V0QU1ZY1hKVTJUOXNKVjgyQTB6ZmhyOXp1bG1BQm5xM1puR21PekZqdjl2V09GaFpMZGc9S0/VGc0SEQ1MzdjRGV6aDNKekx5aHRoZ3ZMbUpVa0UvMFdGd2xKU3V2QkdiUT0S1) Friend, The deadly consequences of the climate crisis are now in all of our backyards. From a historically hot summer across the West to deadly flooding from Louisiana to New York, every American has been forced to look these disasters in the face and ask ourselves: How is this global crisis affecting us at home? [**_I want to make sure you have the chance to make your voice heard in my official climate action survey. Will you take a moment to share your thoughts?_**](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/p2ejHYyL~jCY/Q2wxanV3T1JaTXhHWUYyZXU2TnVaNWFmZ3E3T1hGQUM4eEk1eis5ZU9uazJ3MzdwaVZMQjB3R2V0QU1ZY1hKVTJUOXNKVjgyQTB6ZmhyOXp1bG1BQm5xM1puR21PekZqdjl2V09GaFpMZGc9S0/VGc0SEQ1MzdjRGV6aDNKekx5aHRoZ3ZMbUpVa0UvMFdGd2xKU3V2QkdiUT0S1) [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/p2ejHYyL~jCY/Q2wxanV3T1JaTXhHWUYyZXU2TnVaNWFmZ3E3T1hGQUM4eEk1eis5ZU9uazJ3MzdwaVZMQjB3R2V0QU1ZY1hKVTJUOXNKVjgyQTB6ZmhyOXp1bG1BQm5xM1puR21PekZqdjl2V09GaFpMZGc9S0/VGc0SEQ1MzdjRGV6aDNKekx5aHRoZ3ZMbUpVa0UvMFdGd2xKU3V2QkdiUT0S1) As the consequences of the climate crisis hit home, let's not close our eyes or turn away -- but raise our voices together. **Will you add your voice to the chorus of Americans sharing their stories and demanding bold climate action?** [**_I hope you 'll take just a moment to respond to my campaign's official climate survey._**](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/p2ejHYyL~jCY/Q2wxanV3T1JaTXhHWUYyZXU2TnVaNWFmZ3E3T1hGQUM4eEk1eis5ZU9uazJ3MzdwaVZMQjB3R2V0QU1ZY1hKVTJUOXNKVjgyQTB6ZmhyOXp1bG1BQm5xM1puR21PekZqdjl2V09GaFpMZGc9S0/VGc0SEQ1MzdjRGV6aDNKekx5aHRoZ3ZMbUpVa0UvMFdGd2xKU3V2QkdiUT0S1) Very truly yours, Jay | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/V4dzSdA96Yc2/Q2wxanV3T1JaTXhHWUYyZXU2TnVaNWFmZ3E3T1hGQUM4eEk1eis5ZU9uazJ3MzdwaVZMQjB3R2V0QU1ZY1hKVTJUOXNKVjgyQTB6ZmhyOXp1bG1BQm5xM1puR21PekZqdjl2V09GaFpMZGc9S0/VGc0SEQ1MzdjRGV6aDNKekx5aHRoZ3ZMbUpVa0UvMFdGd2xKU3V2QkdiUT0S1)

From a historically hot summer across the West to deadly flooding from Louisiana to New York, every American has been forced to look these disasters in the face and ask ourselves: How is this global crisis affecting us at home? As the consequences of the climate crisis hit home, let's not close our eyes or turn away -- but raise our voices together. Will you add your voice to the chorus of Americans sharing their stories and demanding bold climate action? Very truly yours, Jay |

subject: Classist Joe Manchin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice Democrats
body:
#
**Joe Manchin already said he won 't vote for Bernie's $3.5 trillion reconciliation bill, but now he is pushing back on providing American families direct relief. [Will you chip in so we can organize and elect Democrats who won't turn their backs on the people?](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=b8d446fbaf&e=5a4b10d0ec)**
**[Retire Corporate Democrats](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=572519fe12&e=5a4b10d0ec)**
Peter,
The future of Bernie's $3.5 trillion reconciliation bill is in jeopardy because of Joe Manchin and other corporate Democrats who are using critical investments in climate, education, immigration, and Medicare expansion, as bargaining chips.
Let's be clear: $3.5 trillion was already a hard-fought compromise, and we can't afford to take away policies that would directly benefit working families. We are talking about investments in issues that affect Americans day-to-day: healthcare, education, housing, home care, climate, and so much more. But our progressive priorities are being held hostage by Senator Manchin, who has made clear that he is representing corporate interests in Washington -- not West Virginians.
Just last week, Manchin made an ugly, classist comment saying there should be work or educational requirements in order to alleviate child poverty. Unbelievable.
[](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=cd876ba633&e=5a4b10d0ec)
**[If you believe that Joe Manchin can't stand in the way of our progressive agenda -- will you stand with us and make a contribution right now?](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=d8116711d2&e=5a4b10d0ec)**
**[Contribute](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=eaed50241f&e=5a4b10d0ec)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats
[Donate »](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=82492f5f01&e=5a4b10d0ec)
---
Paid for by Justice Democrats
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=23f6e0d673&e=5a4b10d0ec&c=d711efe288). Mail us: 10629 Hardin Valley Rd #226, Knoxville, TN 37932.

Instead of digging for answers, they buried their heads in the sand along with just about every Democrat in Washington. Friend, Mike will never back down in his fight to find the truth, and we hope you won’t either. Thank you, Team Gallagher | | | | Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin | | P.O. BOX 1027 - GREEN BAY, WI 54305 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

Reproductive rights are on the line. Sign on now.
#
Peter,
Not only did the Supreme Court refuse to block the dangerous and cruel abortion ban in Texas from going into effect, but they’ve agreed to hear another case, this time in Mississippi, that could undermine nearly 50 years of precedent and potentially overturn Roe v. Wade.
**[Will you help us fight back against this unconstitutional law that threatens individuals’ right to make their own decisions when it comes to pregnancy and parenting by signing on to protect reproductive rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36311419/307746647/-532472465?ms=pm_em_210923_1&refcode=pm_em_210923_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mzk5MDM0NC1hMjFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B2ozNL8g7KWv9VQW9tKOm-XmE_ojwCKsOrGyAXVXz_M=&emci=e1997616-811c-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=63990344-a21c-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=13116610)**

body:
America wants Donald Trump to be our President in 2024. Let’s make sure that happens. | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e608494a483449f0a5be03d314a80721&_e=1YzIgQ_O_v-xb-idB35PO-IYMdMSUgK3PJ20Vjr4NgwaywntkYaNBc7ZM8_Cy3XrxDCmDp91LVc8sFAQNK4Dw4yZWI0phsa8DiGLEBIkJf5iG456XADfuB1T4IB8-n9Zg6uCvFP5wrmKzSTqgkMyQJRBVqVVrWpNM-RbOHuQNIyTzgkoWQGE8D4XpzW5q-nPxvugZxHPlrRJOxuNuM0IF1viJI7k8e5Bjb2M1M5TF65VB-2PSIQ2Sqbe__iU6g-4R_Pgs61hRG0AJCUixiwBGBQlwWta_Y-oxeDHeYrtiVaV45JaNJ_7o5aoZyMIm7Mu9TMXK8PBNbgj-WrEgiZ1Fr0_g4O3yyUpXSdufUDSBSKUYFWhkTFoHeSwB2lsny9yFMe9wUssqKN11gQlDKe11jHhFo9T9Vf17dV-PKIYlkaqp_0DB0U_0mgom1Qfz0DQ)

---
Peter,

Failed economic policies, skyrocketing crime rates, out-of-control inflation, and a federal government that allows thousands of illegal immigrants with COVID-19 to pour across our borders _**every single DAY.**_

**THAT IS JOE BIDEN’S AMERICA.**
Last year we saw short-sighted people who voted for Biden just because he wasn’t “mean” or brutally honest like Trump, and they got a career politician who blames others. They are regretting their choice, and **they want Trump back as President in 2024.**

**I’ve been called "America's Toughest Sheriff" and that’s why I’m leading the** _**We Want Trump PAC**_ **because we can’t allow crime, corruption, and lazy politicians to ruin our nation.**

I’m a Korean War veteran. I spent my entire life in law enforcement from being a director of DEA at home and abroad to being Sheriff of Maricopa County, Arizona. When it comes to the safety and security of my fellow Americans, I don’t play games - and neither does Donald Trump. name: Travis Brimm, CheriBeasley.com
subject: Democrats need an experienced and tested candidate in North Carolina.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
I wanted to take a second to reach out myself to talk about why I joined Cheri’s campaign.
#

Hey team -
I’m Travis, Cheri Beasley’s campaign manager. I wanted to take a second to reach out myself to talk about why I joined Cheri’s campaign. I’m pumped to be on this team with you because I know that, together, we have what it takes to turn North Carolina blue.
I’ve been part of tough races in North Carolina before. I call this my adopted home state. So I’ll be honest with you: this is going to be tough. But I joined this team because I believe that Cheri is Democrats’ best hope to flip this seat.
It takes an experienced and tested candidate to win statewide in North Carolina, and no one is better prepared than Cheri. Her career is a testament to blazing trails, defying odds and securing justice.
When she ran for office the first time, her opponent said that Cheri couldn’t win because she was a mom. She won by 30 points. She went on to become the first African American woman to ever win statewide without first being appointed.
And in this race, she’s the only Democrat who has ever won statewide — and the only candidate to do it twice. (Thank you, Pat McCrory.)
Now, I wouldn’t be a good campaign manager if I didn’t take this opportunity to make an ask:
[**With the FEC deadline days away, we’re laser-focused on closing out this quarter as strongly as possible. If you can, will you consider pitching in $5, $25 or whatever makes sense for you to help us elect Cheri?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36312934/307751261/1741212721?refcode2=89d3e1b6-a71c-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&refcode=em210923-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWQzZTFiNi1hNzFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d4WnwvxEa0Qbckr5lfB3TSU0UJAdJH0xpJlArqIa8ck=)
Winning this race is possible. The Cook Political Report calls it one of three toss-ups, and CNN has said it is one of the most likely Senate seats to flip. CNN’s analysis specifically said that a diverse candidate like Cheri was a major reason why this race was on the board for Democrats.
So we need to put our all into electing Cheri Beasley and expanding Democrats’ majority. A win here can change what’s possible in the Senate — securing meaningful change and progress for working people across North Carolina and the country.
That’s what’s at stake here, but Cheri needs all of us working together to win. So if you can, please use this link and pitch in today:
[**CheriBeasley.com/September-FEC-deadline**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36312935/307751263/1741212721?refcode2=89d3e1b6-a71c-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&refcode=em210923-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWQzZTFiNi1hNzFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d4WnwvxEa0Qbckr5lfB3TSU0UJAdJH0xpJlArqIa8ck=)
Thank you and be in touch soon.

Campaign Manager

subject: We need to keep this doctor in the House

body:
Right now, our country is facing multiple health care battles, from the COVID-19 pandemic to attacks on our reproductive health care rights. As we confront these issues, Kim has shown why it's never been more important that we have a Democratic, pro-choice woman doctor in the House. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36313322/307754433/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDg2ZTFkNS1hODFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S_rhU4RUmBHIUslW2FAMVrMuVZtJbFF1DB1ZjcuxfPs=&emci=689f8f07-771c-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=3d86e1d5-a81c-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Right now, our country is facing multiple health care battles, from the COVID-19 pandemic to attacks on our reproductive health care rights. As we confront these issues, **Kim has shown why it's never been more important that we have a Democratic, pro-choice woman doctor in the House.**

As the only pediatrician ever elected to Congress, Kim has led efforts to expand rapid testing and increase vaccination rates to keep our kids and communities safe from COVID-19. And as the only pro-choice woman doctor in Congress, there is no one better prepared to defend reproductive rights and protect _Roe v. Wade_ from Republican attacks.

Kim will always take a stand to keep us healthy and ensure we have access to the care we need, but with Republicans already making her a top target, she needs your support to keep fighting.

**[In just one week, we're facing our critical FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. body:

I'm writing today to follow-up on my email from last week regarding President Biden's forced vaccination efforts.

I'm not seeing your name on the list of conservatives who have taken our four question vaccine mandate survey, so I'm reaching back out to you with another opportunity to respond today.

Thank you,
Jim Jordan

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Jim Jordan
Date: Fri, Sep 10, 2021 at 5:30 PM
Subject: NO. VACCINE. MANDATE.
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Fellow American,

Last month the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 18 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION! Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role. We’ve lived through 18 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin. name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Busy week in D.C.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Dear Peter,

I hope this note finds you and your family safe and well and that you are enjoying the first few days of fall!

This week, I'm back in Washington, D.C., where there is a ton going on. From the Build Back Better Agenda to the effort to fund the government and support for Afghan refugees, we've got our work cut out for us.

We'll be taking action on the Bipartisan Infrastructure Deal and the Build Back Better Act in the House soon. I couldn't be prouder to support these efforts.

In the weeks ahead, Congress will hopefully make major investments to modernize our roads and bridges, reduce carbon pollution, and create good-paying jobs. It will deliver high-speed broadband access and clean drinking water to every American and make critical investments in climate resiliency. It will help families deal with the costs of health care, child care, and college.

I've been working hard to get these efforts over the finish line, and I'm excited to see them sent to the president's desk soon. These bills will have a positive impact on you, your family, and all of our communities once they are signed into law.

**[Before I head out to my next meeting, I have a favor to ask: we're facing a critical FEC end-of-quarter deadline next week. Can I count on you to rush a donation now to help us reach our goal?](https://act.myngp.com/el/AzcP01244Sc2Mx8hHxtM6NqsAuhKYLESvc9Fk15JfSw=/w7OGve1UA-CjYFRd32BPIN28LhF2YXL7-YXzPZxpjPI=?refcode=em21_210923_EOQ1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210923_EOQ1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

Thank you ahead of time for your support, and, as always, it's an honor to represent you,

Derek

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/AzcP01244Sc2Mx8hHxtM6NqsAuhKYLESvc9Fk15JfSw=/w7OGve1UA-CjYFRd32BPIN28LhF2YXL7-YXzPZxpjPI=?refcode=em21_210923_EOQ1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210923_EOQ1_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Do you know about Do-Nothing Dan?
body:
Are you sick of members of Congress who win their election then do ABSOLUTELY NOTHING?
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/EtWSgpDGSqJNlqQnZx6cUw/DO6LwyF3bESKkqG2g9qVaA)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/EtWSgpDGSqJNlqQnZx6cUw/DO6LwyF3bESKkqG2g9qVaA) Are you sick of members of Congress who win their election then do ABSOLUTELY NOTHING?

I'm not sick about it . . . **I 'm furious!**

It's why I'm running against six-term Congressman Daniel Webster in Florida's 11th District . . . and [**I need your help to beat him in my primary**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/EtWSgpDGSqJNlqQnZx6cUw/DO6LwyF3bESKkqG2g9qVaA).

**I only have seven days left until the end of the fundraising quarter and all of those leftist 's eyes will be pouring over my report, hoping I fail!**

[**Chip in today with $10, $20 or whatever you can contribute.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/EtWSgpDGSqJNlqQnZx6cUw/DO6LwyF3bESKkqG2g9qVaA)

We can't let another Do-Nothing member of Congress win re-election - **especially a Do-Nothing Republican when so much is on the line!**

My opponent missed 29% of the votes in Congress at the start of 2020. In 2018, he missed 27% of votes in the last quarter.

And so far this year, Do-Nothing Dan has missed 21% of his votes - **including refusing to vote as Democrats impeached President Trump for the second time!**

That's unforgivable.

[**Help me replace Do-Nothing Dan today.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/EtWSgpDGSqJNlqQnZx6cUw/DO6LwyF3bESKkqG2g9qVaA)

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

body:
Do you CONDEMN Trump and his Republicans for lying to the American people about the 2020 election? | | | **_NEW YORK TIMES BREAKING:_ Trump campaign knew all along their election claims were baseless **

---
| **YOUR SIGNATURE REQUESTED:**

The _New York Times_ just revealed that the Trump campaign KNEW their claims about election fraud were baseless.

It's clear as day: Republicans are unfit to hold power at this make-or-break moment for our democracy.

But if we want to defeat them and defend our Democratic House Majority, we need Democrats everywhere to stand with us against these outrageous Republican lies.**

So let us know: Do you CONDEMN Trump and his Republicans for lying to the American people about the 2020 election?**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_VfxVZ~_M-)
---|---|---

We're OUTRAGED.

The _New York Times_ just broke a bombshell story revealing the _Trump campaign KNEW all along that their claims about election fraud were completely baseless._

These are the very same claims that Republicans use to **ATTACK** our right to vote, **UNDERMINE** trust in our democracy, and even _**INCITE**_ a deadly insurrection.

And worst of all, House Republicans --_who are actively fighting to DEFEAT our House Majority_ \-- have doubled down on their loyalty to Trump's dangerous, deadly lies.

**It 's never been clearer: Republicans will lie and cheat in their quest for power -- and they're unfit to hold it at this make-or-break moment for our democracy.**

And here at Democratic HQ, we're committed to doing everything we can to make sure the House Majority remains in safe, Democratic hands.

But to protect our House Majority, we need Democrats everywhere to stand with us against these outrageous Republican lies.
**So let us know: Do you CONDEMN Trump and his Republicans for knowingly lying to the American people about the 2020 election?**
| [YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_VfxVZ~_M-)
---|---|---

Thanks,

DCCC

name: George Cunningham
subject: 3 reasons I'm supporting Kirsten Engel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36314792/307760542/1363185137?refcode=X_092321_CunninghamEvent_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTU2ZWM1MC1hYzFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tzkzagJvjGE8MK7zGv-J1nC1O_KxsGJwqb0vAW4mjLA=)
---
Dear friend,
I could go on at length about why I am proud to support Kirsten Engel for Congress. But I know these types of emails are supposed to be relatively short, so I will get right to the point.
**1\. Kirsten knows how budgets work**. I know this isn't the most scintillating issue for the voting public at large, but it may be the most important. My title when I worked for Gov. Napolitano was "Deputy Chief of Staff for Finance and Budget", but I was more commonly known as "the Governor's budget guy". And as a "budget guy", I can tell you how critical it is to elect leaders who understand how government works and how things are funded. Kirsten Engel is one of those leaders. She has the experience, the intelligence, and comprehensive understanding of budgets to be an incredibly effective Representative for Southern Arizona on day one.
**2\. Kirsten has represented the district well in the State Legislature.** Like Kirsten, I too served in both the State House and State Senate, representing this community. Serving in both chambers of the Legislature, and never losing an election in the process, makes Kirsten uniquely qualified for this seat.
**3\. This district has a rich tradition of electing strong, capable women.** Former Congresswoman Gabrielle Giffords and current Congresswoman Ann Kirkpatrick both defeated Republicans to win this seat back for Democrats. Dating back to its inception following the 1980s census, the southeastern Arizona Congressional District has always been competitive. While we may not know the exact boundaries of the newest iteration of this district yet, we know that it will be competitive and we know that a strong Democratic woman is our best bet for keeping it blue.
Kirsten is not motivated by ego, nor self-aggrandizement. But rather, she truly wants to help make life better for our community. Her experience as a working mom, a university professor, and a lawmaker give her unique insight into how best to achieve that goal as a member of Congress. I am proud to endorse her campaign, and I hope you join me in doing so. [**Please make a contribution today using this link.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36314794/307760544/-2048556521?refcode=X_092321_CunninghamEvent_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTU2ZWM1MC1hYzFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tzkzagJvjGE8MK7zGv-J1nC1O_KxsGJwqb0vAW4mjLA=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36314796/307760546/-2048556521?refcode=X_092321_CunninghamEvent_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTU2ZWM1MC1hYzFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tzkzagJvjGE8MK7zGv-J1nC1O_KxsGJwqb0vAW4mjLA=)
---
My son Paul and I are hosting an event for Kirsten's campaign at 5:00 PM this Sunday, September 26th, at Ft. Lowell Park. I hope you will join us and help elect this remarkable woman to Congress.
Kind regards,
George Cunningham
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36314798/307760548/41694283?refcode= X_092321_CunninghamEvent_B&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTU2ZWM1MC1hYzFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tzkzagJvjGE8MK7zGv-J1nC1O_KxsGJwqb0vAW4mjLA=)

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Can I have a minute to explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This deadline is a great opportunity to demonstrate our commitment to finally passing universal background checks.
#

Hello,
Over the next week, you will get a lot of emails from my team asking you to make a donation. Can I have a minute to explain why?
You see, we have a very important end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up on September 30th. Everyone will be watching.
**Which means this deadline is a great opportunity to publicly demonstrate our commitment to taking on the gun lobby and _finally_ passing universal background checks.**
That’s why today, I am asking:
[**Can I count on you to make your very first online contribution before our September 30th deadline? Your donation will help us show the gun lobby we’re not playing around.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210923-1-15&t=2&refcode2=889_3935704_pf0XcG&akid=889%2E3935704%2Epf0XcG)
Make no mistake, the gun lobby and the members of Congress they control are not going to go down without a fight. They want to stop the progress we’ve made before it gets any further.
But we’re not going to give up either, because taking on tough challenges is in the DNA of our organization.
This has been a long haul. It was always going to be that way. But I’m optimistic that if we keep moving forward, we will emerge victorious.
My very best,
Gabby Giffords
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210923-1-15&t=3&refcode2=889_3935704_pf0XcG&akid=889%2E3935704%2Epf0XcG)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=889%2E3935704%2Epf0XcG) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Ready for Stacey
subject: Shady GOP group attempts to force Stacey to “sit the race out”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|

| | Peter, GOP Gov. Brian Kemp just deployed his strategists to form a new group called Stop Stacey. They're using their deep political back channels throughout Georgia to keep Stacey Abrams from unseating Kemp in 2022. **ATLANTA JOURNAL-CONSTITUTION: "Abrams might sit the race out."** Last week Stacey Abrams flew to Texas, kicking off her nationwide tour firing up progressives ahead of next year's midterms. Meanwhile, Kemp's Stop Stacey operatives are hard at work securing big-dollar donations in Georgia to make sure Stacey's grassroots network can't compete with Kemp's machine in 2022. Stacey is the ONLY candidate capable of defeating Kemp & Co's fascist agenda to undermine our democracy with their authoritarian scheme. We have to protect her at all costs \-- and prove that progressives everywhere stand with Stacey. | **[STAND WITH STACEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36315076/307761298/103943381?refcode=OUT_20210826_GEN_FDR_D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3ZjUxYjA4LWFkMWMtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=najcOHOZOXLRQiNAZ-QVcxz8NMxQi9Qgitzn_Ztqx74=)**

It's a shame that so many of the Democrats who sung her praises for helping beat back Mitch McConnell in 2020 stopped supporting Stacey as soon as the going got tough.

That's why we're reaching out to you directly. You are among our top 300 most dedicated supporters \-- you've stepped up every time we needed you most. Stacey needs you now, Peter. We need you to chip in right now, Peter, because whether you can spare $5, $10, $25, or even more, you will send Stacey a clear and direct message that there is an entire country of supporters ready to fight for her on day one. body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=947%2E3611125%2EmbiTMM ][IMG]

It's crunch time, folks.

We’re 7 days out from our FEC end-of-quarter deadline, so I have to ask:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4339?t=1007&akid=947%2E3611125%2EmbiTMM ]Will you chip in $7 -- just $1 for every day until the deadline -- to
help us post a strong public FEC report?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4339?t=1008&akid=947%2E3611125%2EmbiTMM ]Chip in $7

I know asking for $7 for 7 days is a little gimmicky, but I couldn’t be
more serious.

My far-right opponents want nothing more than to see a weak FEC report
from our campaign. Of course, they don’t have to worry about fundraising
goals -- they’re able to self-fund their campaigns and have the backing of
billionaires like Peter Thiel.

Our campaign is powered by everyday people stepping up to make sure that
Ohio’s next Senator represents the working people of this state, not just
the ultra-wealthy.

We need to show that we have the grassroots power it takes to flip this
open seat blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4339?t=1009&akid=947%2E3611125%2EmbiTMM ]So, can I
count on you to chip in $7 or more to help us hit our end-of-quarter FEC
deadline in 7 days?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4339?t=1010&akid=947%2E3611125%2EmbiTMM ]Donate $7 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4340?t=1011&akid=947%2E3611125%2EmbiTMM ]Donate $25

Thanks a bunch,

Tim

| | | **Tanya For Arizona Campaign Round-Up**
Since her campaign launch in August 2021, AZ-09 congressional candidate Tanya Wheeless has been hitting the payment meeting with as many AZ-09 residents as she can. During her time campaigning, Tanya has gained early endorsements from Former Senator Jon Kyl and VIEWPAC. She has also stopped by LD-17, Greater Phoenix Republican Women, and LD-18 meetings.

**Tales From the Trail**

name: Rod Dorilas
subject: From homeless to Congress in one generation?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
My Haitian immigrant parents picked crops and worked at fast food restaurants to make sure I could live the American Dream |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=1ad4fc93cea7480fba06b2e9bc24eee6&_t=tWlME7Apz3IEY6Lwm-0Lb22ZXeq0aWOIgn5K_GKSuP-yw5HxM6D1pCCm0FGHmIlKz-2KPzWYljlgBIaamaZlimjM0WF1TA22wIrKcFv07lNUd3cUy6rA_aIbLGJ42QOIFet59ZCeomll49X3uMuEMc_QJBLzIGNbJaeS_CpO9vE%3D).

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1ad4fc93cea7480fba06b2e9bc24eee6&_e=j9shfC3mf3JTyDOOmt6-q5g6letaj4Q87gfjY-aWi1DpDF5vf7rt-UGiF_YdtIsXKkm-bGhnn93N0R520vwfZahU_Kp1KysFPELpjWdZnTXfkzJ_olYpkbEuN4NMkfMBs1l_Zc5X18GPXvKev56qSBCKbF3NPqWpZ8Ey-2Ak7Kd3E_OBK7vLy_I7UlVk8-DBBZMOrT3szPyot1LIXQT8froyeTCUFpbKDoA1Ou9SwGXQKESityzKYxSSmvWlREwjLQD0NS3DuceirE_ijBO-V9v8or_X2yqrAo-mu6EiYlflK1ZxmDYy896ufuZIRYho2IhsOLCrk4awYX_CCeFV5aeC_xjgeI9OgTNuBgkMlP-nSye6T0hms77ZIFBZUFL_zHJk280ODClUZ-Iwar_cJ9KghR5OdqqPxhzuLQO7yoDxKkbKnt4dI46mXf9DTG6iB4ugjw-DLZkKrllBNvp5fHRs6FS7qR2lRzUhK-aGMVo%3D)

---
Fellow American,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1ad4fc93cea7480fba06b2e9bc24eee6&_e=j9shfC3mf3JTyDOOmt6-q5g6letaj4Q87gfjY-aWi1DpDF5vf7rt-UGiF_YdtIsXKkm-bGhnn93N0R520vwfZahU_Kp1KysFPELpjWdZnTXfkzJ_olYpkbEuN4NMkfMBs1l_Zc5X18GPXvKev56qSBCKbF3NPqWpZ8Ey-2Ak7Kd3E_OBK7vLy_I7UlVk8-DBBZMOrT3szPyot1LIXQT8froyeTCUFpbKDoA1Ou9SwGXQKESityzKYxSSmvWlREwjLQD0NS3DuceirE_ijBO-V8G1ndnKURM5HRrWTcOnefudcHzwtW_EOSQ95DD4hnNfXZuXkQoOyNRnVy0EtjSXWJQtZdJEqbfmujZ4CMrAKzAoLtoVuvuyiBpPB-vx6ugjs45fQq-WOMUwcFUqHNbjcQaDXwvp6PcosfxOv-z71XWHvJD8PY7cR463f-CX5SaZTy8zuYBAEYxUP2MF3i700M9CxX2-lngjN9A7PJZHnNI%3D)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1ad4fc93cea7480fba06b2e9bc24eee6&_e=j9shfC3mf3JTyDOOmt6-q5g6letaj4Q87gfjY-aWi1DpDF5vf7rt-UGiF_YdtIsXKkm-bGhnn93N0R520vwfZahU_Kp1KysFPELpjWdZnTXfkzJ_olYpkbEuN4NMkfMBs1l_Zc5X18GPXvKev56qSBCKbF3NPqWpZ8Ey-2Ak7Kd3E_OBK7vLy_I7UlVk8-DBBZMOrT3szPyot1LIXQT8froyeTCUFpbKDoA1Ou9SwGXQKESityzKYxSSmvWlREwjLQD0NS3DuceirE_ijBO-V_23MiLgEeNv74zkxNjhpJ6ZxGUcgPlx3jDNqoTTsvBW85QibRclPY2dl0HLu8om_vrqnPsAhkcq620EL820eJy-09lwp1Uqp8xnyBs_jhQInVNG__L9W-Tl02LqV95p_UzskdU5d0fu7Lg-z0h7fBuoB-9s19eF646ZX27SWZA8KXVigWotpzoxZHqLM87KElYO8AWahjjeGzaBIERBK4w%3D)
I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, **[please consider chipping in whatever you can spare to my campaign today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1ad4fc93cea7480fba06b2e9bc24eee6&_e=j9shfC3mf3JTyDOOmt6-q5g6letaj4Q87gfjY-aWi1DpDF5vf7rt-UGiF_YdtIsXKkm-bGhnn93N0R520vwfZahU_Kp1KysFPELpjWdZnTXfkzJ_olYpkbEuN4NMkfMBs1l_Zc5X18GPXvKev56qSBCKbF3NPqWpZ8Ey-2Ak7Kd3E_OBK7vLy_I7UlVk8-DBBZMOrT3szPyot1LIXQT8froyeTCUFpbKDoA1Ou9SwGXQKESityzKYxSSmvWlREwjLQD0NS3DuceirE_ijBO-V3gj3ZUtQOt50loAOZGxo8sZg91l97_GaoEek4MfH_9RzK19QAB1WEL13s9bwsUNOmQYuQwKur0qhIKYbGcRrepT4VIl9HXSiTMSz4s66wY6Luf8ODXUIt7WMEH8Egv7_8XqufFbnqDVzUir-NQVgjKn9Z2aX2AuYtPT9EHDMHQcQ9fci5VpvFSo7-XDe4q4doy18H3dLH3wM1vvCKSK68c%3D)**. I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1ad4fc93cea7480fba06b2e9bc24eee6&_e=j9shfC3mf3JTyDOOmt6-q5g6letaj4Q87gfjY-aWi1DpDF5vf7rt-UGiF_YdtIsXKkm-bGhnn93N0R520vwfZahU_Kp1KysFPELpjWdZnTXfkzJ_olYpkbEuN4NMkfMBs1l_Zc5X18GPXvKev56qSBCKbF3NPqWpZ8Ey-2Ak7Kd3E_OBK7vLy_I7UlVk8-DBBZMOrT3szPyot1LIXQT8froyeTCUFpbKDoA1Ou9SwGXQKESityzKYxSSmvWlREwjLQD0NS3DuceirE_ijBO-V7jFCFhqNupY3sOqs8Dr4F9NHIs3uv1fBxC6JG_6azAHvzNk6VCK1tcCS36JDmzh0C0UuBpfgCEcWy-ZSDsFddR6j-_DxhnJTxhp9pulVGH6Vqu4tbtTVVrIuwhCRuy5yDCA_bVliARXJqPHu5wSmpTIuqpvDTKhJ_rK9Nr2zcl-MNsVsEQk32pEp76s2xkPaArcTz-C7G-kN2K04Geud4Q%3D)
Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts.

I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. **I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice**. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1ad4fc93cea7480fba06b2e9bc24eee6&_e=j9shfC3mf3JTyDOOmt6-q5g6letaj4Q87gfjY-aWi1DpDF5vf7rt-UGiF_YdtIsXKkm-bGhnn93N0R520vwfZahU_Kp1KysFPELpjWdZnTXfkzJ_olYpkbEuN4NMkfMBs1l_Zc5X18GPXvKev56qSBCKbF3NPqWpZ8Ey-2Ak7Kd3E_OBK7vLy_I7UlVk8-DBBZMOrT3szPyot1LIXQT8froyeTCUFpbKDoA1Ou9SwGXQKESityzKYxSSmvWlREwjLQD0NS3DuceirE_ijBO-V94Zs_8DIHz3LlPg8LDmGQgFGeKYuSHhpusUxNE3EdzBLXcc77vYPjWhSGnQYthhSXtvS-gzZhSgN0vpa0gzcug6Eza7G_IPdvYMET0nhxA0f6ZY8Wtuqs15rOhAIzYVFE_DXAsaDhn1s1hA9D__vWYIq_bdFBHFEwIeDmBA8htLHksRLdwjgk2kezzXazKbBwKLcRzdRIYXkUACdvnnYVM%3D)
**I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. **

Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but _**what is worth having in life that is easy?**_ I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts.

If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, **[would you please consider a contribution to my campaign for Congress today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1ad4fc93cea7480fba06b2e9bc24eee6&_e=j9shfC3mf3JTyDOOmt6-q5g6letaj4Q87gfjY-aWi1DpDF5vf7rt-UGiF_YdtIsXKkm-bGhnn93N0R520vwfZahU_Kp1KysFPELpjWdZnTXfkzJ_olYpkbEuN4NMkfMBs1l_Zc5X18GPXvKev56qSBCKbF3NPqWpZ8Ey-2Ak7Kd3E_OBK7vLy_I7UlVk8-DBBZMOrT3szPyot1LIXQT8froyeTCUFpbKDoA1Ou9SwGXQKESityzKYxSSmvWlREwjLQD0NS3DuceirE_ijBO-V661XvrPqyS6rYxhaxEsNRCqptO74HXZi8O57581lPCQ76Vcjdf84zAZEtSZ5b-x5aVUijawfA65u5uy84NE47C-laXs7xsjUBtqoswpFAMjsHkCkJyge7JYFADcEYbqo5VPNG44WSjSpjZjcsmSwnWhT_7PMCzlRN8FS4KIR-lgVtCgs2J5WyTM-wqnGKLCMz0MWL_08Oi0ijDuoGfAReU%3D)** I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1ad4fc93cea7480fba06b2e9bc24eee6&_e=j9shfC3mf3JTyDOOmt6-q5g6letaj4Q87gfjY-aWi1DpDF5vf7rt-UGiF_YdtIsXKkm-bGhnn93N0R520vwfZahU_Kp1KysFPELpjWdZnTXfkzJ_olYpkbEuN4NMkfMBs1l_Zc5X18GPXvKev56qSBCKbF3NPqWpZ8Ey-2Ak7Kd3E_OBK7vLy_I7UlVk8-DBBZMOrT3szPyot1LIXQT8froyeTCUFpbKDoA1Ou9SwGXQKESityzKYxSSmvWlREwjLQD0NS3DuceirE_ijBO-V9C2aG9YaP7VHd8cVXYRp24dhPXk4IzguDlp41LLRPsCgLEILDLYuezNPsx26Qdmo48KfRHt8YkCz3Kd0zTBiey94qmz5Tt5Im-N9lC-fHpOo4Kg6wRtDnU4zhNBly0S_316uhG_ia9mc_iaq_Ue9BzDmY-ePf1JxrRxEU6PT63dREo-j2xnaltYOnnzguWEfIgqvUUPvgXkfedtHZGMEH4%3D)
Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration.

For Country,

Rod Dorilas

[** I'M WITH ROD >> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1ad4fc93cea7480fba06b2e9bc24eee6&_e=j9shfC3mf3JTyDOOmt6-q5g6letaj4Q87gfjY-aWi1DpDF5vf7rt-UGiF_YdtIsXKkm-bGhnn93N0R520vwfZahU_Kp1KysFPELpjWdZnTXfkzJ_olYpkbEuN4NMkfMBs1l_Zc5X18GPXvKev56qSBCKbF3NPqWpZ8Ey-2Ak7Kd3E_OBK7vLy_I7UlVk8-DBBZMOrT3szPyot1LIXQT8froyeTCUFpbKDoA1Ou9SwGXQKESityzKYxSSmvWlREwjLQD0NS3DuceirE_ijBO-V8jAw7_rsjrc6XF9C6gavmKzHNyL9Oy91MFTxqBeRLgvm0VFXpK1EW5DR2IYzg7fj1VNPUNvxilTZGNAbxPWkE00iMZs6NE_3b0KSC5H4xMdKII0yDalQLqoGcD4WtG1n-W4D4wNv56QyVU37BBWEGFHVdU0d6x-NEKqGLc48BXmVWin-2zivG0XpMlhyzG1H8P_qw6hoGWA7qCnr8vYVKk%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1ad4fc93cea7480fba06b2e9bc24eee6&_e=j9shfC3mf3JTyDOOmt6-q5g6letaj4Q87gfjY-aWi1DpDF5vf7rt-UGiF_YdtIsXKkm-bGhnn93N0R520vwfZahU_Kp1KysFPELpjWdZnTXfkzJ_olYpkbEuN4NMkfMBs1l_Zc5X18GPXvKev56qSBCKbF3NPqWpZ8Ey-2Ak7Kd3E_OBK7vLy_I7UlVk8-DBBZMOrT3szPyot1LIXQT8froyeTCUFpbKDoA1Ou9SwGXQKESityzKYxSSmvWlREwjLQD0NS3DuceirE_ijBO-V4DFG0vznzilb7WBGQQ0k6lmfU1SOpDBKwzVvuXn42_lBnoN_qhzHHefXLVZvPINYG88_gaI-SBJO8DwmezqjsBqfDaMcp9uhN59lvaiV6Ion73bpESPHMJwycTpCbXkDago-dW62vAbaF-k1A9UG9KsGnjk_bkK1cwAY9baMPvZ8VRrxWdhX4yn1cv4Ai08_z0iYxvLpCm0GwUAoKqVRx4%3D)

Hi Derek, my name is Chris Deluzio. I'm running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District -- a swing seat that's critical for keeping House Democrats in the majority after 2022.

I'm a voting rights lawyer, an Iraq War veteran, a Democrat, and a father. I believe in the importance of unions, that everybody should have good healthcare, and that we need a fair economy that works for everyone. Service matters to me, and I believe that the best way right now to serve the communities I grew up in is to ask to represent them in Congress. **I’m ready to fight for the common good.**

Our democracy faces profound challenges today -- from restrictive state voting laws, to dangerous lies about our elections spread by extremists, to the obscene influence of corporate money. We need elected leaders with the courage to fight for a bold agenda, defend our democracy, and deliver transformative change for working families.

**I'm running to be one of those leaders, and I need your help as I launch this campaign. PA-17 is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Republicans are going to be well-funded in the fight for this seat.**

**[We need to come out of the gate strong this quarter. Will you be a founding donor of this campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36315737/307763240/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_210923Intro_N_CD_9_G_N_L1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjViZmNkMC1hZjFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pD18le5Kt6FacKGy2hibONukHkWn5h88L0IVN9xZpGY=)** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36315738/307763241/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_210923Intro_N_CD_9_G_N_B1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjViZmNkMC1hZjFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pD18le5Kt6FacKGy2hibONukHkWn5h88L0IVN9xZpGY=)**** I was born and raised in Thornburg, a few miles from downtown Pittsburgh. I entered the Naval Academy after high school, and went on to serve in uniform at sea and with Army Civil Affairs in Iraq. After law school, I worked to protect access to the ballot box and our elections at the Brennan Center for Justice and in my current job at Pitt Cyber, where I’ve been focused on voting rights, election security, and the intersection of technology and civil rights.

I believe my story and background make me well-equipped to build a robust and effective campaign in a battleground district. I'm a proud Democrat, and I want our party to be able to deliver on its promises for the American people: good-paying union jobs, quality and affordable healthcare, investments in our infrastructure, a new Voting Rights Act, and more.

**To implement the reforms and policies that our country needs in this defining moment, we have to ensure that Democrats stay in the majority in Congress.** We have to fight hard for every district, we have to stand for our values, and we can't be afraid to take on the forces that are trying to undermine voting and our democracy.

I'm excited to work to earn the support of voters across the 17th District. I look forward to building this campaign from the ground up, and having good conversations as I share my story, ideas, and plans. [**I hope to have your support as this journey begins. Grassroots support will be critical for giving us the enthusiasm and organization needed to keep a battleground district blue. Can you pitch in a few dollars today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36315739/307763242/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_210923Intro_N_CD_9_G_N_L2&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjViZmNkMC1hZjFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pD18le5Kt6FacKGy2hibONukHkWn5h88L0IVN9xZpGY=)

Thank you,

Chris Deluzio [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36315740/307763243/1796049497?refcode=EM_FR_210923Intro_N_CD_9_G_N_P1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjViZmNkMC1hZjFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pD18le5Kt6FacKGy2hibONukHkWn5h88L0IVN9xZpGY=) P.S. clean_body: I'm running in Pennsylvania's 17th Congressional District -- a swing seat that's critical for keeping House Democrats in the majority after 2022. = Hi Derek, my name is Chris Deluzio. I'm running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District -- a swing seat that's critical for keeping House Democrats in the majority after 2022. I'm a voting rights lawyer, an Iraq War veteran, a Democrat, and a father. I believe in the importance of unions, that everybody should have good healthcare, and that we need a fair economy that works for everyone. Service matters to me, and I believe that the best way right now to serve the communities I grew up in is to ask to represent them in Congress. I’m ready to fight for the common good. Our democracy faces profound challenges today -- from restrictive state voting laws, to dangerous lies about our elections spread by extremists, to the obscene influence of corporate money. We need elected leaders with the courage to fight for a bold agenda, defend our democracy, and deliver transformative change for working families. I'm running to be one of those leaders, and I need your help as I launch this campaign. PA-17 is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Republicans are going to be well-funded in the fight for this seat. = **= I was born and raised in Thornburg, a few miles from downtown Pittsburgh. I entered the Naval Academy after high school, and went on to serve in uniform at sea and with Army Civil Affairs in Iraq. After law school, I worked to protect access to the ballot box and our elections at the Brennan Center for Justice and in my current job at Pitt Cyber, where I’ve been focused on voting rights, election security, and the intersection of technology and civil rights. I believe my story and background make me well-equipped to build a robust and effective campaign in a battleground district. I'm a proud Democrat, and I want our party to be able to deliver on its promises for the American people: good-paying union jobs, quality and affordable healthcare, investments in our infrastructure, a new Voting Rights Act, and more. To implement the reforms and policies that our country needs in this defining moment, we have to ensure that Democrats stay in the majority in Congress. We have to fight hard for every district, we have to stand for our values, and we can't be afraid to take on the forces that are trying to undermine voting and our democracy. I'm excited to work to earn the support of voters across the 17th District. I look forward to building this campaign from the ground up, and having good conversations as I share my story, ideas, and plans. = Thank you, Chris Deluzio = P.S. Please visit my when you have a minute, and follow me on and . | | | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. =** Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: A dangerous ideology
body:

| | This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zssmokl4apdo9rja40hmjcppjebeftpjqqhd58mg_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c5j60o76clh2bs)
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zce12dn60etdkar4at1hrlvr8e19frijgeejvojo_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c5j60o76clh2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z4vjuh0tf1r8vvhl349647opkiogk5okd27njpm0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2c5j60o76clh2bs)

Larry P. Arnn

I'm writing today to follow-up on my email from last week regarding President Biden's forced vaccination efforts.

I'm not seeing your name on the list of conservatives who have taken our four question vaccine mandate survey, so I'm reaching back out to you with another opportunity to respond today.

Thank you,
Jim Jordan

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Jim Jordan
Date: Fri, Sep 10, 2021 at 5:30 PM
Subject: NO. VACCINE. MANDATE.
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Peter,

Last month the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 18 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=2a8dd9101e744f41816c65ab3d62bb0a&_e=XeuN3e1bpjuFrpFjX2kLF4X6Ta1kDdb7xSUSHj3ON0WLsR_lC823U7bhLx2QDfnh23cSMUxi0R1_mhFCKxv_SzZnyn-cerGhBq2u7aXMy6FfoZ7_tg-Z9sWXMhECzm5lugzRW0uI35gUjTk_6xJQew9kgFsNNiKsrZIPJV1ekcJxhA0LBW-sD2X7HyMlkzwAFV1Ry9zlE6vJq2ufKCOwUrdeOghfRJaf4bLLrMZ5eTgiebQKOx-mz8jqbGqeEW7Q7fPNHgaZp4Djg7vjSkWWjet-GyXKq2W0RfBAlhWCRvJxzTDy3Fw-fO1ho56L-iv1dOeAlQc8r-MdR0BLxVMSbEA9TNQm6YwHLoPaNsOrNlkssuQysq2RIQgiwyVNY7JF16uMeZ0pSSWkoAUQyrd7ThkrlrSq_1Xu1A19EuMfHQ45L21Q3xxQ1uuLPfEiWwgqP7Xxqai78i3jZtorT3o1o3rF_3h0wl1ZXmKunt9cOdC_HLmYHrxW9YoSv9LLkpjf6mZSMhz8fZaeHYlyfEnfaA%3D%3D)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=2a8dd9101e744f41816c65ab3d62bb0a&_e=XeuN3e1bpjuFrpFjX2kLF4X6Ta1kDdb7xSUSHj3ON0WLsR_lC823U7bhLx2QDfnh23cSMUxi0R1_mhFCKxv_SzZnyn-cerGhBq2u7aXMy6FfoZ7_tg-Z9sWXMhECzm5lugzRW0uI35gUjTk_6xJQew9kgFsNNiKsrZIPJV1ekcJxhA0LBW-sD2X7HyMlkzwAFV1Ry9zlE6vJq2ufKCOwUrdeOghfRJaf4bLLrMZ5eTgiebQKOx-mz8jqbGqeEW7Q7fPNHgaZp4Djg7vjSkWWjet-GyXKq2W0RfBAlhWCRvJxzTDy3Fw-fO1ho56L-iv1GSk7dbNsfQMOQm8FGdAShjr9dLZ6WNLgsDCZU5wF-I2lT-BF7yOkHyTtRcL_ymtgBLzq96nGFc4NbWO0qmCGGXgXcEbSj5LEsVHWGtENe97qquFEmn2kBxgTPGCHtsdf7dB-dFl0ZeYIJ1y4ZnIatDMN37boo03Hid03np_ND8bAUFjQ325nAliuqg5T0YvlGX2A8phS_eh7H2ziqjzoFA%3D%3D)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, September 14th

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=2a8dd9101e744f41816c65ab3d62bb0a&_e=XeuN3e1bpjuFrpFjX2kLF4X6Ta1kDdb7xSUSHj3ON0WLsR_lC823U7bhLx2QDfnh23cSMUxi0R1_mhFCKxv_SzZnyn-cerGhBq2u7aXMy6FfoZ7_tg-Z9sWXMhECzm5lugzRW0uI35gUjTk_6xJQew9kgFsNNiKsrZIPJV1ekcJxhA0LBW-sD2X7HyMlkzwAFV1Ry9zlE6vJq2ufKCOwUrdeOghfRJaf4bLLrMZ5eTgiebQKOx-mz8jqbGqeEW7Q7fPNHgaZp4Djg7vjSkWWjet-GyXKq2W0RfBAlhWCRvJxzTDy3Fw-fO1ho56L-iv1297I1EIBRq13WNeMTpoBLlBDWDmrF8NTeU4dr1sF5-7j5nN-6n5dVy8TmQw1_6oG-h28u5J1CAXwInKdmI8RkbE7RJHPQxBefWE9Zd7A_anj0vJu4GEoX0MUeV-XrxiDXA0MuNZNFRuvMEflYPPzebOaPRlN4Rq7qkmDVHeSclfpcwZFt2EU9kdLmr_QhSVCfIUk2i1M75kf1HSWm_eD7Q%3D%3D)

---

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**
**Now, if you work for a company with more than 100 employees, the government is going to try to force you to get vaccinated!**

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

clean_body: I'm not seeing your name on the list of conservatives who have taken our four question vaccine mandate survey Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border. Don't want to receive our emails? | I'm writing today to follow-up on my email from last week regarding President Biden's forced vaccination efforts. I'm not seeing your name on the list of conservatives who have taken our four question vaccine mandate survey, so I'm reaching back out to you with another opportunity to respond today. Thank you, Jim Jordan \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Jim Jordan Date: Fri, Sep 10, 2021 at 5:30 PM Subject: NO. VACCINE. MANDATE. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, Last month the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION! Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role. We’ve lived through 18 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations. | SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, September 14th Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us. How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status! Now, if you work for a company with more than 100 employees, the government is going to try to force you to get vaccinated! The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word. Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them. Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked. Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border. Will the hypocrisy ever end? Thanks for letting us know – Thank you, Jim Jordan | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

He bought the Republican primary and now he says he’s willing to spend **$75 million of his own cash to buy the Governor’s office.**
No wonder _The Washington Post_ said, “Democrats will err if they take this race for granted.”
With reliable polls showing this race within the margin of error, and two showing Youngkin ahead, it’s critical that we turn out Democratic voters across Virginia.

name: President Trump
subject: Triple-Match
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I’m traveling the Country | Peter,

There is nothing like a Trump Rally.

The energy is incomparable - _something Joe Biden and the Democrats will NEVER experience_ - and I absolutely love experiencing it with the American People.

name: Alex
subject: Standing in Solidarity with Haitians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ortega For Congress
body:
The US needs to treat immigrants with dignity. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36319749/307776265/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDEwMTY2Yi1iYjFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uTdFrGdjczWMaYspHgYjxohzawDEAXo_EBDza-PV_nY=&emci=dcac3a58-b81c-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=2d10166b-bb1c-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=12523946) **Standing in Solidarity With Haitians
** As the US continues to treat immigrants with cruelty, our movement is running to fight for human rights. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36319750/307776266/1920144439?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDEwMTY2Yi1iYjFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uTdFrGdjczWMaYspHgYjxohzawDEAXo_EBDza-PV_nY=) Friend, Haiti was the first Black-led Republic in the Americas to ban slavery in the 19th century. Since then, international organizations, whether it has been the UN, OAS, the US, the Red Cross, the Core Group, or the Clinton Foundation, have had massive footprints in Haiti - and they've been anything but on the side of the people. If you walk around Haiti today, you'll see permanent UN structures all over the country. The US has the world's 4th-largest embassy there - so they're planning on being there a long time. Haiti is home to billions of dollars worth of oil - comparable to Venezuela's supply - as well as enormous amounts of minerals such as gold. Young Haitians have only known only their home to be under this occupation - they refer to the international presence there as such. Even in the past 20 years, they've seen the US help to fix elections and hand-pick their leaders. The amount of US-sanctioned corruption that has occurred in Haiti post hurricane and earthquake is incomprehensible and immoral. This week, [disturbing images](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36319751/307776267/-1870719808?s=21&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDEwMTY2Yi1iYjFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uTdFrGdjczWMaYspHgYjxohzawDEAXo_EBDza-PV_nY=) of border patrol abusing Haitians seeking asylum in the US were released. We're still waiting for the current Representative of CA-46, Lou Correa, to come out against this and fight to stop it. That's why Mike is running. While Lou does fight for decreasing the barriers to citizenship - Mike's campaign is centered in **human dignity for immigrants of all kinds. ** Mike is going to revitalize the fight to Abolish ICE, and immediately provide citizenship for all undocumented workers - and stop deportations NOW. Help our campaign out today by sharing this email with your friends and family. This is how we win! clean_body: The US needs to treat immigrants with dignity. Standing in Solidarity With Haitians As the US continues to treat immigrants with cruelty, our movement is running to fight for human rights. = Friend, Haiti was the first Black-led Republic in the Americas to ban slavery in the 19th century. Since then, international organizations, whether it has been the UN, OAS, the US, the Red Cross, the Core Group, or the Clinton Foundation, have had massive footprints in Haiti - and they've been anything but on the side of the people. If you walk around Haiti today, you'll see permanent UN structures all over the country. The US has the world's 4th-largest embassy there - so they're planning on being there a long time. Haiti is home to billions of dollars worth of oil - comparable to Venezuela's supply - as well as enormous amounts of minerals such as gold. Young Haitians have only known only their home to be under this occupation - they refer to the international presence there as such. Even in the past 20 years, they've seen the US help to fix elections and hand-pick their leaders. The amount of US-sanctioned corruption that has occurred in Haiti post hurricane and earthquake is incomprehensible and immoral. This week, = of border patrol abusing Haitians seeking asylum in the US were released. We're still waiting for the current Representative of CA-46, Lou Correa, to come out against this and fight to stop it. That's why Mike is running. While Lou does fight for decreasing the barriers to citizenship - Mike's campaign is centered in human dignity for immigrants of all kinds. Mike is going to revitalize the fight to Abolish ICE, and immediately provide citizenship for all undocumented workers - and stop deportations NOW. Help our campaign out today by sharing this email with your friends and family. This is how we win! | Peter -
Robert Francis O'Rourke is truly the gift that keeps on giving. Beto wasted millions of dollars in a failed Senate race. He wasted millions running for president. And he wasted millions in a pathetic attempt to turn Texas blue.
There are only two things Beto is good at: burning cash and losing elections.
And now, Beto wants to see if his failed recipe of radicalism and pandering to socialists will make him Governor of Texas. We all know how this is going to go.
Beto needs all the help he can get. So we thought we would recommend a few campaign slogans that tell the truth about where Beto stands on key issues. Here are a few options:

1. Law enforcement is the new Jim Crow!
2. America was founded on white supremacy!
3. Hell yes we're going to take away your guns!
4. Passing the Green New Deal is just like defeating Nazis in WW2!
5. Tear down the border wall!
6. Tax churches!
7. Planned Parenthood saves lives!

---
| | | [WHAT BETO SLOGAN WOULD YOU ADD?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cvAEuNp9xyt8hBMTlJ-iiPNJNa8zWiy4Cahx-Rsc4Sw7NbLLb7pIR5i5_niRr8i7bhJ_xsMSpY-tVWys5qNFnl1XXZt5MUVa6NbpKs06Kj6MUrOlATUnDeUCKHV7rg5EDPfMQFXSHKS6bTkCOsxZtaHH4nn63hmuEAmSRYlNO2BZUKxGMjKEl9jcwShZqoYXm8e2hUZIXGgpYiAWVOybTM1spMTj5-N2fPaybbfQzU7P0cIXiLu5WNUZmUPM_UvlvPImmKrwdMnh9hFXvzYyOAkqwAPhK4PqMbYcCKDOUedy85U_y-xrdTDsGehOIcFy6lDc6UugqcQ=&c=cGWqtTPSe-mDk8_ikPWAZglenen4jSq2SDGZ2aNNJjUvMlKXFQlFcA==&ch=0X3EpxpYxmKXavN0_i5dM7sEvFZXHz2Lo9-D9QHOtTqD8gX5DjVNAQ==)

| But in all seriousness - Beto didn't lose because he's terrible at running for office. Beto keeps losing because we keep putting up a hell of a fight.
The left-wing media did everything they could to boost Beto and make him seem like a cool, relatable West Texas moderate Democrat who could unite everyone. And they are already doing it again.
---
| | | [FIGHT BACK. EXPOSE THE TRUTH ABOUT BETO.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cvAEuNp9xyt8hBMTlJ-iiPNJNa8zWiy4Cahx-Rsc4Sw7NbLLb7pIR5i5_niRr8i71w8Wc4KjsHa_JXPGkgzIxb-Z9AhDOvFy1mGxpF2KbMysfpfiHIEC0SMihttjbdID_4g_CeaEuX1ym1GZV8i4PgWrZLCRXG9UTTpwZ8MTsCQWG5CbGAcnf8R44NcyIfnUdXm8MdttQIy4vObCfnqk9JW1Wsaq0sQtzGNPiG5zNm31p4KYP3ROMGsH2XUra66qD0ew9WOHNubfA_N9q8WqFvMr1rqEVW17yRqK4XeLqPXfu2z8OZVVtkQl6s02Mc61v6EjGbUCQn-pI3OpXuhiPiTZrbN-EdbT&c=cGWqtTPSe-mDk8_ikPWAZglenen4jSq2SDGZ2aNNJjUvMlKXFQlFcA==&ch=0X3EpxpYxmKXavN0_i5dM7sEvFZXHz2Lo9-D9QHOtTqD8gX5DjVNAQ==)

| |
---
| The Radical Left is going to put the full power of their socialist base to help Beto in this election. National Democrats are going to send him tens of millions of dollars to carry him across the finish line.
That's why we have to fight back again.
---
| | | [JOIN THE FIGHT. STOP BETO AND THE RADICAL LEFT.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cvAEuNp9xyt8hBMTlJ-iiPNJNa8zWiy4Cahx-Rsc4Sw7NbLLb7pIR5i5_niRr8i71w8Wc4KjsHa_JXPGkgzIxb-Z9AhDOvFy1mGxpF2KbMysfpfiHIEC0SMihttjbdID_4g_CeaEuX1ym1GZV8i4PgWrZLCRXG9UTTpwZ8MTsCQWG5CbGAcnf8R44NcyIfnUdXm8MdttQIy4vObCfnqk9JW1Wsaq0sQtzGNPiG5zNm31p4KYP3ROMGsH2XUra66qD0ew9WOHNubfA_N9q8WqFvMr1rqEVW17yRqK4XeLqPXfu2z8OZVVtkQl6s02Mc61v6EjGbUCQn-pI3OpXuhiPiTZrbN-EdbT&c=cGWqtTPSe-mDk8_ikPWAZglenen4jSq2SDGZ2aNNJjUvMlKXFQlFcA==&ch=0X3EpxpYxmKXavN0_i5dM7sEvFZXHz2Lo9-D9QHOtTqD8gX5DjVNAQ==)
