And we need your help to make sure there is NEVER a Governor Beto.
Can we count on you?

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36320458/307778710/1309164061?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDRhODljOC1iZDFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZUGDM3h9RCGEYZzFItr_j-oTRMlITk1-bDbY1VyIiI=)

Listen, I know we’ve been emailing a lot lately, so I’ll keep this as brief as I can.

**Ads are a *vital* component of this campaign.** They allow us to inform voters of both Ken Calvert’s corruption, and my plans to uplift my community with what I’ve learned as a pastor, educator, and nonprofit leader.

If we don’t have the resources to run our ads, we can’t reach voters and get our message out. There’s no other way around it.

But we ran the numbers and if just 15% of the people reading this chipped in $1, we’d be able to fund our crucial digital ads through the end of September. [**So, please, can I count on you for just $1? Seriously, just one.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36320464/307778722/-1029091002?amount=1&amounts=1,2,3,4&refcode=BMFC_20210923_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDRhODljOC1iZDFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZUGDM3h9RCGEYZzFItr_j-oTRMlITk1-bDbY1VyIiI=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $1 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36320489/307778750/-1029091002?amount=1&amounts=1,2,3,4&express_lane=true&refcode=BMFC_20210923_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDRhODljOC1iZDFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZUGDM3h9RCGEYZzFItr_j-oTRMlITk1-bDbY1VyIiI=)

[CONTRIBUTE $2 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36320494/307778755/-1029091002?amount=2&amounts=1,2,3,4&express_lane=true&refcode=BMFC_20210923_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDRhODljOC1iZDFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZUGDM3h9RCGEYZzFItr_j-oTRMlITk1-bDbY1VyIiI=)
[Or a custom donation »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36320498/307778760/-1029091002?amount=3&amounts=1,2,3,4&refcode=BMFC_20210923_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDRhODljOC1iZDFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZUGDM3h9RCGEYZzFItr_j-oTRMlITk1-bDbY1VyIiI=)
I’m not gonna lie, it’s tough to take on an established MAGA Republican.

body:
Can you give me a moment to explain something? It’s important.

Most political experts believe Wisconsin is the best chance Democrats have to flip a Senate seat next year and grow our majority, which explains why Republican groups plan to blanket my state with television and digital ads.

I’m reaching out because we have to win this election to make sure Mitch McConnell doesn’t take back the Senate majority, but that cannot happen unless we have the financial resources to respond to these attacks the moment they happen. We can’t afford to be caught off guard -- not when Ron Johnson is already attacking me directly.

I know we send you a lot of these pesky fundraising emails, so I appreciate you opening this message -- and I hope you can afford to make a donation right now to help us fight back and flip this seat from red to blue.

Peter,

I’m Lauren Lasry, Alex’s wife. I wanted to take this opportunity to introduce myself to you, especially in light of what’s going on across the country.

Earlier this month, the most restrictive anti-choice law went into effect in Texas. This law amounts to a nearly complete ban on abortion, and has already paved the way for other Republican legislatures to propose and enact similar laws.

In my work, I’ve seen firsthand how important it is to protect reproductive rights and freedom. It’s crucial that we protect access to reproductive healthcare for tens of thousands of Wisconsinites, and laws like the one we’ve seen pass in Texas and pop up across the country are not only wrong, but **_they’re dangerous._**

Alex and I both agree that women should have full autonomy over their bodies. We can’t allow politicians to continue making restrictive laws about our own reproductive health.

**[Alex is running to defend reproductive rights, and I’m asking you to help him beat anti-choice Ron Johnson by chipping in whatever you can today to his campaign. There’s too much at stake in this election to sit on the | Friends,
Are you starving for some social time and constitutional inspiration?!! I know I am!
Join me on October 6th and 7th for two Freedom Rallies with special guest speaker, America's Constitution Coach, Rick Green. Rick is a national treasure... A dedicated conservative and patriot whose voice and expertise is badly needed in this generation. At a time when cowardice is common, Rick stands above the crowd as a bold and unafraid voice for freedom.
I had the pleasure of meeting Rick on the speaking circuit years ago, and was instantly impressed with his commitment to the Constitution and liberty. We share a common vision -- to educate American citizens about the Constitution and get them off the bench and onto the battlefield.

name: Kellie Rhodes
subject: Will you be joining me?
body:
A conversation with world renowned neuroscientist Dr. Marco Iacoboni | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=614d05a5f4e29c11f798d989&u=https%3A%2F%2Frhodestocongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D614ce49ba46c880c65fef25e%26ss_email_id%3D614d05a5f4e29c11f798d989%26ss_campaign_name%3DWill%2Byou%2Bbe%2Bjoining%2Bme%253F%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2021-09-23T22%253A54%253A32Z&w=6031a5f55eb0533730d01734&l=en-US&s=cLLhOThHBTnhBIQX2QlON8uCX3I%3D)
---
| Dear Peter, Will you be joining me for a conversation with world renowned neuroscientist Dr. Marco Iacoboni? Right now, our nation is in the throes of the ageless story of scarcity, fear, and division - but, **contagious empathy can help**. Strategic application of contagious empathy has the power to build peace and strengthen our democracy. And better still, every community member can play a role in shifting the narrative!**Dr. Iacoboni is a leading expert on contagious empathy**. He has been cited over 40,000 times, published over 200 scientific articles, is the author of “Mirroring People: The New Science of How We Connect with Others”, and was also featured in a conversation with the Dalai Lama.**I believe in the importance of empathy and science, and seek to champion both in Congress.** I kindly invite you to join us for this online campaign fundraiser and discussion next**Thursday, September 30 at 5:30 PM MST**. **If you haven’t purchased your ticket yet,**[**you can do so here. **](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=614d05a5f4e29c11f798d989&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frhodestocongress_contagiousempathy&w=6031a5f55eb0533730d01734&l=en-US&s=YHmKdmoPT606mVttnVpjNCtfeFQ%3D)Yours in service, Kellie Rhodes
---
[_ _**Get Tickets Here** _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=614d05a5f4e29c11f798d989&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frhodestocongress_contagiousempathy&w=6031a5f55eb0533730d01734&l=en-US&s=YHmKdmoPT606mVttnVpjNCtfeFQ%3D)
---
#### _**"We catch each other’s emotions like we catch a virus." - Dr. Marco Iacoboni**_

name: Tiffany Smiley
subject: Joe Biden and Patty Murray wasted taxpayer dollars
body:
Patty Murray is once again silent.
---
| | | | | | |

[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TrkFSWw-0y5VGP7qU-fr025Tre1j4uNI0awcCzBn_nkBi9gKYv0U6so6YHfMED0-1m3VKZYY4u9dCfUDvlWgZ6wvYVAOIYkx1IFJyVf5LRbqCgwrf60YLzAxttJvpJKbvAgDvdvc78JC8Sanc4C60EQdQfTdzMfEyenUZ7dJXUE8RRYvzLmaQ8yqRyY7jqSxtIngiojZ_nkADFJlz4op1vLUP8fhf8_G&c=H8YTAk-BzpcOzjij8dvtPfeeXkmjkguwLFasurmEI2ts8xR7473yyA==&ch=CuWXTrdXA3n-2_gIyEs1ewtESSLZcivcKQMBhHODYVuVVxVhIXKQNQ==)

| Friend,
A government watchdog says billions of dollars in COVID-19 relief funds meant to help small businesses have been misused and didn't reach those who needed help the most. The pandemic forced thousands of Washington small business owners to shut their doors--putting them and their employees out of work. Instead of making sure they received the help they needed, Joe Biden and Patty Murray mismanaged and wasted the taxpayers' money. This clearly shows that we need more government oversight in Washington D.C., and Joe Biden and Patty Murray must be held accountable for letting down both taxpayers and our small businesses. We need leaders who are willing to speak up, ask the tough questions, and protect the taxpayers' money.
This is why I need your help today. name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Consider this my notice
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon

Right now, **our team is more than 30% short of our critical End-of-Quarter fundraising goal and we only have _ONE WEEK_ to close the gap.**

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 felonies for exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c455%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=38XXcaS2jCeVOxQa32ZTOw&sysid=1)
Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.** **And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies.** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66616%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YHq7in%2f7biphwoC7u1dBCA&sysid=1)** You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... _**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_ I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. **[That's where your emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND comes in --- by giving today you can stand with David in his hour of need.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66617%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kI5sPGFwwg0yiu%2fERA3jNg&sysid=1)** The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. **[You can make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66618%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=p1eO9eu2hFcUjz94ZVz02g&sysid=1)** My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **we fight back.** I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... **We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS.** In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases.
* The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help.

* The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment - they want a ruling against David without a trial at all!

* And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends.

That's why David needs your financial support today. **[And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66619%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dJfeWXF93P5IuzF%2b%2f6jneg&sysid=1)** I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. **This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David."** It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. **[So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66610%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YhQB5jj8QDK46o%2bWTkt5Fg&sysid=1)** I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? **[David is a pro-life hero. Will you make a generous donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND of $35, $50, $100 or more to stop this attempt to crush him?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66611%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uJU40uGDZfjuTpRk6aDb%2bg&sysid=1)** [**DONATE**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66612%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jbCfBkmeweJQik67Y0QtNQ&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66613%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fy8fHbCJbrDRwEBuSP6JTw&sysid=1) The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit, national public interest law firm dedicated to restoring respect in law for life, family, and religious liberty. [Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66614%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0ghqbAaFJRxNQjoMWTrT9Q&sysid=1) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66625%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YFcIMPlfGCbikBleBzK9Xw&sysid=1)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606
---

_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c455%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=38XXcaS2jCeVOxQa32ZTOw&sysid=1)_

And after mismanaging our COVID-19 crisis for over a year, he just called on the Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade – putting Arizonans' health care and right to choose at serious risk.
**Ducey seems to think he can just attack our rights and rewrite the rules of democracy to suit the GOP's political needs, but this isn't a game. This is our country's, our state's, our families' futures. We need a leader who will _fight_ for that future, not threaten it.**

Marco Lopez (D) is the Democrat to do it.** Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight is calling his race a TOSS-UP because they know he has a real shot at winning. **Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. clean_body: | | | Our democracy is under ATTACK from extremists, and Doug Ducey (R) is welcoming them into Arizona with open arms. Marco Lopez (D) is running to DEFEND democracy and bring new leadership to Arizona, but with opposition rising, he needs our help now:= = Friend, as governor, Doug Ducey has massively failed Arizona – and even worse, he's ushering in a new era of even WORSE Republican extremism. First, Ducey signed a voter suppression bill to purge up to 125,000 voters from the rolls. Then, he let QAnon conspiracy theorist Marjorie Taylor Greene – and even Donald Trump himself – parade across our state, stoking conspiracy theories and attempting to overturn the 2020 election. And after mismanaging our COVID-19 crisis for over a year, he just called on the Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade – putting Arizonans' health care and right to choose at serious risk. Ducey seems to think he can just attack our rights and rewrite the rules of democracy to suit the GOP's political needs, but this isn't a game. This is our country's, our state's, our families' futures. We need a leader who will fight for that future, not threaten it. We're working hard to reelect Senator Hassan and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate, but we can't do it alone. = Thank you for your help! – Team Maggie | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

So much has happened since the last time I checked in via email. My heart is heavy with all the events of the last month – spiking COVID-19 rates, attacks on women’s autonomy, the Afghanistan withdrawal, and multiple devastating severe weather crises across the country, including here in Connecticut. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36323358/307785688/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2VhMjg1MC1jNTFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gMIGcFkumNm-nyg0gHFDZANgSipKLQdIJbpRXdMBCnQ=&emci=788d5bbf-bd1b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=97ea2850-c51c-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=15529135) | Hi, how are you? So much has happened since the last time I checked in via email. My heart is heavy with all the events of the last month – spiking COVID-19 rates, attacks on women’s autonomy, the Afghanistan withdrawal, and multiple devastating severe weather crises across the country, including here in Connecticut. But when things start to feel dark, I put my head down and get to work. Focus on what you can do to make it better, right? And that is exactly what I have been doing. However, since the term for Congress is only two years, I have to start thinking about my election next year – and I need you to do the same. **September is the final month of this fundraising quarter, and it is arguably the most important to date.** [**Will you donate today to my re-election campaign so I can keep working for you in Washington?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36323359/307785689/-270657684?refcode=E11404-20210923-EOQKickoff2-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2VhMjg1MC1jNTFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gMIGcFkumNm-nyg0gHFDZANgSipKLQdIJbpRXdMBCnQ=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36323360/307785690/-270657684?express_lane=true&refcode=E11404-20210923-EOQKickoff2-EG-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2VhMjg1MC1jNTFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gMIGcFkumNm-nyg0gHFDZANgSipKLQdIJbpRXdMBCnQ=)

With all the early attention my campaign has received already, I have no doubt that the GOP is keeping a close eye on our fundraising numbers. National Republican groups have already invested MILLIONS in a handful of toss-up districts hoping to flip the House red, and CT-05 is one of those districts. _They are using advertising to attack me for simply doing my job fighting for my constituents throughout this pandemic._
But if they see strong fundraising numbers from our campaign heading into 2022, they might reconsider if all their spending is worth it. **After all, this grassroots team has helped us build an unprecedented communications, outreach, and turnout operation in the past, and I KNOW this election won’t be any different.**
If we’re able to prove EARLY that their money is best put elsewhere, we can spend this campaign communicating my positive vision for our community – not fighting back against divisive rhetoric and hateful attack ads. Who can forget the hateful, angry, fear-mongering mailers sent out last year...
[**So, please. Your support ahead of the end-of-quarter deadline this month will help us make a clear statement:_Don’t bother with the divisive partisanship._ If you can, please make a donation today. Each dollar matters.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36323366/307785698/-270657684?refcode=E11404-20210923-EOQKickoff2-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2VhMjg1MC1jNTFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gMIGcFkumNm-nyg0gHFDZANgSipKLQdIJbpRXdMBCnQ=)
Thank you for all you do,
– Jahana

Peter, I’m humbled by the outpouring of support my Democratic campaign for Lt. Governor has received.

It’s people like _Betty from Richmond_ , _John from Alexandria_ , _Donna from Farmville_ , and _Sandra from Newport News_ who make this campaign possible.

Every dollar you donate directly supports our voter outreach, campaign events, and even yard signs! [**Which is why I’m coming to you seven days out from my last fundraising deadline before Election Day ‐‐ Peter, can I count on your $7 donation today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36323667/307786447/2130246724?amount=7&amounts=7,15,35,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20210923_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2YyZWEyYy1jNjFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9-8z9geJUTTq9ltWYBkAWKGhihYPpqYLuC5i_8rQfcI=) | [7 DAYS UNTIL DEADLINE: CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36323668/307786448/2130246724?amount=7&amounts=7,15,35,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20210923_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2YyZWEyYy1jNjFjLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9-8z9geJUTTq9ltWYBkAWKGhihYPpqYLuC5i_8rQfcI=)

Peter, I wish this fundraising deadline didn’t matter as much as it does.

**But if my campaign falls short of our $20,000 goal, it will make coming out on top of this race more difficult.**

Our fundraising numbers become public at the end of this month, and we must show our extreme Republican opponent that my campaign has a wave of grassroots support!

And as you know, Peter, everything is on the line. **The Lt. Governor is the last line of defense ‐‐ _the tie‐breaking vote in our legislature_ ‐‐ and I intend to be a brick wall for voting rights, the right to choose, and so much more.**

name: Jim Inhofe
subject: Do you trust our elections?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JIM INHOFE
body:
| | Demand Voter ID |
#### [View this email online](http://email.senatepatriot.com/q/13VfbTwuRExLy46ghCdXe/wv)
---|---
| | | [ ](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/1enUENCSatdtvDr7rbYOKXE)
---
| | **Friend, ** **America’s elections are integral to the health of our democracy and functioning of our government at all levels. This is why it saddens me to learn that a mere _40 percent of the U.S. public have confidence in the honesty of our elections. _** **Democrats in this country are trying hard to undermine our elections and cast even more doubt in election integrity by getting rid of voter ID requirements.****[_THIS IS SERIOUS!_](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/1enWHxpg73QUEJaEww8Vpf7)** **Voter ID laws are important because they**effectively** prevent: **
---
[ ](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/1enYKhbE3EulNOUbBQj23wA)
| Why would Democrat lawmakers want to take away a SIMPLE method for ensuring only valid votes are cast? **Because chipping away at voting laws helps them win elections.**
---
[ ](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/1eo0N0Y20f7MWUDIHat8HO3)
| **Obtaining an ID is not burdensome, and it does not disproportionately affect minorities like the radical Left likes to say. By watching the Fake News Media, you would think the whole country believes voter ID laws are RACIST... but that narrative simply is not true. ** [_When asked, over_ _70 percent of Americans_ _say they support voter ID requirements!_ ](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/1eo2PKKpWPLe60nfMuDfm5w) **Don’t let the left get away with this dangerous lie.**SIGN THE PETITION** now to help secure our elections! >>** [**_< <SIGN HERE>>_**](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/1eo4SuwNTqoFf66MRONm0mZ) **Thank you, ** **Jim Inhofe**

---
| |
---

---
PO Box 13300

Oklahoma City, OK 73113
| [ ]()

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: I call for door-to-door voter verification
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Got to stop the fraud |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=78fb2b3a02&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

**How far would you go to save America?**

That is the question which I have to ask myself every morning as this fight goes on longer.

_And the answer is I could never go far enough._

**My name is Mark Finchem. I am the Trump endorsed candidate for Secretary of State in Arizona and I am leading the vanguard in the fight for election integrity every day!**

And recently I made a difficult, but necessary call.
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=fa50ed80b9&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **And I will tell you this, folks. It sickens me that there are Americans that are content to let Democracy slide down the tubes and do nothing about it.**

As a result of the recent grassroots survey which found that there were countless voter irregularities and people who voted whose votes were thrown out, it is absolutely necessary to do a state-wide door-to-door voter verification.

**But there are more than 4.3 million registered voters in Arizona. And I have heard people say “that’s too much” and “how can we verify all of that?”**

_We sent Americans to the moon with a ruler and pencil and paper. I think we can pull this off. The only question is this: Will we let America’s democracy be destroyed because we are too apathetic to put in the work?_

**Never. I have been working tirelessly from the beginning to make sure that voter integrity is protected, and I won’t stop now!**

How far would you go to save America’s elections? Can you help us in this huge but necessary endeavor?

**_[We are up against a very tight deadline for the end of the quarter and we need to raise $48,000. Donate today to help us in this project of historic proportions! Pitch in with $25, $50, $100, or $500!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c88c73c625&e=44b8c466b0)_**

If we let ourselves become apathetic and not commit to doing the work, then the Democrats win.

_They made a bet that Republicans would not put in the work to prove that there is election fraud. And if we back down now they will be proven right._

**_And we cannot let that happen!_**

[We are up against a tight fundraising deadline. We are facing legal challenges left and right, we are having to fight back forces that want to silence us – manipulate us.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3bc5e11e0a&e=44b8c466b0)

**And to do that we need urgent funding. Every dollar that you give is a statement against the Radical Left that is hoping and praying that you do nothing.**

_The Left wins when the Right stays silent. And we MUST speak up. It is not just a duty to ourselves, it is a duty to our children, our grandchildren._

_I will never let that happen, as long as I’m breathing. Because I’m proud to be an American, and there are men and women who have died to protect our right to vote._

**I can at least dedicate my time and money. We have to. For ourselves, for our families, for America.**

[Will you help me reach our urgent fundraising deadline of $75,000 by the end of the month? I am still $55k short.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3879bb05c7&e=44b8c466b0)

[With your help we can fight back. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=50289641f0&e=44b8c466b0) With your voice, we can be heard. With your dollars we can finally fight back against the Corrupt Leftist Machine that has been running this state’s elections.

**Let’s take back our elections. Let’s take back Arizona.**
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7bd68ea990&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9e83889860&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. President Trump just endorsed my campaign. We must raise what is needed to defeat the corrupt Democrats. I have to raise $75k by the end of this month to meet my fundraising numbers. [Will you contribute $15, $35, $100 or more to help me get there?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3a5a145386&e=44b8c466b0) Every amount helps!

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=94f2ac9c96) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=94f2ac9c96).
---

name: Brian Hawkins
subject: How I’ll raise my black children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hawkins for Congress
body:
Democrats will do anything to stop parents like me from teaching their black children that they can think for themselves and that the American dream i Democrats will do anything to stop parents like me from teaching their black children that they can think for themselves and that the American dream is attainable. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5ed6d779216142709d16c6f64782b128&_e=2icK9FWtqekepQOFUILC6-e4m9Vfc_vuDRRRsR99VSB_ptMSrHckjJ1PjQEAr2Ab_9SIl-AeHxDHrEiv7xtC6DMRvyn5BtgvK7eBIHbxmA3gz5nnoteYB5TwLidf66MsFez7vmtiRISyoAxGiR32MTeM_zBGf-BnqjwpA8BXchhsBju0w0lBlQzztln3PilmQEmhCvqIxC4fSZ_EO8nIVB3OUHK4fkQ2Uo7Vg1MN2VMOLqMEQT_1m0nkr1nSgkasltOrcF0QycDDXIyYIIfjCeNeg8J0omCZwuCYpepN_qAAx9tOIJVH832YmBsEqqs0ikNtCI7NwfxaET5-SUgBeRfr9E_V2qyakQ4-Hs6LWLLX3Xl0FLAqMghRPpPUKiIOf-lsJLppNthoXP2fRphZiUF9M3hTs06AuQqS26hQSae5P3RZeCzVf7FIJKkegZAF77m8tcUkm0XN5dOeBvt7Ow%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

When a black parent has a child, they have a choice. They can either teach them that they are the descendants of slaves and will be systemically oppressed because of the color of their skin; OR, they can raise them with hope and help shape their dreams.

I refuse to raise my children constantly reminding them that their ancestors were slaves over a hundred years ago. **Instead, my children will grow up knowing that they’re from a line of lawyers, doctors and successful Americans whose drive and initiative took them far in life.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5ed6d779216142709d16c6f64782b128&_e=2icK9FWtqekepQOFUILC6-e4m9Vfc_vuDRRRsR99VSB_ptMSrHckjJ1PjQEAr2Ab_9SIl-AeHxDHrEiv7xtC6DMRvyn5BtgvK7eBIHbxmA3gz5nnoteYB5TwLidf66MsFez7vmtiRISyoAxGiR32MTeM_zBGf-BnqjwpA8BXchhsBju0w0lBlQzztln3PilmQEmhCvqIxC4fSZ_EO8nIVB3OUHK4fkQ2Uo7Vg1MN2VMOLqMEQT_1m0nkr1nSgkassTMfPrKEroEapLPYHe8a90V-8ufm15zJyEhDKm3bVVPVQafliTUX0WYrAEy0hrV5f1j8Kd6yxFpamF_4w-mzCGGFpqh8NtnmTctf7V9I2IL_oBqnLlmbAxezuIAE4mml7qHG2xvDtw0dlYpCIp9rk_d7ptFf0V_nFbgbB8JV7BDYbgsoWxRcbNAUtlU4P__h-6pJLnm1EPN2skiyVx9INA%3D%3D)
**But the Democrats will do anything to stop parents like me from teaching their black children that the American dream is attainable.**

**[That’s why I am running for Congress, to prove to my children and yours that black Americans are free: free to chase our dreams, to be the best parents we can be, to run for office and to above all else, think freely.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5ed6d779216142709d16c6f64782b128&_e=2icK9FWtqekepQOFUILC6-e4m9Vfc_vuDRRRsR99VSB_ptMSrHckjJ1PjQEAr2Ab_9SIl-AeHxDHrEiv7xtC6DMRvyn5BtgvK7eBIHbxmA3gz5nnoteYB5TwLidf66MsFez7vmtiRISyoAxGiR32MTeM_zBGf-BnqjwpA8BXchhsBju0w0lBlQzztln3PilmQEmhCvqIxC4fSZ_EO8nIVB3OUHK4fkQ2Uo7Vg1MN2VMOLqMEQT_1m0nkr1nSgkasB65J1oHXjE3WQyydSioluDMRMXAcj9aEb3VZzMODwUqVerxHKvTEAUOwcbjTtyREVK5libhwOWewNEKV15dBN-Qvbt9Y0E7_sAx4J3WF8ms9abMarlYfx4ad3HwYY-7Ti07m34PVlk1gQibtkznScLErWp5zaEbkq4PgYGexK6vR32_dP-C0-wBUFyLI1_8qZNjlPSnuxO-J1hY2jAySCg%3D%3D)**

**I will no longer allow the Democrats to control Black Americans like myself. The color of my skin does not make me a victim, nor does it bind me to one political party and their ideologies.**

**[That’s why I am running for Congress, to prove to my children and yours that black Americans are free: free to chase our dreams, to be the best parents we can be, to run for office and to above all else, think freely.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5ed6d779216142709d16c6f64782b128&_e=2icK9FWtqekepQOFUILC6-e4m9Vfc_vuDRRRsR99VSB_ptMSrHckjJ1PjQEAr2Ab_9SIl-AeHxDHrEiv7xtC6DMRvyn5BtgvK7eBIHbxmA3gz5nnoteYB5TwLidf66MsFez7vmtiRISyoAxGiR32MTeM_zBGf-BnqjwpA8BXchhsBju0w0lBlQzztln3PilmQEmhCvqIxC4fSZ_EO8nIVB3OUHK4fkQ2Uo7Vg1MN2VMOLqMEQT_1m0nkr1nSgkasrx-hlQZ1_ch_kWep3GxIQ5FC7k5AR1KgpY2UpvfrmcZZQJufC0plX5NCvxAiCDkd-2xYr60EeyBJRK0UkpC9ikcoURaCgvIdD2DUoRgwxR2sljeWdUuNT_XUFc2owClu64X-ESBaxMqt7XHg1GF3I0nK7KSLH13hx9DwuHH1yojRFE6R_gmUB6a8uCBBWd7XKNJkSu3s_vLNZOlpBhN5xg%3D%3D)**

[**ELECT A BLACK CONSERVATIVE
SUPPORT PASTOR BRIAN NOW -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5ed6d779216142709d16c6f64782b128&_e=2icK9FWtqekepQOFUILC6-e4m9Vfc_vuDRRRsR99VSB_ptMSrHckjJ1PjQEAr2Ab_9SIl-AeHxDHrEiv7xtC6DMRvyn5BtgvK7eBIHbxmA3gz5nnoteYB5TwLidf66MsFez7vmtiRISyoAxGiR32MTeM_zBGf-BnqjwpA8BXchhsBju0w0lBlQzztln3PilmQEmhCvqIxC4fSZ_EO8nIVB3OUHK4fkQ2Uo7Vg1MN2VMOLqMEQT_1m0nkr1nSgkass4vJVdR0U1CZeyp6Eul4S0_lfZjk7dJRWERuRTnrAf5g5MkAKLr7u0P0lTK-dOBrZVDJUhz0XFys74QundoQDZSsvZRxSvsOTO6n2vqep_VoeWl7t-kU8IjkJbhMEqPgZTcjenupY3VtQRaqxqm0Xb-1U_oYdkhkzoYO8Zden86xKXsbqWmcrTiuxFhB7A-AqtX_NbfUQDlSgdYPMS9fhQ%3D%3D)
We should be raising our children on hope and freedom. A child raised in fear will be an adult living in fear and this is what Democrat organizations, like Black Lives Matter want. They achieve control by instilling fear and negativity in our children, and even adults.

**If America doesn’t wake up and see that racist organizations peddled by Democrats, like BLM are a cancer in our society, I fear our coming generations of black children will remain enslaved to the Left’s agenda.**

**[Fellow Conservative, I need your help.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5ed6d779216142709d16c6f64782b128&_e=2icK9FWtqekepQOFUILC6-e4m9Vfc_vuDRRRsR99VSB_ptMSrHckjJ1PjQEAr2Ab_9SIl-AeHxDHrEiv7xtC6DMRvyn5BtgvK7eBIHbxmA3gz5nnoteYB5TwLidf66MsFez7vmtiRISyoAxGiR32MTeM_zBGf-BnqjwpA8BXchhsBju0w0lBlQzztln3PilmQEmhCvqIxC4fSZ_EO8nIVB3OUHK4fkQ2Uo7Vg1MN2VMOLqMEQT_1m0nkr1nSgkasqT6NGsl_fGOZW8pB0apObSJwSh1Lwy9lbAttXTtigQk0OUbeHpIRf72XxUwH8QEMtGrIiR0eSMzzHS9-5z8WnbHTURPfy3GfENqGoHr_IBhYLYtn-U0_6vOfrlPz5StQ_S3QCAkgckEWgmcbQoQLf39ijZuJ88_BbkbWNqNcW6atTbZq0Wx9OjV7m9KgjKxomhzHG0L1tWkfDrofLLSORw%3D%3D)** I don’t believe in handouts, but I don’t have the resources to reach Americans with my message, unlike the Democrats who are funded by dark-money dollars and Hollywood millionaires.

**[Can I count on you to chip in $5 or $10 right now to help me bring change to Washington? With your help, I can show our children that black Americans can think freely and do not have to fall victim to the Democrats’ control because of the color of their skin.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5ed6d779216142709d16c6f64782b128&_e=2icK9FWtqekepQOFUILC6-e4m9Vfc_vuDRRRsR99VSB_ptMSrHckjJ1PjQEAr2Ab_9SIl-AeHxDHrEiv7xtC6DMRvyn5BtgvK7eBIHbxmA3gz5nnoteYB5TwLidf66MsFez7vmtiRISyoAxGiR32MTeM_zBGf-BnqjwpA8BXchhsBju0w0lBlQzztln3PilmQEmhCvqIxC4fSZ_EO8nIVB3OUHK4fkQ2Uo7Vg1MN2VMOLqMEQT_1m0nkr1nSgkascMx-F0F3IorwjCbXV6KxgarmMn0UtfOul2GUfonGqfWIt1AjB-3zJy-Bbv236WAFLQhZNL0ymuKFA1FRIuPR3LjyUXjbUUM0CMI9B10kES6sN9yCaF4O_P8ttaxvYAcEFc5OA-xquvw8kKGfnP9lLJ3V7iD3q236WZcOQgIqxb2kDzPrZMowI3s5uDxmtf7fIUt5ifXOX5HvqyziJZsTBg%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Democrats will do anything to stop parents like me from teaching their black children that they can think for themselves and that the American dream i Democrats will do anything to stop parents like me from teaching their black children that they can think for themselves and that the American dream is attainable. | Fellow Conservative, When a black parent has a child, they have a choice. They can either teach them that they are the descendants of slaves and will be systemically oppressed because of the color of their skin; OR, they can raise them with hope and help shape their dreams. I refuse to raise my children constantly reminding them that their ancestors were slaves over a hundred years ago. Instead, my children will grow up knowing that they’re from a line of lawyers, doctors and successful Americans whose drive and initiative took them far in life. But the Democrats will do anything to stop parents like me from teaching their black children that the American dream is attainable. I will no longer allow the Democrats to control Black Americans like myself. The color of my skin does not make me a victim, nor does it bind me to one political party and their ideologies. We should be raising our children on hope and freedom. A child raised in fear will be an adult living in fear and this is what Democrat organizations, like Black Lives Matter want. They achieve control by instilling fear and negativity in our children, and even adults. If America doesn’t wake up and see that racist organizations peddled by Democrats, like BLM are a cancer in our society, I fear our coming generations of black children will remain enslaved to the Left’s agenda. I don’t believe in handouts, but I don’t have the resources to reach Americans with my message, unlike the Democrats who are funded by dark-money dollars and Hollywood millionaires. Thank you, Pastor Brian Hawkins Republican for Congress FOLLOW ME ON SOCIAL MEDIA @REALPASTORBRIAN | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Don't want to receive any more of our emails? | Paid for by Hawkins for Congress

name: Rep. Pat Fallon
subject: This is what tyranny looks like 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fallon for Congress
body:
[](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/-lE_NB7nom5LSpgC_byXfg~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRjL2ckP0UgNjVlOTM2ZDk1YTI0NTc3YWI0Zjk4NTU1MjJiY2E3M2JEQWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy9iaWRlbi10eXJhbm55LWNhdGNoVwVzcGNldUIKYUIk4kxhFmf5plIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAGBc~)
Peter,
Democrats want to control your life, period. This is not some exaggeration or fearmongering talking point, it’s a fact.
Now, Joe Biden made his most tyrannical move yet. Not only did he mandate that federal employees get vaccines, **he has now mandated that PRIVATE COMPANIES with more than 100 employees must require vaccinations** or test their employees weekly. **Joe Biden’s goal is to coerce all Americans into getting a vaccine through unconstitutional mandates and threats of unemployment.** **This is an assault on American values, plain and simple.**
Joe Biden and the radical Democrats think they know better than you. They also know that **YOU and all freedom loving Americans are the only thing that stands in the way of them turning our great nation into a backward, third world, socialist utopia**. That’s why they’re coming after your freedoms.
We, the people, cannot let that happen!
**We** **MUST take back Congress so that it no longer serves as a rubber stamp for Joe Biden’s far-left tyrannical regime.**
This is a FIGHT for the soul of our nation.
[**_Are you with me?_**](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/-lE_NB7nom5LSpgC_byXfg~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRjL2ckP0UgNjVlOTM2ZDk1YTI0NTc3YWI0Zjk4NTU1MjJiY2E3M2JEQWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy9iaWRlbi10eXJhbm55LWNhdGNoVwVzcGNldUIKYUIk4kxhFmf5plIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAGBc~)

God Bless America,
Pat Fallon
You received this email because you subscribed to our list. You can [unsubscribe](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/slOfB5oeZTlUdeVHOtaQJg~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRjL2ckP4QWAWh0dHBzOi8vYXJib3Jlc2NlbnMuZW9tYWlsNi5jb20vdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU_~) at any time.

PO BOX 614, CELINA, TX, 75009, United States of America

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | | The 2020 presidential election had turnout thanks to Vote by Mail! Lawmakers should be expanding voting rights right now... not rigging elections just to win seats. We should ALL be standing behind Vote by Mail efforts to help everyone reliably vote. | | | We really appreciate your response! \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. Peter,

The Democrat Majority is hanging by a thread. We only need five seats to take the gavel out of Nancy Pelosi's hands.

And Democrats in Sacramento have passed unprecedented legislation that makes every single Republican Congressional District in California, including mine, a target. None of our seats are safe.

We were able to fight them off in 2020 and narrowly win this seat, but that was only because we had the support of thousands of grassroots Conservatives like you.

[**That's why I'm counting on more than 1,500 Conservatives to step up with a small contribution of just $5 before our End-of-Week deadline on Friday.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a4980156ee804f3297420a927e16fe21&_e=pfiF7Sw8gcDPxIiK7VXYy2PLkdEevPSNT5gTp9Gh3uUWcGDowGT9VkvGmR2m7ET077t4_404dorr6_OhUxinoHSZ2EA5Uu7WWANkUM9jukcVSLcia26EQoek4pVokoYDODVSFjcDAQLA5IwzkA2383ddzLRkMgQyVVED7CPeVXhR6qezA7VG9mHbgEpX_glMsKPcz-Opf8uGQ7i0KRM9w8LmvObj00ItCNvJBETCoIcEXt6UxnLnrrFgbFeQI2SI4kP29rXmqPsQ5vH0p3ka6PpBR5LT9y1V65SWN_JPLe-dlMGeY-QIYwjKVFvpxVVmAfNqzXhJDtmcDGmcvWWzUDSQdF8ALFwSUXZahTGFAAGpKFZ5T4aMH46kvgFWvAIR2FjrhUzGjtOlZyV6uzyFe4iFxQGlT68ThDmE8EUTJOQ%3D)

name: Team Kaptur
subject: Kaptur delivers restored funding for senior citizens
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress
body:
Marcy recently helped to deliver a grant for Toledo’s Collingwood Green senior housing project. |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux6fGVdUZik_q8OF09GsAUQ4r16qbN2A6XEIXzbQZqTVr2La3cvzaVEIuWkQsUu2qwj3GlvLLQJUHTyUXAKGeqxZgaQNC2KrNOGLBwpR43dFAtsDDplsRKPWD0Th9x4bfQqcnIaz7YEmsLdnoOr13Lhhv8qxwgxSzZhSr5_KeK0xcp25rAAj8FdxmcTAM2rNLSjedoyxcHZHnyTYp7ECU2MidSbB4tyADx94McdKzaUK8f3l8tNTMLhMVnrPWxxTur5_XCYCcafOj9gJTjCKIsbD5mWZSsjM9e5mXpAeNp_HUAnleyKk7LCWVZGkPrNogfEhvqQIKXHnAggsFIQJfIb_vdYj3aK3Sh7TanXUQkAcdLU6kt7aCXm1FAEMNNZexby4mVk-n9oMAAetE978kyaOjMmy4PGBnH9KLWDbKAzEm/3fk/Cdf2p_j6R72ewJK7xx1Iaw/h0/OCHecnet1YSbtw8JeeBNwmGkfh5ejnby1gS8Fd22sIw)

| | Team,

As many of our nation’s elderly face growing challenges accessing safe and affordable housing, Marcy is doing her part to ensure that their rights are protected and housing needs are met.

**Marcy recently helped to deliver a grant for Toledo’s Collingwood Green senior housing project** \-- securing $5.9 million in funding to aid the creation of 30 low-cost housing units for income-eligible seniors.

This important senior housing initiative went **abandoned for a decade after Republicans defunded it and failed to show support for aging residents.**

**We****owe it to our seniors to provide them with the dignity, care, and respect they deserve.** Marcy Kaptur is fighting to lift up our aging residents and provide them with affordable housing opportunities.

[**Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur has dedicated her life to fighting for the residents of the Heartland. A community champion, she exemplifies the spirit of service that our nation so desperately needs. Can you donate $20 right now to help re-elect a true advocate for the people?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCEkdHNItV39y3s-lvKgkMA4wdHHN35CFRCbAMDF5yZdLFlqmtyf_jtqj-bA0azI-rRFo0RRVqZRiJbhQ4HpBRFP6WhjquVsj419qu9YO_WwgGeGvC8uU_CJ4jEaF-1XepO2EWFNdauT3vwnLoxJfamT2pX5Rn-m1IRGjyygTHt-w6h61grI3kfosxAtHRhpAJ449aOo_ixlxnyWLfTbLjFcBhlyGuNB8VTNEISD3vpTAIcew_LC1LnI_126Rrm7ddA7VAgzT775YJHt71segvglqn2nrmY_SpIC-wL6IF79krkOm1_AuYpIovdqo4OM5qHjcjDaJNES9hwgMTCFD9TSLe_YW3Lx5LrL4GIXDjSLQmT0MpvggKyaCYuxhsCUgwY1bV5TP-kfjlZhfC7yx1Xqce5UVRgdPI0i2yhyu5RufJaHSDBtR8PO7VyTlKfDyk_mt93zMOYJSvv6GM3oG7eQ/3fk/Cdf2p_j6R72ewJK7xx1Iaw/h1/VttnTPFI0KxfiwkTH-Wka3dJ2r_oU1wW3ET6fpbLY8M)

name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
subject: Tony Evers joins Biden’s border ignorance
body:
Evers ignores over 1.2 million border apprehensions since Biden took office.

| [ ](https://wisgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_evers_border_v3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Dear Friend -- Wanted to make sure you saw our most recent [**press release**](https://wisgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0YPECrlU_jdAYjVZtHKfItEaW_P7NSHSpP1nvDJwxj_kuScUXd7koPfCUzyAdNx2u9AAs1fDMxUSlqslUCizHwlNiKGhABzfbnASCaBQRM34hCvSP2hf1TbHygaz1srHVg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_evers_border_v3&n=2) on Biden’s border failures. As the border crisis rages on, Joe Biden and “Border Tsar” Kamala Harris are pretending that it doesn’t exist -- despite the fact that local officials, [**Democrat and Republican alike**](https://wisgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TiV2ExMvy-B9xlTsmD5RGJpfuX6Lp5QJ-UmhNBbJkYCJod-rKzMjGYUkkkau_4n8mA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_evers_border_v3&n=3) , are pleading for help. Unfortunately, Tony Evers has joined Joe Biden in choosing to ignore the crisis that has resulted in over 1.2 million border apprehensions since Biden took office. **This week, over half of state governors signed a**[**letter**](https://wisgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=954wJVfXJnGDSMt_j90vIsrjhRXLT-nmcgjtW0sV48_z5VjDUb-NA9t0t7ATyryBo5ubPWNHIIeX2hYtPiB95TY5OXzj8Z7ouztKyaJynvsiX0T4fBB4-dWX4wUjMR4e5mubVBD4vYTT873udan9UuKKDbEQcDDApqBKQ-db0oA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_evers_border_v3&n=4)**calling on Joe Biden to wake up and address the crisis at our southern border.** Unsurprisingly, Tony Evers’ name was not included — just the latest event in his long string of public safety failures as governor. Last spring, Wisconsin state legislators witnessed the border disaster firsthand and begged Evers to help — but Evers, who also pulled Wisconsin’s National Guard troops from the southern border in 2019, declined. Crime is spiking, deadly drugs are pouring in, and COVID-positive illegal immigrants are flooding American communities, but just like in Kenosha, Evers is rejecting public safety in favor of appeasing the far-left and putting his head in the sand. **Dozens of state governors are stepping up to address the historic border crisis, but Tony Evers would rather cower to DC Democrats and do nothing. Unfortunately, since last year’s riots in Kenosha, Wisconsinites know that Tony Evers only governs to protect the woke mob, not Wisconsin families.** The WisGOP is joining Republicans in Wisconsin and across the country in calling out Joe Biden and Tony Evers for their public safety failures. If you would like to volunteer to help us send Evers packing in 2022, click [**here**](https://wisgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0eXv_5DaexUSZI9PlfXgIO8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_evers_border_v3&n=5). If you cannot volunteer, but would like to contribute financially to find our efforts, click [**here**](https://wisgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVnO0xNCr_rHz6A_Mk77ASMRw6Z9hR2NB71BLee1hczak&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_evers_border_v3&n=6). Thanks, Team WisGOP
[](https://wisgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVbYrz-EeNP5EokvSW_Ho-OC0WutYVac_I1HhR9pqIAsU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_evers_border_v3&n=7 "CONTRIBUTE") [CONTRIBUTE](https://wisgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVbYrz-EeNP5EokvSW_Ho-OC0WutYVac_I1HhR9pqIAsU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_evers_border_v3&n=7)
|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States
This email was sent to [Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com](mailto:Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://wisgop.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_evers_border_v3&n=8).
You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://wisgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_evers_border_v3&n=9) or [Facebook](https://wisgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_evers_border_v3&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://wisgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_evers_border_v3&n=11), software for leaders.

name: John Fetterman
subject: Can we put a sign in your yard?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Before our biggest deadline yet, we’re giving out yard signs to those who donate $10 or more.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210923-2746-header&t=1&akid=2746%2E434096%2EVfQWit)
Peter,
We're just about a week away from the *biggest* deadline we've faced yet. On September 30, we're legally required to close the books on our fundraising for the quarter and publish our results to the FEC.
I talked to my team and I was like... _how do we go all out ahead of this big milestone for the campaign?_ What can we do to get more people in the door? Well, that's where the yard signs come in.
**Since we're up against a *big* end-of-quarter FEC deadline, we are going to pack and ship a beautiful, union-printed yard sign directly to your house for ANY donation on this page above $10. _And as a bonus, Gisele and I have planned to hand deliver a few of them within the Commonwealth._**
**[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30248?refcode=em20210923-2746&t=2&akid=2746%2E434096%2EVfQWit)**
[**_Donate $10 (or more than that if you can to help us get more signs out there). Get a sign in the mail as a token of our deep appreciation for your belief in flipping PA blue. It's that simple — just add your contribution now before our big deadline._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30248?refcode=em20210923-2746&t=3&akid=2746%2E434096%2EVfQWit)
**[Get Your Yard Sign →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30248?refcode=em20210923-2746&t=4&akid=2746%2E434096%2EVfQWit)**
The numbers in our upcoming Q3 FEC report are going to make waves.
Reporters will write stories saying either "whoa look at that momentum" or "yikes that's not good for John Fetterman." Our opponents on the Republican side are going to be energized if we post numbers that are too low.
So, yeah, I'm sweating a bit. 😅 This public report is a big deal, and it's important for us to raise as much money as humanly possible in this final week.
**That's why, if yinz live in Pennsylvania, Gisele and I are going to be hand delivering as many of these signs to yards as possible in the coming weeks. So, pop a donation in before our big deadline and you might just get a visit from the two of us.**
Look, whether you can give $10 or $20 or $50, I'm so deeply grateful for your support as we fight to flip this seat. What will always be most important to me is our strength in numbers: **How many people are getting our signs out in their yards. How many people are donating to make this the strongest campaign in the country. 💪**
[**_So, if you can, chip in $10 or more through this link to get an official Team Fetterman yard sign. I'd be honored to have you display one proudly in your yard, window, or really anywhere you want._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30248?refcode=em20210923-2746&t=5&akid=2746%2E434096%2EVfQWit)
**[Get Your Yard Sign →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30248?refcode=em20210923-2746&t=6&akid=2746%2E434096%2EVfQWit)**
I'm honored to be in this with you, Peter.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210923-2746-footer&t=7&refcode2=2746_434096_VfQWit&akid=2746%2E434096%2EVfQWit)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=8&akid=2746%2E434096%2EVfQWit)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=2746%2E434096%2EVfQWit)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Friend,
**The Leftists are trying to jam a $3,500,000,000,000 Socialist spending bill through Congress.** This poses one of the greatest dangers to America and our economy! When Government grows, Liberty shrinks.
This spending bill will result in higher prices for everyday necessities, massive job cuts for workers, and even higher prices for gas and milk! Our great-grandchildren tomorrow will be paying for Government today, and the Radical Left keep stealing from Americans through Inflation, robbing the value of your retirement, savings account, or estate.
This bill is loaded with outrageous provisions that will harm America:

* Provide green cards to millions of illegal immigrants
* Tax Americans per mile they drive
* Give an unknown amount of money to help fight climate change
* Spend Millions on renewable energy, destroying our oil industry
* Higher corporate taxes than Communist China

We need Kelly to fight for us and fiscal conservatism. Remember she is America First. Always.

clean_body: | | | | The figure will shock you Friend, The Leftists are trying to jam a $3,500,000,000,000 Socialist spending bill through Congress. This poses one of the greatest dangers to America and our economy! When Government grows, Liberty shrinks. This spending bill will result in higher prices for everyday necessities, massive job cuts for workers, and even higher prices for gas and milk! Our great-grandchildren tomorrow will be paying for Government today, and the Radical Left keep stealing from Americans through Inflation, robbing the value of your retirement, savings account, or estate. This bill is loaded with outrageous provisions that will harm America: Provide green cards to millions of illegal immigrants Tax Americans per mile they drive Give an unknown amount of money to help fight climate change Spend Millions on renewable energy, destroying our oil industry * Higher corporate taxes than Communist China We need Kelly to fight for us and fiscal conservatism. Remember she is America First. Always. We need Kelly to expose the waste, fraud, and abuse that goes on in Washington. Thanks, Team Kelly | | | | =

name: Protecting Every Future
subject: We still need your help!
body:

name: Tim Scott
subject: token…trying to get away with murder…a clown
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Democrats care more about attacking me than making real progress.

|
---
| | | Peter,

First: A Democrat Senator called my criminal justice reform bill nothing but a **" token"** effort and a **" half-hearted approach".**

Then: Nancy Pelosi said that Republicans are **" trying to get away with murder, actually -- the murder of George Floyd".**

Now: After Democrats filibustered my bill and refused to continue negotiating, they are calling me a **" clown".**

_As the only African American Republican Senator, I have been leading efforts for years to find solutions to the issues impacting police and communities of color all across our country._

Democrats are more interested in scoring political points and getting soundbites on CNN or MSNBC. **_They care more about the next election than making real progress towards criminal justice reforms._**

We can't let them get away with it.

clean_body: Democrats care more about attacking me than making real progress. | | | | Peter, First: A Democrat Senator called my criminal justice reform bill nothing but a " token" effort and a " half-hearted approach". Then: Nancy Pelosi said that Republicans are " trying to get away with murder, actually -- the murder of George Floyd". Now: After Democrats filibustered my bill and refused to continue negotiating, they are calling me a " clown". As the only African American Republican Senator, I have been leading efforts for years to find solutions to the issues impacting police and communities of color all across our country. Democrats are more interested in scoring political points and getting soundbites on CNN or MSNBC. They care more about the next election than making real progress towards criminal justice reforms. We can't let them get away with it. | | | "Stand with Me" "Will you join me and fight back against these hurtful and divisive remarks?" "Chip in whatever you can afford to send a strong message that we won’t tolerate these insults." The last several months have made it clear that most Democrats don't really care about reforms--they only care about scoring political points and winning the next election. It's shameful and we need to fight back. -Tim | | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD CHARLESTON, SC 29407 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

Thank you, Jim Banks Chairman, House Conservatives Fund Founded in 1997, the House Conservatives Fund (HCF) has been the political arm of the Republican Study Committee (RSC), the largest caucus of conservatives in Congress. For more than two decades, HCF has been pursuing its mission of electing and retaining members who are committed to our core conservative principles. HCF’s current roster of 140 members understands that our mission has never been more urgent than it is today. House Conservatives Fund . PAID FOR BY HOUSE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE. www.houseconservatives.com

Dumasis running for Pennsylvania Commonwealth Court to ensure that fairness and equity are rendered with the court’s verdicts. Pennsylvania is home to 12.8 million residents. Commonwealth Court is a court that will render justice for all PA residents, not just the privileged few. The Commonwealth Court of PA is the only court in the country to rule in favor of Donald Trump’s ridiculous claims of voter fraud in 2020. The balance of justice lies in the outcome of this race. We have a chance to add some equity and balance to an unbalanced system.. Will you send a message that Judge Lori A. Dumas should be elected Judge of the PA Commonwealth Court? | | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.princessblanding.com/so/ebNmKZgny/c?w=L5k0bNb1CfiXhCFJA1n9x6viOPnvU07qGvPqyyISy10.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucHJpbmNlc3NibGFuZGluZy5jb20vc28vZWJObUtaZ255P2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiOWE1MWU4YTctNmRjMy00OTczLTliODctMGMwYjhmYWE2NTZiIn0)_**

| | This Election is Ours TO Claim! [Repost]
---
| | Hey there, Friends and Supporters! As many of you know, we’re facing a real David vs. Goliath situation. The two-party system didn't want me on the ballot and they are making sure I am shut out from upcoming debates, from the news cycle, you name it. Disenfranchisement is nothing new, it’s how the political machine keeps purring. Know this: We might be shut out, but we aren’t shutting down. We're doubling down and will not stop connecting to real, everyday Virginians who know we can and must do better. The truth is, our campaign will always be out-earned by millions of special interest dollars driving the well-oiled Democrat and Republican machines. I’ve pledged to never take corporate money, which means we run on people power. You’ll see the other candidates use the term “grassroots,” to describe their fundraising efforts, but a multi-million dollar campaign has nothing to do with collective action and everything to do with power and privilege:
* As of June 30, Terry McAuliffe had raised just over $20 million and Glenn Youngkin was at $19 million--$7 million of which is his own money. (Source: [VPAP ](https://www.princessblanding.com/so/ebNmKZgny/c?w=yEu9t_8A9pho1kRNplV21_3z1pR0CPsVLKnxzcyvegE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudnBhcC5vcmcvb2ZmaWNlcy9nb3Zlcm5vci9lbGVjdGlvbnMvP3llYXJfYW5kX3R5cGU9MjAyMXJlZ3VsYXIiLCJyIjoiZTBmYmFiM2ItMDgyMC00ZDE2LTg1NmMtMWEwZWQxYjc4Y2ZhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiOWE1MWU4YTctNmRjMy00OTczLTliODctMGMwYjhmYWE2NTZiIn0)[2021 Election Overview](https://www.princessblanding.com/so/ebNmKZgny/c?w=yEu9t_8A9pho1kRNplV21_3z1pR0CPsVLKnxzcyvegE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudnBhcC5vcmcvb2ZmaWNlcy9nb3Zlcm5vci9lbGVjdGlvbnMvP3llYXJfYW5kX3R5cGU9MjAyMXJlZ3VsYXIiLCJyIjoiZTBmYmFiM2ItMDgyMC00ZDE2LTg1NmMtMWEwZWQxYjc4Y2ZhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiOWE1MWU4YTctNmRjMy00OTczLTliODctMGMwYjhmYWE2NTZiIn0))

* As of August, Virginia gubernatorial candidates have spent more than $28 million combined so far on this year’s election. (Source: [Ballotopedia News](https://www.princessblanding.com/so/ebNmKZgny/c?w=R-6aE1DVdU2e7ZzcviUVbyToQfQKSxMd4ta7l1FHCZo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZXdzLmJhbGxvdHBlZGlhLm9yZy8yMDIxLzA4LzA2L3RoZS1jYW1wYWlnbi1pbi12aXJnaW5pYXMtZ292ZXJub3JzLXJhY2UvIiwiciI6ImUwZmJhYjNiLTA4MjAtNGQxNi04NTZjLTFhMGVkMWI3OGNmYSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjlhNTFlOGE3LTZkYzMtNDk3My05Yjg3LTBjMGI4ZmFhNjU2YiJ9))

Let that sink in for a minute. Money is driving this race, but pay-to-play politics is a fundraising game that doesn’t translate to Virginians who are struggling with unemployment, evictions, and rising healthcare costs. I've earned the right to be on your ballot and now I need your help to make my candidacy a reality.
---
| | | [**Donate Today!**](https://www.princessblanding.com/so/ebNmKZgny/c?w=cSFV6w5lvsqdnaWEPehQNkWnoJ9FHXelsotOcjvEV-E.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucHJpbmNlc3NibGFuZGluZy5jb20vIiwiciI6IjA4OTBjMmM2LTJkMmEtNGZjYS05YmYwLTEzOTFjOTFhNjE1YyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjlhNTFlOGE3LTZkYzMtNDk3My05Yjg3LTBjMGI4ZmFhNjU2YiJ9)
---
| | Know that when our campaign asks for donations, the money goes directly to spreading the word--buying signs and billboards, building a small ad campaign, paying our staff. We aren’t wining and dining friends, or spending absurd amounts on travel, consultants, polls and attack ads. I just want to do what I did to get on the ballot which is get out to meet you, the people, and to let you know there is a better option for the next Governor of Virginia, someone who believes in enacting real policies and change for real people. Thank you for your support,Princess Liberation is a human right, not a privilege
---

name: Katie Porter momsquad
subject: Tough Call
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director

clean_body: [ Peter, Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter? Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right? She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat. Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat. Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [] In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign. None of this work would be possible without you. With gratitude, Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office #teamkatie [] DONATE [ [] [] [] Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: What I told President Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I wanted to send you a note about my meeting with President Biden.
#
Peter,
I was at the White House last night to meet with President Biden about his visionary Build Back Better agenda. It was a constructive conversation, all focused on delivering long-overdue investments in climate action, paid leave, universal child care, pre-K, housing, health care, infrastructure, and more.
**I reiterated that progressives will proudly support the President’s entire Build Back Better agenda, but only after we finally pass the bold economic relief and climate action portions of the plan. We will NOT leave those pieces behind.**
The ENTIRE package is what President Biden wants, it’s what Democrats want, and it’s what we promised voters when they delivered us the House, the Senate, and the White House.
We are at a crucial tipping point in this fight, Peter. Conservative Democrats are pushing to pass portions of our agenda WITHOUT the economic relief and climate change measures progressives are demanding. That means without child care, paid leave, health care, education, and housing. We won’t allow it.
[**I will continue fighting to deliver for the people — no matter what conservatives, Big Pharma, and corporate America do to try and stop progressive change. If you stand with me at this pivotal moment, can you chip in $3 to fuel my work to pass this bill and deliver on our promises to the people?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/6636?refcode=em20210923-660&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=660%2E420207%2ESHktqM)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/6636?refcode=em20210923-660&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=660%2E420207%2ESHktqM)**
It’s important that I had the opportunity to meet with President Biden along with Senator Bernie Sanders and some of my other progressive colleagues.
Corporate America and Big Pharma are having their say through massive campaign contributions and spending on lobbying. But we’re making our voices heard too, and I’m ready to lead progressives to win the FULL Build Back Better agenda.
This is the biggest fight during the Biden presidency between the people and the corporations. They don’t want to see their taxes go up or their fossil fuel profits threatened by much needed change. The people are demanding a better country, and I’ll always fight on the side of the people.
[**If you’re with me in the fight to secure economic relief and climate action in the Build Back Better Act, can you chip in $3 or whatever you can afford to our campaign today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/6636?refcode=em20210923-660&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=660%2E420207%2ESHktqM)
In solidarity,
Pramila
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/6636?refcode=em20210923-660&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=660%2E420207%2ESHktqM)**

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210923-660-footer&t=24&refcode2=660_420207_SHktqM&akid=660%2E420207%2ESHktqM)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=25&akid=660%2E420207%2ESHktqM)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=660%2E420207%2ESHktqM)
