subject: Help me secure elections in Virginia!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Leon Benjamin for Congress
body:
Join me and Wendy Rogers Dear Patriot, **My name is Leon Benjamin. I 'm the America-First conservative leading the fight for election integrity here in Virginia! I'm running for Congress in the 4th District against Donald McEachin, one of the illegitimate Socialist Democrat stooges in office right now. **
I saw firsthand how important election integrity in 2020 when voter fraud marred my own election-- **and the Democrats controlling the election covered it up. **
But, more on that later.
That's why I'm leading the fight to make sure our elections are secure. If we don't secure our elections, NOTHING else matters.
I'm stopping the Steal from Ever happening again. That's why I'm teaming up with State Senator Wendy Rodgers, who is leading the Maricopa forensic audit. That audit has shown a breathtaking amount of voter fraud and PROVED Joe Biden stole the 2020 election.
We need a forensic audit like Arizona's in every single state in America. And if elected to Congress, that's exactly what I'm going to do! [ **Will you help me audit the 2020 election?** ](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=7bb23d7e92&e=3cd8121505)
[ ***AUDIT THE ELECTION!* **](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=eaef765149&e=3cd8121505)
Wendy and I joined a townhall on election integrity with some conservative leaders across the country.
**We 're leading the fight for an audit of all 50 states! Joe Biden and the Democratic party CANNOT get away with stealing the 2020 election. ** We're not letting them.
Have you seen the huge bombshells coming out of the Maricopa Audit?
The amount of voter fraud they've uncovered in just a few months of digging is truly breathtaking.
**So far, they 've counted 173,104 suspicious votes. And counting... **
An independent study published an executive summary detailing their findings so far: Can you imagine what we would find if we audited Virginia?
Michigan?
Wisconsin?
**A nationwide forensic audit is necessary to get to the truth of 2020 --the very truth the Fake News media and Democratic-controlled swamp desperately wants to cover up. **
My opponent Don McEachin is a fraud covering up the 2020 result. [ **It 's time to replace him with a conservative leader who will fight to secure our elections nationwide! Will you help by donating today? **](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=18a2c32b91&e=3cd8121505) [ **Donate $25!** ](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=6b9be7c74e&e=3cd8121505) [ **Donate $50!** ](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=672daabea8&e=3cd8121505) [ **Donate $75!** ](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=967ebe181d&e=3cd8121505) [ **Donate $100!** ](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=9321a332d2&e=3cd8121505) [ **Donate $250!** ](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=c0a2acc2cc&e=3cd8121505) [ **Donate $500!** ](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=4a97336722&e=3cd8121505) [ **Donate $1,000!** ](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=1adcc97078&e=3cd8121505) We went to bed winning this election handily in a shocking upset no one predicted--thanks to the help from thousands of conservatives like you! What we have done in this election is historic!
These were the results when I went to bed at 2am: That's what the election looked like.
**Suddenly, the following morning, they "found" tens of thousands of Democrat votes! To make matters worse, thousands of conservatives have reported by denied the opportunity to vote as they'd been falsely recorded as turning in absentee ballots! **
That's why we MUST secure our elections. A nationwide audit would get to the bottom of elections like mine and show just how rampant voter fraud is.
We must stop the steal from ever happening again! [ **Will you help me by donating $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or more today?**](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=c9b77c80c7&e=3cd8121505)
Thank you for all of your support! God Bless,
Leon Benjamin
Republican for Congress, VA-04
Black Conservative Pastor
Navy Combat Veteran
Husband and Father
Patriot [ **Donate Now** ](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=6be3a0e97e&e=3cd8121505) Paid for and Authorized by Leon Benjamin for Congress

So far, they 've counted 173,104 suspicious votes. And counting... An independent study published an executive summary detailing their findings so far: Can you imagine what we would find if we audited Virginia? Michigan? Wisconsin? A nationwide forensic audit is necessary to get to the truth of 2020 --the very truth the Fake News media and Democratic-controlled swamp desperately wants to cover up. My opponent Don McEachin is a fraud covering up the 2020 result. We went to bed winning this election handily in a shocking upset no one predicted--thanks to the help from thousands of conservatives like you! What we have done in this election is historic! These were the results when I went to bed at 2am: That's what the election looked like. Suddenly, the following morning, they "found" tens of thousands of Democrat votes! To make matters worse, thousands of conservatives have reported by denied the opportunity to vote as they'd been falsely recorded as turning in absentee ballots! That's why we MUST secure our elections. A nationwide audit would get to the bottom of elections like mine and show just how rampant voter fraud is. We must stop the steal from ever happening again! Thank you for all of your support! God Bless, Leon Benjamin Republican for Congress, VA-04 Black Conservative Pastor Navy Combat Veteran Husband and Father Patriot Paid for and Authorized by Leon Benjamin for Congress | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Friends of Leon Benjamin, Inc. 7330 Staples Mill Road Box 100 Richmond, Virginia 23228-4122 USA

clean_body: It’s the truth... | Authorized by Elect Republicans HQ Peter, Sorry to be the one to tell you this, but we’re WAY BEHIND on our fundraising goal. We only have DAYS LEFT until our FEC-Mandate End-Of-Quarter Deadline, and we’re still dangerously behind. If we don’t meet our goal, Tim Scott could lose his must-win Senate race! Democrats are already way ahead in fundraising, and we need to raise another $7,564 by September 30 to have any chance at closing the gap. Can you help? Photo Credit: Tim Scott for Senate | | | | | | Every dollar you give will go directly towards critical online advertising and other voter outreach activities that will help elect Tim Scott and reclaim the Republican Majority. | Thank you. Tim Scott Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

I’ll make this quick,

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez is the **BIGGEST** hypocrite...which makes sense because SOCIALISTS like her always are.

Socialists say “Tax the Rich”, and then they are the ones that end up living like **KINGS** and **QUEENS**.

We have seen this in Venezuela... We have seen this in Cuba...and last week we saw it in Manhattan.

AOC enjoys the luxury of going to the Met Gala, which is $30,000 PER TICKET. She enjoys the fruits of capitalism while demonizing the American worker and the businesses that hire them. **AOC is a con-woman and a socialist prototype who has been indoctrinated to believe these radical ideologies.**

She wants to destroy everything that makes this country great, so that people are dependent on her and the government.

body:
Block parties, breakfasts, and issue forums coming up... | | | |
---
| | |
## Invitation for : Meet Rep. Allison Russo
---
| [RSVP TO JOIN ALLISON THIS WEEKEND](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=f9f4f3e065&e=400a181d5a "RSVP TO JOIN ALLISON THIS WEEKEND")
---
| Allison will be traveling across the district this weekend talking with voters about the issues directly impacting local communities, and she would love to see you there, . **Can you bring a friend to meet Allison this week?**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=7554990778&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Pickerington Block Party, ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=4f5e16e3ba&e=400a181d5a)[Saturday at 11:30am](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=c8df510dd5&e=400a181d5a)
Join Allison Russo and local Pickerington candidates for City Council and School Board at our fall block party! We'll be registering our new neighbors to vote and hanging out with free food, music, and fun for the whole family! RSVP and bring some friends!
|
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=639b3c9fea&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [SEO Labor Breakfast with Allison](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=38bcf6e7a8&e=400a181d5a)
Calling all union members! The SEO Central Labor Council is hosting a breakfast with Allison this Sunday at 10:30am. Talk with Allison about building an economy that works for all of us over coffee and breakfast!
|
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=04c11969e9&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Bobcats Meet & Greet on Campus, Sunday at 1pm](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=047dfc59bd&e=400a181d5a)
Join OU Dems and Allison for lunch and conversation with OU students on campus. There will be pizza on the college green at 1PM!
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=7e1f4c90e7&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Veterans Roundtable in Grove City](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=76f2868a17&e=400a181d5a)[, Monday at 6pm](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=4573c2cc98&e=400a181d5a)
Join State Rep. Allison Russo, the ODP Veterans Caucus, and fellow veterans for a conversation on issues impacting veterans and military families in central Ohio. Panel discussion with Q&A to follow.
| [SEE ALL UPCOMING EVENTS](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=6944c87018&e=400a181d5a "SEE ALL UPCOMING EVENTS")

name: Brian Hawkins
subject: I will not raise my black children in fear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hawkins for Congress
body:
Democrats will do anything to stop parents like me from teaching their black children that they can think for themselves and that the American dream i Democrats will do anything to stop parents like me from teaching their black children that they can think for themselves and that the American dream is attainable. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7c3de2fed39940b2adeb52ef41dd4f6f&_e=-VgdX05A3VMfiAKBPxh4VyCvrwvd-uICmr49KBcPqYJEsEcYoJ8IiH_12OQRzxIc3dPGCVizgeysY9e_p2jsM-buvrDGzP88hMA-0uvcHz1tlbPzDXmNSBxcL0uFUU4ere2R9Ia1z5qLjuQpmcBlt8xHoULcxxxlcDLFKFHUB5SNa_W-KIb5AYphMgaSM-w70Af4DDki1y9l1Q1Qf3tG_Y3Myt0dnKZc99KygRu7awC1PGym7B0HiFOnYzo-GHF5Z9vclu6FLzYoxr5zu_E4YsDoU906dl671unCM6y4hWl0NV5TaiwCrGYvTaiEXqJTctOKn1lg74xHntc13s9vaxPK-5ys-UapuH2uDsEsZsKhlUzib6HGWjLfAib6qnUmfaqG8-g-B9HeIpKq4zA4e3ZWpym88MGjA-u3je3pxSk8v4d9PcEUs7-pDPWxrnCUlasU7-a9KdeRSjldTHJrNgmZJmoCjQ-JhREV-f2HLDM%3D)
---
Peter,

When a black parent has a child, they have a choice. They can either teach them that they are the descendants of slaves and will be systemically oppressed because of the color of their skin; OR, they can raise them with hope and help shape their dreams.

I refuse to raise my children constantly reminding them that their ancestors were slaves over a hundred years ago. **Instead, my children will grow up knowing that they’re from a line of lawyers, doctors and successful Americans whose drive and initiative took them far in life.**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7c3de2fed39940b2adeb52ef41dd4f6f&_e=-VgdX05A3VMfiAKBPxh4VyCvrwvd-uICmr49KBcPqYJEsEcYoJ8IiH_12OQRzxIc3dPGCVizgeysY9e_p2jsM-buvrDGzP88hMA-0uvcHz1tlbPzDXmNSBxcL0uFUU4ere2R9Ia1z5qLjuQpmcBlt8xHoULcxxxlcDLFKFHUB5SNa_W-KIb5AYphMgaSM-w70Af4DDki1y9l1Q1Qf3tG_Y3Myt0dnKZc99KygRu7awC1PGym7B0HiFOnYzo-GHF5ndGOiMe6DsAbOqMudaKCIUuXz7cwshnOXPtvKQQoI1UQKx0TArRI3_hJYG4uKuh9U_r4joqFVOIW-bQWtexh2B5SVbw-V2JwJGcJhhmnRe4oBwydS0tLPLUSwVnZ2JHbiztAoJ8EMJq72_2iHcchrq2RobmMhoFpO8yRJg4yiprfvva5XDIB0nGGFuOG5XtYCgFZpgs486Y5cXZNN5SRHU9k2Kq4OXfBt7iYNbCUPQg%3D)
**But the Democrats will do anything to stop parents like me from teaching their black children that the American dream is attainable.**

**[That’s why I am running for Congress, to prove to my children and yours that black Americans are free: free to chase our dreams, to be the best parents we can be, to run for office and to above all else, think freely.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7c3de2fed39940b2adeb52ef41dd4f6f&_e=-VgdX05A3VMfiAKBPxh4VyCvrwvd-uICmr49KBcPqYJEsEcYoJ8IiH_12OQRzxIc3dPGCVizgeysY9e_p2jsM-buvrDGzP88hMA-0uvcHz1tlbPzDXmNSBxcL0uFUU4ere2R9Ia1z5qLjuQpmcBlt8xHoULcxxxlcDLFKFHUB5SNa_W-KIb5AYphMgaSM-w70Af4DDki1y9l1Q1Qf3tG_Y3Myt0dnKZc99KygRu7awC1PGym7B0HiFOnYzo-GHF5aIuLXECpdCGnorJkq43OGEc_uNLuQUV0znNv1-tuIRGnapBFq8x_JZQ0sI6kzzosgG7hlFJbNuwPOVpxARxSN42wJpHHYL31uO-nPyLOhCxY7Z3T5trbGKu9Ch8XqZZorPsyqfv2GnsqBVtqIj5otzPxhTp_UW8gWWP6sl5ebxxCxlQMSvMdEnKF5ZmaRHn4bdLw8IJ8r_2FTvcM-s0G2PmMKy1Eiiqcy_OX1R-Yqo8%3D)**

**I will no longer allow the Democrats to control Black Americans like myself. The color of my skin does not make me a victim, nor does it bind me to one political party and their ideologies.**

**[That’s why I am running for Congress, to prove to my children and yours that black Americans are free: free to chase our dreams, to be the best parents we can be, to run for office and to above all else, think freely.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7c3de2fed39940b2adeb52ef41dd4f6f&_e=-VgdX05A3VMfiAKBPxh4VyCvrwvd-uICmr49KBcPqYJEsEcYoJ8IiH_12OQRzxIc3dPGCVizgeysY9e_p2jsM-buvrDGzP88hMA-0uvcHz1tlbPzDXmNSBxcL0uFUU4ere2R9Ia1z5qLjuQpmcBlt8xHoULcxxxlcDLFKFHUB5SNa_W-KIb5AYphMgaSM-w70Af4DDki1y9l1Q1Qf3tG_Y3Myt0dnKZc99KygRu7awC1PGym7B0HiFOnYzo-GHF5wPS7YFvTAEQExDgFHFikKzziOJ6hFGriNJSeJXn9_HvSVOozFAiPF8VxEQh7eFgieUWy5I9Ofm6zbbp6jO8qf-EKzrpueAy1d3MJcdjYgK-lkyZN5XjjoKnAlSckQE_pTyAbtxDnyS9Sn9XRxJN8IVjk8VhuKOQyvg4of_zaOhORH0yMkhb9gUze_0zLlZPakFX9VhKDpX5nDCptARCq_ug38JdYKm0ZrSRO_b1Cr4k%3D)**

[**ELECT A BLACK CONSERVATIVE
SUPPORT PASTOR BRIAN NOW -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7c3de2fed39940b2adeb52ef41dd4f6f&_e=-VgdX05A3VMfiAKBPxh4VyCvrwvd-uICmr49KBcPqYJEsEcYoJ8IiH_12OQRzxIc3dPGCVizgeysY9e_p2jsM-buvrDGzP88hMA-0uvcHz1tlbPzDXmNSBxcL0uFUU4ere2R9Ia1z5qLjuQpmcBlt8xHoULcxxxlcDLFKFHUB5SNa_W-KIb5AYphMgaSM-w70Af4DDki1y9l1Q1Qf3tG_Y3Myt0dnKZc99KygRu7awC1PGym7B0HiFOnYzo-GHF5VqSm27gUwLug_KUNBmjy0iv5IMCZUhLsr1kK3BOidwfAxwtdfj3dwXOX7CIv6mEfgRVKkJQ1E_Zt5w0K53PL4AnyAsA-8BtaoSWTWBD9bGna3rj40Qn99g6YFCYMLZ9iwI97lWJebDd8TuCx44_wcvUNmfac3mIuyn43kDT7gtPU1_tF_Kuc97UxTIXHMc_pgz0QY9dNYWaKC5f3FFg5zql94B3Px56ZstwLM8hQZds%3D)
We should be raising our children on hope and freedom. A child raised in fear will be an adult living in fear and this is what Democrat organizations, like Black Lives Matter want. They achieve control by instilling fear and negativity in our children, and even adults.

**If America doesn’t wake up and see that racist organizations peddled by Democrats, like BLM are a cancer in our society, I fear our coming generations of black children will remain enslaved to the Left’s agenda.**

clean_body: Democrats will do anything to stop parents like me from teaching their black children that they can think for themselves and that the American dream i Democrats will do anything to stop parents like me from teaching their black children that they can think for themselves and that the American dream is attainable. | Peter, When a black parent has a child, they have a choice. They can either teach them that they are the descendants of slaves and will be systemically oppressed because of the color of their skin; OR, they can raise them with hope and help shape their dreams. I refuse to raise my children constantly reminding them that their ancestors were slaves over a hundred years ago. Instead, my children will grow up knowing that they’re from a line of lawyers, doctors and successful Americans whose drive and initiative took them far in life. But the Democrats will do anything to stop parents like me from teaching their black children that the American dream is attainable. I will no longer allow the Democrats to control Black Americans like myself. The color of my skin does not make me a victim, nor does it bind me to one political party and their ideologies. We should be raising our children on hope and freedom. A child raised in fear will be an adult living in fear and this is what Democrat organizations, like Black Lives Matter want. body:
Democrats care more about attacking me than making real progress.

|
---
| | | Peter,

First: A Democrat Senator called my criminal justice reform bill nothing but a **" token"** effort and a **" half-hearted approach".**

Then: Nancy Pelosi said that Republicans are **" trying to get away with murder, actually -- the murder of George Floyd".**

Now: After Democrats filibustered my bill and refused to continue negotiating, they are calling me a **" clown".**

_As the only African American Republican Senator, I have been leading efforts for years to find solutions to the issues impacting police and communities of color all across our country._

Democrats are more interested in scoring political points and getting soundbites on CNN or MSNBC. **_They care more about the next election than making real progress towards criminal justice reforms._**

We can't let them get away with it.

body:
A Roundup of How Democrats are Destroying America in 30 Seconds

| [](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=894ed28e69c64578bc95f9edc92d0d88&_e=uknKC-S1bgKu5oie4JTOgTYnlIvYBb2cX5QPoPmb5AhtrQAicXeFl0kW59jmxBgwf2sZTi2oHPGl7sXfOZGe_TJDLtThlZsX7Ba8E5jgOZztKcyxzY2wvnzH_RRE2qdqU_Ta-b-5N--7p_KEROzktWDvbW1I0K4Ee3Luh0TEdOP2TqJjMzWFYfKj1YHCzO0ASvyU1yEkXwXlcn_2as_4HxVmOM8pTti6ueQq1gPVtql2cki0NFJMowSbgIw5UhplMpc5EAEu5VqP7ztrsCJ9NJ2pawgmMwfJ5eYV4xH02osJUQGYQ5F_L7fs8_sIhvJlSbwXS0JDuGNblzziewtBbxGfbbPBAuqsPrTqmStTPBelJdVsgypv7PGXlBGEftyt3ggbAWEVqu0CHMJcGQeDw-XCw9zpU7h2K-ZGVGVjbFEBov4T0h71IZgG4-FV5LsKThMyE97TbWkrtfeqJ7UHyO34RyBfFt-pM1mwXmYLoxU%3D)
---
Hey Friend,

_I think we can safely declare Joe Biden as one of the most failed Presidents in our nation’s history._

Let’s see what his Administration has accomplished so far... here’s our top 10:

1\. Foreign policy **FAILURE in Afghanistan** making America look weak
2\. Vaccine **MANDATES** for essentially all businesses, but not immigrants
3\. Inflation at its **HIGHEST** since 2008
4\. Election Integrity in **JEOPARDY**
5\. **TRILLIONS** of wasteful spending planned to be spent on phony infrastructure
6\. Fake news, corrupt media, and Big Tech **CONTROLLING** information
7\. **CRIME** severely spiking in major U.S. cities
8\. National debt approaching **30 TRILLION**
9\. Democrats pushing more **SOCIALIST** ideas than ever before
10\. Critical Race Theory **INFILTRATING** our schools
11\. The individual liberties that this country was built on in **PERIL!**

This list just grazes the surface, but I just wanted to make sure you were informed. | | [**TURN OUR NATION AROUND**](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=894ed28e69c64578bc95f9edc92d0d88&_e=uknKC-S1bgKu5oie4JTOgTYnlIvYBb2cX5QPoPmb5AhtrQAicXeFl0kW59jmxBgwf2sZTi2oHPGl7sXfOZGe_TJDLtThlZsX7Ba8E5jgOZztKcyxzY2wvnzH_RRE2qdqU_Ta-b-5N--7p_KEROzktWDvbW1I0K4Ee3Luh0TEdOP2TqJjMzWFYfKj1YHCzO0ASvyU1yEkXwXlcn_2as_4HxVmOM8pTti6ueQq1gPVtql2cki0NFJMowSbgIw5UhplW26e3v5btEYQxmbmV3_wUdoQg4uQV9MjeQLPrIrAnXvtQW4Ny_jNtc0Kt3HoxwZDG54S3wwj26GU3p6YX_7OiykgJoS2SRPpRFFG6nahMpAoguo3SKy15law40sun2c10YB1D2YVthz3ew33JeuQweVZ_BE_jzoxVZ5Bf3ARA765ME0khtFpx40cql-p_Sch8V-oeWDWkgjQwqMF6zkg3UzB3QE65YSGH7sJi9JroEk%3D)

The individual liberties that this country was built on in PERIL! subject: Stop the War on Florida!
body:
President Joe Biden is behaving like an oppressive tyrant in... |
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=1b9c98ebbd&e=c2296cffff)
---
| | Dear Friend, President Joe Biden is behaving like an oppressive tyrant in our oval office. The radical left is so upset if Florida’s respect for the rights of Americans, they are trying to use big government strong-arming to force us to submit! In regards to Governor DeSantis; Biden stated, "**_If they’ll not help, if these governors won’t help us beat the pandemic, I’ll use my power as president to get them out of the way,"_** **Now, Biden has taken it a step further and will cut shipments of the Regeneron monoclonal antibody treatment to Florida! **We can’t stand for this tyranny, we need to send Amanda Makki to Congress to protect our freedoms!
---
| [FIGHT AGAINST BIDEN'S TYRANNY](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=74ad3587bb&e=c2296cffff "FIGHT AGAINST BIDEN'S TYRANNY")

---
| This obvious example of big government outrage is proof that Democrats shouldn’t be in power! We, as a state, chose liberty over fear during COVID-19 and have prospered because of it. **Threatening Americans’ jobs and liberties doesn’t coerce people into getting the vaccine it just shows what a bully Biden is!** **Florida chooses freedom over government control!** We will not bow down to the radical left’s continued attempts to control us. **Amanda Makki stands with Governor DeSantis against Joe Biden’s tyrannical bullying and vaccine mandates. ** We need to take back the House in 2022 to end this big-government agenda. **With your support, Amanda can help retake the House and stand for strong conservative values in Washington.** [**Can Amanda Makki count on your support to help retake the House in 2022 and stand up to vaccine mandates?**](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=4f473121bd&e=c2296cffff)
---
| [FIGHT AGAINST VACCINE MANDATES](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=395914b590&e=c2296cffff "FIGHT AGAINST VACCINE MANDATES")
---
| Thank you for joining us,
_Team Makki_

name: National Democratic Training Committee
subject: Tomorrow’s closing event (featuring Rep. Nikema Williams!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats
body:
| Last chance to join us...
---
[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..HJOSDDFVcYnv8Gu7HgeWAoLk2m2incxY4RzZja6cQkE)
Peter — Build Blue Week has been _historic_ to say the least. But we’re not quite done yet — and we have one event that you’ll **_definitely_** want to attend. Join us _tomorrow_ for [**Building the Future with Rep. Nikema Williams (GA-05)**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..0LMehWXfU8YLU1bMiXxdrB7auupx4Rwvg2GY9Ol01Ro) at 2pm ET, for a conversation on organizing and empowering collective action, and tapping into your own power to build the future through grassroots organizing, power building, and community mobilization. [**Space is limited, so be sure to register right away.**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..qaV2TZY-zCnISs_zQ1fdSWECpFPA_vQqSmdWbVqLS4U) | [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..hytQiHNxUAagEHeunrpf2rFEaP_gPd5DQ0sRoexZhTk)
---
Build Blue Week has been all about, well, _building blue!_ So we want to wrap up the week with a message of hope, inspiration, and an outlook of what’s to come.
[**Don’t miss this incredible opportunity to hear from Rep. Nikema Williams herself, RSVP now!**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..tHHqgMnuZtu-0_lUwrb6VfJPOD04aJ1lAopv7CBAjvs)
[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Y31C8_XgvxQAfuj0vtSFt9gEIT_qydJc0hVkLLyPC_A)
---
_— The NDTC Team_
_P.S. — We’ll be making a special announcement at the end of this event, so make sure to RSVP right now and stay on until the end to hear the news! You won’t want to miss it._
[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..v3NfyXLnFjS67kjPcbau4Xh979ewTz30Wn0E3sVAZLE)
